| | | | | Friend,
---
| I think the Democrats have settled on their new mantra for 2024...

| **_“If you can’t beat Trump, then lie, cheat, steal, and lock him up.”_**

| There truly is no low, no witch hunt, that the radical Left, the Deep State, and the globalist cabal won’t use to try and destroy our MAGA movement.
---
| __And now, the district attorneys hand-picked and personally funded by George Soros are gunning for me with only one objective – to stop us from taking back our country in 2024.__
---
| But remember, Friend, they only want to lock me up because I’m the one thing standing between them and _YOU_.
---
| _What they fear above all else is the greatest grassroots political movement in history made up of MILLIONS of American patriots like you who challenge their power and their radical agenda._
---
| **Which is why now more than ever before, I’m counting on YOU to help me DEFEND our movement from the latest witch hunts concocted by Soros’ corrupt prosecutors.**

body:

# **
The Feds's Digital Dollar Is Here!**
**It is official.** The digital dollar, once talked about, is here. Reuters reported that on Tuesday November 15th, 2022, a statement from the Fed's of New York, announcing that Global Banking Giants and the New York Fed are testing the digital dollar in a 12-week pilots.
Citigroup, HSBC, Mastercard, and Wells Fargo are among the financial companies participating in the experiment. According to New York Fed, the project, which is called the regulated liability network, will use simulated data.
How will that affect you and your finances? Well, go figure. You will no longer have any privacy whatsoever. Your hard-earned savings will be "worth-less". Surely the dollar will continue to devalue resulting in heavily diminishing your purchasing power. [Learn more](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zbddo1bknm05r0qojepa1kt9nut5egciot9ni4ao_rp22sh2s8i66pr0stg6aoj4cdh2bs).
**Our government will know what you have, where you have it, and how you are spending it.** This is the ultimate control that they are after. It limits and blocks the way [you spend your money](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zmmrg42vh83r8ou2vvf3jp9b6f44s7tb4c69r15o_rp22sh2s8i66pr0stg6aoj4cdh2bs) unless obtaining their approval at first.
Therefore, your money is no longer safe! Prepare for the worst. Your dollar could be worth a fraction of what it is worth today.
**They are all in cahoots. Americans can't afford for their wealth to be tested on. We are not in a["Financial Rat-Lab"](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zcqeifutjp22659ruh40kls77gd0ejuado2khu1o_rp22sh2s8i66pr0stg6aoj4cdh2bs). Enough is Enough, we have suffered greatly. **
Time is no longer on your side, and you can't afford to gamble anymore with your money. The reset is real, and the project to replace the "king of currencies" is underway.
You shouldn't have to work as hard to protect your retirement nest egg as you did to earn it.
Whether you love or hate gold and silver, there is no way to hate what the asset itself can offer you. In the past, gold was viewed as a safe haven. Today, it is role has completely expanded. It offers you privacy, insurance, preservation of wealth, hedge against inflation and potential profit making. [Get more information.](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z19gekiq8gfrogp75po5lkmm0puk5b0nt7ed3ho0_rp22sh2s8i66pr0stg6aoj4cdh2bs)
There has never been a more urgent time to understand the role of gold and how to own it. Taking control back of both your privacy and your retirement wealth are key. Investing in gold and silver can help you sit back and enjoy the peace of mind that comes with protecting your retirement.
The time on missing on great opportunities is over. **[Act today!](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zmf9s0qj193j5b0lsu1fhhi86p0m7i6dvvem8q0g_rp22sh2s8i66pr0stg6aoj4cdh2bs)** Explore, 100% free, how gold inside your retirement can significantly improve your future wealth.
Call**(844) 790-9191** or simply [click here](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zsi33f4fra816pkmfo3n70mpgmjk00c11kcsjak8_rp22sh2s8i66pr0stg6aoj4cdh2bs) to receive all the essential information tailored specifically to your needs. body:

---
| | | This CAN'T be real. My team intercepted an internal Democrat communication from Ilhan Omar to her top supporters, and well, you have to see it to believe it:

---
_**GOOD NEWS:** As it stands, we've received nearly 2.5x as many grassroots contributions in February as we had at this point in January. That's incredible, Judy -- and it's all thanks to grassroots supporters like you stepping up when it mattered most to our campaign._
_-Ilhan Omar_
---

If this is true, we're in _trouble._ Ilhan's radical agenda is _gaining_ steam amongst her leftist base - they're _**flooding**_ her coffers with cash. At this rate, she'll have MILLIONS in the bank to **spread** her socialist ideology and **expand** Democrat control.

Together, we successfully **KICKED** Ilhan off the Foreign Affairs Committee, a great victory for our nation's national security. However, that means she's got _even more_ time on her hands to cozy up to Hollywood donors and leftist elitists.

We need to keep pace with Ilhan and her squad if we want to keep delivering conservative wins in Congress. **[If you like what you've seen out of us so far, I urge you to pitch in any amount to help us keep up the momentum and leave the Democrats in the dust:](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62427825:JMB_-fGXN:m:1:3331421248:A5D4DF3BFEBB63D471A2F7CC029B1B85:r "If you like what

name: Bo Snerdley
subject: Is Black History Over?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY NEW JOURNEY PAC
body:
. Biden has consistently failed Black America, but an election is coming up and he wants our votes again.

[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62428037:6IL6KfGNJ:m:1:3365131770:D60E56561E948F0D3D631F90589A7CC6:r "Headline") Peter: Joe Biden wanted to make Black History in February, and tried to convince us that he was a civil rights leader back in the day, who frequented black churches, and lowered unemployment rates. Now he's trying to tell us that he's the savior for America's Historically Black Colleges and Universities. It's all a con. Biden has consistently failed Black America, but an election is coming up and he wants our votes again. **[Donate TODAY and help us protect Black Voters from the Biden Con!](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62428037:6IL6KfGNJ:m:1:3365131770:D60E56561E948F0D3D631F90589A7CC6:r "Donate TODAY and help us protect Black Voters from the Biden Con!")** Too many Americans are suffering from high inflation due to Biden's poor leadership and the left-wing zealots that run the Democrat party. Thanks to the soft on crime prosecutors, elected with the help of George Soros, and "catch and release" bail reforms, crime levels are at a crisis point. It's even worse in our urban areas where banks and retailers have been forced to flee. Providing our children with a quality education has become a joke in some of these cities where kids are taught that America is the land of a thousand grievances. Democrats are ending Black History as we know it and dumbing our children down. **[It's time to set a new course for Black History in America. Donate TODAY and help New Journey lead Black America into the 2024 Election with leaders who will work to deliver the American Dream not empty promises.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62428037:6IL6KfGNJ:m:1:3365131770:D60E56561E948F0D3D631F90589A7CC6:r "It’s time to set a new course for Black History in America. Donate TODAY and help New Journey lead Black America into the 2024 Election
with leaders who will work to deliver the American Dream not empty promises.")** Fortunately, we've shown some Black Voters that they can choose to support candidates based on the content of their character--not the color of their skin or party affiliation--John James, Winsome Sears, Tim Scott, and Wesley Hunt, to name a few. [](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62428037:6IL6KfGNJ:m:1:3365131770:D60E56561E948F0D3D631F90589A7CC6:r "Headline")**There are still tens of millions of Black Americans who need to hear this message but won 't if we don't have the resources to reach them.** Black Voters have been duped for over 60 years by Biden and his party that prop up false prophets like the Rev. Al Sharpton, Stacey Abrams and others, who embrace the con and use their status to line their own pockets. **[Donate TODAY and help New Journey set a new direction for Black History in America!](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62428037:6IL6KfGNJ:m:1:3365131770:D60E56561E948F0D3D631F90589A7CC6:r "Donate TODAY and help New Journey set a new direction for Black
History in America!")** We need your help to overcome the left's entrenched efforts in our urban areas and prevent the left from further dictating the future of Black History. **The future needs to be less focused on identity politics and more concerned with securing the America we love - as a land of opportunity - where all her citizens feel invested in her future.** As a student of Black History, I've witnessed our dependency on the left's narrative, but now that we have great leaders from Justice Clarence Thomas to Thomas Sowell, from Tim Scott, to Winsome Sears and many others to emulate, I'm confident Black America will join us when they learn the truth about Black History. **[We are respectfully asking for you to join our mission and help us Save America by supporting our efforts to educate millions of Black Voters before they fall for another Biden Con.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62428037:6IL6KfGNJ:m:1:3365131770:D60E56561E948F0D3D631F90589A7CC6:r "We are respectfully asking for you to join our mission and help us Save America by supporting our efforts to educate millions of Black Voters

"Headline" Peter: Joe Biden wanted to make Black History in February, and tried to convince us that he was a civil rights leader back in the day, who frequented black churches, and lowered unemployment rates. Now he's trying to tell us that he's the savior for America's Historically Black Colleges and Universities. It's all a con. Biden has consistently failed Black America, but an election is coming up and he wants our votes again. "Donate TODAY and help us protect Black Voters from the Biden Con!" Too many Americans are suffering from high inflation due to Biden's poor leadership and the left-wing zealots that run the Democrat party. Thanks to the soft on crime prosecutors, elected with the help of George Soros, and "catch and release" bail reforms, crime levels are at a crisis point. It's even worse in our urban areas where banks and retailers have been forced to flee. Providing our children with a quality education has become a joke in some of these cities where kids are taught that America is the land of a thousand grievances. Democrats are ending Black History as we know it and dumbing our children down. "It’s time to set a new course for Black History in America. Donate TODAY and help New Journey lead Black America into the 2024 Election with leaders who will work to deliver the American Dream not empty promises." Fortunately, we've shown some Black Voters that they can choose to support candidates based on the content of their character--not the color of their skin or party affiliation--John James, Winsome Sears, Tim Scott, and Wesley Hunt, to name a few. "Headline"There are still tens of millions of Black Americans who need to hear this message but won 't if we don't have the resources to reach them. Black Voters have been duped for over 60 years by Biden and his party that prop up false prophets like the Rev. Al Sharpton, Stacey Abrams and others, who embrace the con and use their status to line their own pockets. "Donate TODAY and help New Journey set a new direction for Black History in America!" As a student of Black History, I've witnessed our dependency on the left's narrative, but now that we have great leaders from Justice Clarence Thomas to Thomas Sowell, from Tim Scott, to Winsome Sears and many others to emulate, I'm confident Black America will join us when they learn the truth about Black History. | | | This CAN'T be real. My team intercepted an internal Democrat communication from Ilhan Omar to her top supporters, and well, you have to see it to believe it:

---
_**GOOD NEWS:** As it stands, we've received nearly 2.5x as many grassroots contributions in February as we had at this point in January. That's incredible, Judy -- and it's all thanks to grassroots supporters like you stepping up when it mattered most to our campaign._
_-Ilhan Omar_
---

If this is true, we're in _trouble._ Ilhan's radical agenda is _gaining_ steam amongst her leftist base - they're _**flooding**_ her coffers with cash. At this rate, she'll have MILLIONS in the bank to **spread** her socialist ideology and **expand** Democrat control.

Together, we successfully **KICKED** Ilhan off the Foreign Affairs Committee, a great victory for our nation's national security. However, that means she's got _even more_ time on her hands to cozy up to Hollywood donors and leftist elitists.

We need to keep pace with Ilhan and her squad if we want to keep delivering conservative wins in Congress. **[If you like what you've seen out of us so far, I urge you to pitch in any amount to help us keep up the momentum and leave the Democrats in the dust:](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62428054:Jb3hdfGNn:m:1:3365131770:BB262630E484EB2F28E7A50E51B951F4:r "If you like what

name: Senator Amanda Chase
subject: Urgent- Deadline approaching!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Amanda Chase
body:
I'm going back into session soon!
---
| | | | | | [ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001Ox11xtBOgaJvtDbqvuD7spyeYerQzXE0QIFc2PlaUMBZTvqbC07lx2-zI7wHPnoOnJckcCBUqjDZqi8H2OAQMd1bEnarjkY6-_MJ1Rr5j_JBz18ZuXEgKavob8NzfX_Oxz9saLBavbmDwBufh9ioLtIQC_W6WcosENTrlAKYOwY=&c=PvmCtZkcaRT0hRLNVLcUaGhcI7KysuwRi0tSjmXZxjH3h5ZLVZE_ag==&ch=Lyhzwv7bjeEnrxhUzATwYmNl3SPWlYm31A_ZbzLA803YwdWjO2OghQ==)
---
| |
---
| | |
---
| | |
---
My name is Amanda Chase, and I am the America-First Senator in Virginia's 12th District. I have spent years fighting for this District and have not let Virginians down. However, I am at a big disadvantage and need your help. My constituents know that I am a conservative Patriot fighting for their rights. However, the Democrats hate me and want me out of office. That is why they gerrymandered my District. They are hoping to push me out, but we aren't going to let them. We just left Virginia's 2023 session. We passed a lot of significant legislation, and I worked hard to ensure I served my District. Unfortunately, Virginia election law states we can't fundraise while in session. So for the last 12 weeks, I haven't been able to raise a dime. On the other hand, my opponents aren't sitting Senators, so they have been able to continue fundraising while I have been working hard to protect Virginians. [This is why I NEED your help! Those 12 weeks lost a lot of time, and now we must rush to make up for it. For the month of March, we still have $8,450 to go to meet our fundraising goal.](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001Ox11xtBOgaJvtDbqvuD7spyeYerQzXE0QIFc2PlaUMBZTvqbC07lx2-zI7wHPnoOnJckcCBUqjDZqi8H2OAQMd1bEnarjkY6-_MJ1Rr5j_JBz18ZuXEgKavob8NzfX_Oxz9saLBavbmDwBufh9ioLtIQC_W6WcosENTrlAKYOwY=&c=PvmCtZkcaRT0hRLNVLcUaGhcI7KysuwRi0tSjmXZxjH3h5ZLVZE_ag==&ch=Lyhzwv7bjeEnrxhUzATwYmNl3SPWlYm31A_ZbzLA803YwdWjO2OghQ==)
[Can I count on you to help?](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001Ox11xtBOgaJvtDbqvuD7spyeYerQzXE0QIFc2PlaUMBZTvqbC07lx2-zI7wHPnoOnJckcCBUqjDZqi8H2OAQMd1bEnarjkY6-_MJ1Rr5j_JBz18ZuXEgKavob8NzfX_Oxz9saLBavbmDwBufh9ioLtIQC_W6WcosENTrlAKYOwY=&c=PvmCtZkcaRT0hRLNVLcUaGhcI7KysuwRi0tSjmXZxjH3h5ZLVZE_ag==&ch=Lyhzwv7bjeEnrxhUzATwYmNl3SPWlYm31A_ZbzLA803YwdWjO2OghQ==)
[-> Donate $25 today!<-](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001Ox11xtBOgaJvtDbqvuD7spyeYerQzXE0QIFc2PlaUMBZTvqbC07lx2-zI7wHPnoOnJckcCBUqjDZqi8H2OAQMd1bEnarjkY6-_MJ1Rr5j_JBz18ZuXEgKavob8NzfX_Oxz9saLBavbmDwBufh9ioLtIQC_W6WcosENTrlAKYOwY=&c=PvmCtZkcaRT0hRLNVLcUaGhcI7KysuwRi0tSjmXZxjH3h5ZLVZE_ag==&ch=Lyhzwv7bjeEnrxhUzATwYmNl3SPWlYm31A_ZbzLA803YwdWjO2OghQ==) We are running out of time before election day. There are just three months left before my primary, and we have a lot of ground to make up. My constituents know I'm not the kind of politician who talks the talk; I also walk the walk. That is precisely the attitude I went into the session with, and I did not disappoint. In fact, I am such a staunch supporter of conservative values that I won the Conservative Achievement award for the 7th year in a row.
---
[ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001Ox11xtBOgaJvtDbqvuD7spyeYerQzXE0QIFc2PlaUMBZTvqbC07lx2-zI7wHPnoOnJckcCBUqjDZqi8H2OAQMd1bEnarjkY6-_MJ1Rr5j_JBz18ZuXEgKavob8NzfX_Oxz9saLBavbmDwBufh9ioLtIQC_W6WcosENTrlAKYOwY=&c=PvmCtZkcaRT0hRLNVLcUaGhcI7KysuwRi0tSjmXZxjH3h5ZLVZE_ag==&ch=Lyhzwv7bjeEnrxhUzATwYmNl3SPWlYm31A_ZbzLA803YwdWjO2OghQ==)
---
That is because I put in the work and fight for conservative values. I don't skip votes to avoid going on the record like my opponent used to do when he was State Senator. You will always know where I stand on the issues. I have no problem going on the record and letting the world know. I am not willing to compromise. I can't be bought when it comes to upholding conservative values and standing up for my constituents. Meanwhile, every one of my opponents in this race is taking big checks from corporations, even if they are left-leaning. Do you think they can't be bought? But that's not the only proof of how I'm on your side. The CPAC American Conservative Union Scorecards are in, and once again, I went on the record. The same can't be said for my opponents. If you want to know the kind of politician I am, go look at the scorecard.

---
[ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001Ox11xtBOgaJvtDbqvuD7spyeYerQzXE0QIFc2PlaUMBZTvqbC07lx2-zI7wHPnoOnJckcCBUqjDZqi8H2OAQMd1bEnarjkY6-_MJ1Rr5j_JBz18ZuXEgKavob8NzfX_Oxz9saLBavbmDwBufh9ioLtIQC_W6WcosENTrlAKYOwY=&c=PvmCtZkcaRT0hRLNVLcUaGhcI7KysuwRi0tSjmXZxjH3h5ZLVZE_ag==&ch=Lyhzwv7bjeEnrxhUzATwYmNl3SPWlYm31A_ZbzLA803YwdWjO2OghQ==)
---
This was the 8th year in a row I was scored as 100% pro-life with a perfect voting record on pro-family issues! I became a politician because I want to fight for pro-life and pro-family issues. Years before I ever ran for office, I fought for these issues as an activist. I volunteered for the Family Foundation and worked hard to help them push their pro-family agenda. [I have taken that agenda with me to the Capitol, and I will not stop fighting until our families and the unborn are protected.](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001Ox11xtBOgaJvtDbqvuD7spyeYerQzXE0QIFc2PlaUMBZTvqbC07lx2-zI7wHPnoOnJckcCBUqjDZqi8H2OAQMd1bEnarjkY6-_MJ1Rr5j_JBz18ZuXEgKavob8NzfX_Oxz9saLBavbmDwBufh9ioLtIQC_W6WcosENTrlAKYOwY=&c=PvmCtZkcaRT0hRLNVLcUaGhcI7KysuwRi0tSjmXZxjH3h5ZLVZE_ag==&ch=Lyhzwv7bjeEnrxhUzATwYmNl3SPWlYm31A_ZbzLA803YwdWjO2OghQ==) In this session, I introduced a bill to save the unborn. Unfortunately, with a Democratic Senate, I can only do so much, but that doesn't mean this fight is over. This year is gearing up to be a great year for Republicans in Virginia. People are waking up to the Democrats' woke madness, and I have complete confidence that the Senate will turn RED! However, it won't matter if the Senate is red if we have RINOs sitting in our seats. Do you think the RINOs are going to fight to protect the unborn? To preserve family rights? I can assure you they aren't. That is why it is so important that I get your support today. The Democrats are so convinced that they need to replace me in the Senate that they have convinced a RINO to run against me! But we can't let the Democrats win. We need to stand up and fight against them. That is why I am coming to Patriots like you. I know you understand my voting record. I know you see the power because I am the most conservative legislator in the Virginia Senate. [Can I count on you to join my team today? Donate $5, $10, $25, $50, $100, $250, $500, $1000, or more today!](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001Ox11xtBOgaJvtDbqvuD7spyeYerQzXE0QIFc2PlaUMBZTvqbC07lx2-zI7wHPnoOnJckcCBUqjDZqi8H2OAQMd1bEnarjkY6-_MJ1Rr5j_JBz18ZuXEgKavob8NzfX_Oxz9saLBavbmDwBufh9ioLtIQC_W6WcosENTrlAKYOwY=&c=PvmCtZkcaRT0hRLNVLcUaGhcI7KysuwRi0tSjmXZxjH3h5ZLVZE_ag==&ch=Lyhzwv7bjeEnrxhUzATwYmNl3SPWlYm31A_ZbzLA803YwdWjO2OghQ==) My voting record doesn't lie, but my opponent does! clean_body: I'm going back into session soon! | | | | | | == | | | | | | | | My name is Amanda Chase, and I am the America-First Senator in Virginia's 12th District. I have spent years fighting for this District and have not let Virginians down. However, I am at a big disadvantage and need your help. My constituents know that I am a conservative Patriot fighting for their rights. However, the Democrats hate me and want me out of office. That is why they gerrymandered my District. They are hoping to push me out, but we aren't going to let them. We just left Virginia's 2023 session. We passed a lot of significant legislation, and I worked hard to ensure I served my District. Unfortunately, Virginia election law states we can't fundraise while in session. So for the last 12 weeks, I haven't been able to raise a dime. On the other hand, my opponents aren't sitting Senators, so they have been able to continue fundraising while I have been working hard to protect Virginians. == == == We are running out of time before election day. There are just three months left before my primary, and we have a lot of ground to make up. My constituents know I'm not the kind of politician who talks the talk; I also walk the walk. That is precisely the attitude I went into the session with, and I did not disappoint. In fact, I am such a staunch supporter of conservative values that I won the Conservative Achievement award for the 7th year in a row. == That is because I put in the work and fight for conservative values. I don't skip votes to avoid going on the record like my opponent used to do when he was State Senator. You will always know where I stand on the issues. I have no problem going on the record and letting the world know. I am not willing to compromise. I can't be bought when it comes to upholding conservative values and standing up for my constituents. Meanwhile, every one of my opponents in this race is taking big checks from corporations, even if they are left-leaning. Do you think they can't be bought? But that's not the only proof of how I'm on your side. The CPAC American Conservative Union Scorecards are in, and once again, I went on the record. The same can't be said for my opponents. If you want to know the kind of politician I am, go look at the scorecard. == This was the 8th year in a row I was scored as 100% pro-life with a perfect voting record on pro-family issues! I became a politician because I want to fight for pro-life and pro-family issues. Years before I ever ran for office, I fought for these issues as an activist. I volunteered for the Family Foundation and worked hard to help them push their pro-family agenda. == In this session, I introduced a bill to save the unborn. Unfortunately, with a Democratic Senate, I can only do so much, but that doesn't mean this fight is over. This year is gearing up to be a great year for Republicans in Virginia. People are waking up to the Democrats' woke madness, and I have complete confidence that the Senate will turn RED! However, it won't matter if the Senate is red if we have RINOs sitting in our seats. Do you think the RINOs are going to fight to protect the unborn? To preserve family rights? I can assure you they aren't. That is why it is so important that I get your support today. The Democrats are so convinced that they need to replace me in the Senate that they have convinced a RINO to run against me! But we can't let the Democrats win. We need to stand up and fight against them. That is why I am coming to Patriots like you. I know you understand my voting record. I know you see the power because I am the most conservative legislator in the Virginia Senate. == My voting record doesn't lie, but my opponent does! Donate today to keep Virginia RED! # **
The Feds's Digital Dollar Is Here!**
**It is official.** The digital dollar, once talked about, is here. Reuters reported that on Tuesday November 15th, 2022, a statement from the Fed's of New York, announcing that Global Banking Giants and the New York Fed are testing the digital dollar in a 12-week pilots.
Citigroup, HSBC, Mastercard, and Wells Fargo are among the financial companies participating in the experiment. According to New York Fed, the project, which is called the regulated liability network, will use simulated data.
How will that affect you and your finances? Well, go figure. You will no longer have any privacy whatsoever. Your hard-earned savings will be "worth-less". Surely the dollar will continue to devalue resulting in heavily diminishing your purchasing power. [Learn more](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=76e70517f93e4cc8810ac55264122901&_e=QS06Sr9JPUD-hgV13Gh3U01p-LFR6jeyjyRrcX0z-r9VHyHfWbwsMUzWoMrxcYORt0079yR5LAwd6iXFuXJQ8mizOyFoNyDynTol9SgvSum4oedkX_J1Xg6mzNzAAj4RDzoWvO2s6d3y7ljPjySZRultxrTq-GzrMyE5_1cdBvJfoey6-hlnHD24R0J-G1nQU8l8-CWX1zFMk-lyScmqiaNg3fzUBVn36lR6YpZskpQwt9dSHS1YVqBBlvo3XI2MCrahhqE5LK3pIWzvRHtCHhJo-0Qu0HgsKUKfHLlSEYmaiIJ9U6J8d0_I4_1bqsuGoVhQmwnCuL0LqejWDboqJv5c2hoGuhgI2jLUs8xVGwo%3D).
**Our government will know what you have, where you have it, and how you are spending it.** This is the ultimate control that they are after. It limits and blocks the way [you spend your money](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=76e70517f93e4cc8810ac55264122901&_e=QS06Sr9JPUD-hgV13Gh3U01p-LFR6jeyjyRrcX0z-r9VHyHfWbwsMUzWoMrxcYORt0079yR5LAwd6iXFuXJQ8mizOyFoNyDynTol9SgvSum4oedkX_J1Xg6mzNzAAj4RDzoWvO2s6d3y7ljPjySZRultxrTq-GzrMyE5_1cdBvJfoey6-hlnHD24R0J-G1nQURaiXRRINN0gHEqknOBoULD1rT-FHYM5mhLSCabr6WNkePpOk1PfHFb2PuOZOBoimLmEg6rbUDSMBOu7onCsabBzoeg2uq3aFEK_alPSuVyObL2TWPn-ppOmbv8N6vrqCD9YpSCPT5-YS6s0GfezySWzn0Ukyw0PPc-hTrg3vOA%3D) unless obtaining their approval at first.
Therefore, your money is no longer safe! Prepare for the worst. Your dollar could be worth a fraction of what it is worth today.
**They are all in cahoots. Americans can't afford for their wealth to be tested on. We are not in a[ "Financial Rat-Lab"](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=76e70517f93e4cc8810ac55264122901&_e=QS06Sr9JPUD-hgV13Gh3U01p-LFR6jeyjyRrcX0z-r9VHyHfWbwsMUzWoMrxcYORt0079yR5LAwd6iXFuXJQ8mizOyFoNyDynTol9SgvSum4oedkX_J1Xg6mzNzAAj4RDzoWvO2s6d3y7ljPjySZRultxrTq-GzrMyE5_1cdBvJfoey6-hlnHD24R0J-G1nQmLRHIRxrYykHVi_wa-OHtuIr_4UTHBrVCchmDsGpv4mGFTUwW9yjspkX1zPAUlay-8tZeTwOG_fv457LmFxGbLaKzMQHBoW8MmLZQP0kQ0nCm4LbGJvopdzVXi6KV5AJ41JqepVAa0jhEXXnxEiUeU5zkbIQruIPfUu1pbKMCcM%3D). Enough is Enough, we have suffered greatly. **

| CUT TO THE CHASE WITH SENATOR CHASE Upcoming Events PLEASE SAVE THESE DATES 3 1/2 months left until Election Day Tuesday, June 20
---
|
---
| |
---
| I WANT TO SEE YOU!
---
| Will you host a "meet & greet?"
---
| |
---
| Senator Amanda Chase
---
Senator Chase has represented Chesterfield, Colonial Heights and Amelia Counties in the Senate since first elected in 2015, almost 8 years. Amanda and her husband Mike have been married over 30 years and have 4 grown children. Amanda and Mike both grew up in Bon Air and have lived most of their lives in Chesterfield County, since 1979.
Amanda has been rated as one of the most conservative Senators in Virginia by the American Conservative Union and has a lifetime score of 100% with the Family Foundation, VCDL and A with the NRA.
She is also a champion in the General Assembly for pushing back against vaccine and mask mandates, calling for a full investigation into the 2020 Presidential Election, parental rights in education, medical freedom, protecting innocent life, protecting gun rights and help for our veterans.
---
| | |
---
| How can I help Amanda?
---
| Is there anything you can do today to help us win this June 20 Primary?
---
| | | [1\. DONATE](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001xvTGpc0tD2XzUwAE8uyb5I3d0qIf0zBbpbRCsWrbCV_zOJZVkE1nHfiscUYfgHHygE9fDrorqk1YbtDnZvjKO6XmCqCZFJzJwYOpxnW1JHQCausYWwpv3lBnH_zkB3YegBdzZAGU5kmqIAGH9NMwyb-MPgBkN2aNwgHiM1V-XKcpXKmegOrq8VwldDjg49z_oWCvXMLTqgtYh2Ik6sknFw==&c=M6JIGFw3iJuDxsom8x8f-e_i3FO2ev0loxKIlmv9yqXcwG8n1QjAyA==&ch=hg242OwIDHh7XmX_L_cJ6UzuTh2vFh4PXeOB9JB_Z6liuv_SBxQxJA==)
---
| How much do you value your freedom? Most candidates are bought for and paid for by political action committees and lobbyists. Not me.
I rely on the generous donations from you. So please chip in today. Anyone can donate and you don't have to live in the district to give. You may not be able to vote for me, but I can still vote for you.
Successful campaigns are expensive unfortunately. Many people are surprised to find out that we have to raise our own money to run for public office. I've heard people express that they didn't know about a campaign and I know it was because the candidate didn't raise enough money to get the word out.
Signs, mailers, radio, tv and social media ads let people know there's an election coming and to get out and vote. In order to communicate to voters it costs money. If 5,000 people gave $100 we would be able to fully fund my campaign.
Would you please donate $100 today or more if you are able?
---
| | | [2\. VOLUNTEER](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001xvTGpc0tD2XzUwAE8uyb5I3d0qIf0zBbpbRCsWrbCV_zOJZVkE1nHSuO8zOVbqULiG13RNbQ13-Yb7hoyT3c_sxZteta7DT7092BS3fsbGu5kxL71thEBDG-LcRAIeD8I87-mKW49rdTGB8ClurSTGn2sSMVjjaUQXL_Pf_LsHU=&c=M6JIGFw3iJuDxsom8x8f-e_i3FO2ev0loxKIlmv9yqXcwG8n1QjAyA==&ch=hg242OwIDHh7XmX_L_cJ6UzuTh2vFh4PXeOB9JB_Z6liuv_SBxQxJA==)

|
Want to Walk your Neighborhood with Amanda? Please help us collect signatures to get my name on the ballot, drop off some campaign literature along with an invitation to our upcoming community event. Our goal is to reach a different neighborhood every week.
Beginning Saturday, March 11 and every Saturday going forward we will go door to door from 10am to 5pm in 2 shifts.
For the first shift please arrive at 9:30am for instructions and we will begin walking at 10am. This first shift is from 10am until 1pm.
For the second shift please arrive at 1:30pm for instructions and we will begin walking at 2pm. The second shift is from 2pm to 5pm.
We will meet at the Arby's on Hull Street parking lot located at: 6541 Bayside Ln, Midlothian, VA 23112
If you are able to walk your neighborhood during the week, please reach out to Chris at [chris@chaseforva.com](mailto:chris@chaseforva.com).
---
| | | [3\. HOST A MEET & GREET](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001xvTGpc0tD2XzUwAE8uyb5I3d0qIf0zBbpbRCsWrbCV_zOJZVkE1nHSuO8zOVbqULiG13RNbQ13-Yb7hoyT3c_sxZteta7DT7092BS3fsbGu5kxL71thEBDG-LcRAIeD8I87-mKW49rdTGB8ClurSTGn2sSMVjjaUQXL_Pf_LsHU=&c=M6JIGFw3iJuDxsom8x8f-e_i3FO2ev0loxKIlmv9yqXcwG8n1QjAyA==&ch=hg242OwIDHh7XmX_L_cJ6UzuTh2vFh4PXeOB9JB_Z6liuv_SBxQxJA==)
---
|
What is a "Meet and Greet"? A "meet and "greet" is simply inviting your friends and neighbors over for dessert and coffee so that I can meet them and answer their questions. This is an opportunity for voters to interview the candidate. I look forward to meeting your friends and neighbors and personally asking for their vote.
Would you be willing to open your home, business or neighborhood clubhouse so that I can meet your friends and neighbors?
Know that we will help you with invitations and getting the word out about your meet and greet. We encourage hosts to keep it simple. Dessert and coffee are perfect and the event should only last about an hour and a half. We've found that Tuesday and Thursday evenings or Sunday late afternoons work best.
If this interests you please reach out to Debbie at [debbie@chaseforva.com](mailto:debbie@chaseforva.com) to schedule a date.
---
|

| WHERE IS THE 12th SENATE DISTRICT?

| The 12th Senatorial District includes most of Chesterfield and all of Colonial Heights. Anyone who is registered to vote in Colonial Heights can vote for me on Tuesday, June 20 at their regular polling location between the hours of 6am and 7pm.
In the 12th Senatorial District, there are 51 voting precincts in Chesterfield and 5 voting precincts in Colonial Heights. Click on the link below to see a map of each Chesterfield precinct within SD 12.

clean_body: Hope to see you there! | | | | | | == | CUT TO THE CHASE WITH SENATOR CHASE Upcoming Events PLEASE SAVE THESE DATES 3 1/2 months left until Election Day Tuesday, June 20 | | | | I WANT TO SEE YOU! | Will you host a "meet & greet?" | | | Senator Amanda Chase Senator Chase has represented Chesterfield, Colonial Heights and Amelia Counties in the Senate since first elected in 2015, almost 8 years. Amanda and her husband Mike have been married over 30 years and have 4 grown children. Amanda and Mike both grew up in Bon Air and have lived most of their lives in Chesterfield County, since 1979. Amanda has been rated as one of the most conservative Senators in Virginia by the American Conservative Union and has a lifetime score of 100% with the Family Foundation, VCDL and A with the NRA. She is also a champion in the General Assembly for pushing back against vaccine and mask mandates, calling for a full investigation into the 2020 Presidential Election, parental rights in education, medical freedom, protecting innocent life, protecting gun rights and help for our veterans. | | | | How can I help Amanda? | Is there anything you can do today to help us win this June 20 Primary? | | | == | How much do you value your freedom? Most candidates are bought for and paid for by political action committees and lobbyists. Not me. I rely on the generous donations from you. So please chip in today. Anyone can donate and you don't have to live in the district to give. You may not be able to vote for me, but I can still vote for you. Successful campaigns are expensive unfortunately. Many people are surprised to find out that we have to raise our own money to run for public office. I've heard people express that they didn't know about a campaign and I know it was because the candidate didn't raise enough money to get the word out. Signs, mailers, radio, tv and social media ads let people know there's an election coming and to get out and vote. In order to communicate to voters it costs money. If 5,000 people gave $100 we would be able to fully fund my campaign. Would you please donate $100 today or more if you are able? | | | == | Want to Walk your Neighborhood with Amanda? Please help us collect signatures to get my name on the ballot, drop off some campaign literature along with an invitation to our upcoming community event. Our goal is to reach a different neighborhood every week. Beginning Saturday, March 11 and every Saturday going forward we will go door to door from 10am to 5pm in 2 shifts. For the first shift please arrive at 9:30am for instructions and we will begin walking at 10am. This first shift is from 10am until 1pm. For the second shift please arrive at 1:30pm for instructions and we will begin walking at 2pm. The second shift is from 2pm to 5pm. We will meet at the Arby's on Hull Street parking lot located at: 6541 Bayside Ln, Midlothian, VA 23112 If you are able to walk your neighborhood during the week, please reach out to Chris at mailto:chris@chaseforva.com. | | | == | What is a "Meet and Greet"? A "meet and "greet" is simply inviting your friends and neighbors over for dessert and coffee so that I can meet them and answer their questions. This is an opportunity for voters to interview the candidate. I look forward to meeting your friends and neighbors and personally asking for their vote. Would you be willing to open your home, business or neighborhood clubhouse so that I can meet your friends and neighbors? Know that we will help you with invitations and getting the word out about your meet and greet. We encourage hosts to keep it simple. Dessert and coffee are perfect and the event should only last about an hour and a half. We've found that Tuesday and Thursday evenings or Sunday late afternoons work best. If this interests you please reach out to Debbie at mailto:debbie@chaseforva.com to schedule a date. | | WHERE IS THE 12th SENATE DISTRICT? | The 12th Senatorial District includes most of Chesterfield and all of Colonial Heights. Anyone who is registered to vote in Colonial Heights can vote for me on Tuesday, June 20 at their regular polling location between the hours of 6am and 7pm. In the 12th Senatorial District, there are 51 voting precincts in Chesterfield and 5 voting precincts in Colonial Heights. Click on the link below to see a map of each Chesterfield precinct within SD 12. | | | == | | UPCOMING MEET & GREETS | | SAVE THESE DATES | THIS THURSDAY, MARCH 16 | Senate District 12 Candidate Debate | | MARCH 31 | | | | | == | | | mailto:chris@chaseforva.com | | APRIL 3 CHESTERFIELD VA TEA PARTY | | | | mailto:chris@chaseforva.com | APRIL 6 Meet & Greet in Bon Air | | | | == | APRIL 13 Meet & Greet in Colonial Heights | | | | == | APRIL 27 Meet & Greet at Summerlake in Chesterfield County | | | | == | MAY 11 Meet & Greet at Chesdin Landing in Chesterfield County | | | | == | JUNE 20 | | | | | | | | == | | | == | | | mailto:chris@chaseforva.com | | | == | | | == | | | == | CAMPAIGN NEWSLETTERS | | | == | | | == | | | == | | | == | SESSION NEWSLETTERS | | | == | | | == | | | == | | | == | | | == | | | == | | | == | HOW DO I VOTE? | | | == | | | == | | | == | | | == | | | == | Authorized and Paid for by Friends of Amanda Chase | | Friends of Amanda Chase | P.O. subject: I never gave up

body:
| | | [](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62428110:JVt6hfGEN:m:1:3365131770:86750637029A9D6FD9BB5BD4344BA013:r)
---
Peter, My family escaped communist Vietnam after my father was put on a kill list. And even coming here as a child, I knew that I was a part of something special.

I know what happens when freedoms are taken for granted.

I know what happens without the freedoms we have here, and that made me never take America for granted. So, I decided to do something to defend the country that gave me everything.

That's why I attended the Naval Academy and spent my career fighting alongside Seals and Special Force to keep America safe. _Because without our military, our great country might not exist._
---
[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62428110:JVt6hfGEN:m:1:3365131770:86750637029A9D6FD9BB5BD4344BA013:r)
---
[**JOIN OUR FIGHT**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62428110:JVt6hfGEN:m:1:3365131770:86750637029A9D6FD9BB5BD4344BA013:r)
---
**I may have hung up my uniform from combat, but that doesn 't mean I've stopped doing everything I can to make this country as strong as it can be.**

**That 's why I decided to become the Honorary Chairman of Unleash America -- an initiative which is dedicated to supporting leaders across America who embody the American spirit. **

Our freedom is on the line, and I know you will NEVER take our liberties for granted.

**[If you 're ready to stand with a tried-and-tested fighter for freedom, join me today in our fight to SAVE AMERICA.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62428110:JVt6hfGEN:m:1:3365131770:86750637029A9D6FD9BB5BD4344BA013:r)**
---

# **
The Feds's Digital Dollar Is Here!**
**It is official.** The digital dollar, once talked about, is here. Reuters reported that on Tuesday November 15th, 2022, a statement from the Fed's of New York, announcing that Global Banking Giants and the New York Fed are testing the digital dollar in a 12-week pilots.
Citigroup, HSBC, Mastercard, and Wells Fargo are among the financial companies participating in the experiment. According to New York Fed, the project, which is called the regulated liability network, will use simulated data.
How will that affect you and your finances? Well, go figure. You will no longer have any privacy whatsoever. Your hard-earned savings will be "worth-less". Surely the dollar will continue to devalue resulting in heavily diminishing your purchasing power. [Learn more](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=00972f3975764793befcc01c41d05443&_e=0qwwUATjfiJxywC36IAe2r86C5bO6BwXze4Vb1TvnF6AoE1Kma-WEH0OsQI_hMDY0_OTJA5V1Jn1kmsmN5lo4lrOBURKpfH33-b6mKfSM81LMzsblABaSIddNfkYtzcIZreFPBWK7ysX9Pfm6tsr99tClcPuEkmQtm94EQQUJMrpE3up39fODs2t7YH6MZ3dHxIL6pwhSU-9VV3_Sk6k3O8lC-4I4q5aOi99Agey-Ti7g3_GgbQAFYiv6Csn62rs8d_yhEQc53N_rP9F5oXxwYWF_shcmolcKiCf2ewdjzNoY987n1KUEQ1HNinQ0BHPT8HAXPnYwAWbda-tbYX1GQUKFsSv4tnSa-Q-tJa91RA%3D).
**Our government will know what you have, where you have it, and how you are spending it.** This is the ultimate control that they are after. It limits and blocks the way [you spend your money](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=00972f3975764793befcc01c41d05443&_e=0qwwUATjfiJxywC36IAe2r86C5bO6BwXze4Vb1TvnF6AoE1Kma-WEH0OsQI_hMDY0_OTJA5V1Jn1kmsmN5lo4lrOBURKpfH33-b6mKfSM81LMzsblABaSIddNfkYtzcIZreFPBWK7ysX9Pfm6tsr99tClcPuEkmQtm94EQQUJMrpE3up39fODs2t7YH6MZ3d5UvyYPBBzegzDus9STw-Z57tYo5b9KMAqbvHM93TxCJbILOCh0gDw3zFR2Ob-M6tiFwK6fBvtLxF8Nu-zyGzlxlqIf7Z_e954bFfrTSN-K6KTfm-QVQzHIOgVx96-TIgtSQdMiwOzObEkF7gHZJ3JWFH7aVhPKwV-tNPXQvDhFc%3D) unless obtaining their approval at first.
Therefore, your money is no longer safe! Prepare for the worst. Your dollar could be worth a fraction of what it is worth today.
**They are all in cahoots. Americans can't afford for their wealth to be tested on. We are not in a[ "Financial Rat-Lab"](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=00972f3975764793befcc01c41d05443&_e=0qwwUATjfiJxywC36IAe2r86C5bO6BwXze4Vb1TvnF6AoE1Kma-WEH0OsQI_hMDY0_OTJA5V1Jn1kmsmN5lo4lrOBURKpfH33-b6mKfSM81LMzsblABaSIddNfkYtzcIZreFPBWK7ysX9Pfm6tsr99tClcPuEkmQtm94EQQUJMrpE3up39fODs2t7YH6MZ3dTh0Xc1LWiYHPAybdy-1LvpLhqsXtL9Vr3dNbZgD0xvWiN1q9qsqcECrHAboLuJfFejZy7kk5yuEW6jLBXLMfInrWTLPfRSt-yf0VA1xcbREBNJ90LTp9qbaoRX54jENj_V6OKe4zcwqwRrffONI7ChD_ekujvPuGKlv8ykTn57I%3D). Enough is Enough, we have suffered greatly. **
Time is no longer on your side, and you can't afford to gamble anymore with your money. The reset is real, and the project to replace the "king of currencies" is underway.
You shouldn't have to work as hard to protect your retirement nest egg as you did to earn it.
Whether you love or hate gold and silver, there is no way to hate what the asset itself can offer you. In the past, gold was viewed as a safe haven. Today, it is role has completely expanded. It offers you privacy, insurance, preservation of wealth, hedge against inflation and potential profit making. name: Faith and Liberty News
subject: Christians May Only Have 8 Months of Economic "Freedom" Left
body:
| | Please see a special message from our sponsor.
---
| | | | | **American Christians May Only Have 8 Months Left To Prepare**
---
**American Christians May Only Have 8 Months Left To Prepare**
| | | God is shaking America. It took time for the prodigal son to "come to himself" and realize his wretched condition. Right now, for prodigal America, the clock is ticking. We are under divine discipline, but God's discipline, once rejected, becomes judgment.
---
|
---
| | We now enter the period the prophets of old spoke of, saying, "__everything that can be shaken will be shaken.__ " Economic shaking under the current Biden regime can quickly dissolve into - a total economic collapse!

The warning signs are everywhere. Who can deny it?

The current record inflation is causing people to feel helpless, afraid, and anxious about how to make ends meet... **and it will only get worse!**

Hi, I'm Lance Wallnau, a best-selling author and pastor to a national audience that I've helped guide for over thirty years. I'm the lone voice that predicted Donald Trump's presidency in 2015 and the term "_Trump Derangement_ " - long before anyone ever heard the phrase. I also predicted the 2020 election theft and named three of the five states where the media blacked out on election night. I don't always like what I see coming.

And today I want to give you...

**The Warning I Give Personally To****Nearly 1 Million Listeners**
Which is this: **Christians in America MUST take the possibility of near-total financial collapse seriously - and prepare!**

Why? Because in addition to the dumpster fire, D.C. elites fueled with trillions of dollars of reckless spending, **the coming global economic collapse will directly impact you** when it hits the U.S. Dollar. Since WWII, America has been the world's financial backbone, with the dollar used as the global reserve currency. We NEED the world to absorb our debt and use our dollars - but **_all that is about to end_**. China and Russia have long wanted to de-couple the world from the U.S. dollar, and Biden has made that possible.

And that means America's 40-year high inflation is NOTHING compared to what's coming to your doorstep.

Imagine waking up and all the essentials (rent, food, gas, medications) are **impossible to afford**. Plus, your stocks have dwindled to nothing because nobody can afford to buy the products made by those companies.

**So, what can you do to prepare?**

**What Christians Have Done**
**Since Biblical Times...**
...The same Prophet Haggai that said God will "shake all Nations" also said something overlooked, " _'**The silver is Mine, and the gold is Mine** ' says the Lord of hosts." _God is telling His people that He is still in control of economics and working all things together to His ends.

Those words about "silver and gold" drove me to research how to use physical gold and precious metals to protect your savings!

And the best way to do that today is through something called a **[Birch Gold Group IRA.](http://trk.faithandlibertymail.)**

This account allows you to keep PHYSICAL GOLD inside of a tax-deferred account... **without paying a DIME in penalties or taxes** when you sell your retirement portfolio stocks and **[transfer the funds into gold.](http://trk.faithandlibertymail.-iXkP4GGw)**

I am doing this myself because it is a God-sent opportunity for Christians to safeguard their retirement funds. _So don't let it slip away!_

**[Click here to request your free 20-page info kit on gold IRAs.](http://trk.faithandlibertymail.)**

God bless you and your family, and America.

AS ONE!
Lance Wallnau

---
| | |
---
Faith & Liberty PO Box 455 Leesburg, VA 20178If you no longer wish to receive sponsored promotional emails from us [_click here_](http://trk.faithandlibertymail.com/uu/3/eyJhaSI6OTkyNjA2OTcsImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiMTM1MDI1NTcxMSIsInJxIjoiMDItYjIzMDcyLTYzNzMwNjkzNjRiNzRjMDQ5Y2U5NzI4YWIwMTI2ZjRmIiwicGgiOm51bGwsIm0iOmZhbHNlfQ/Mcktu07jzMrbqQKDUlblyg) to unsubscribe.

clean_body: We must exonerate our patriots | | | | == | Peter, | Despite what Liz Cheney and Co. tried to tell you in their primetime, made-for-TV, UnSelect Committee... January 6th was not an "insurrection." It was an inside job. | | == | FIRST - Democrats and Never Trump RINOs tried to use this day as an excuse to wipe our movement off the political map. They locked Trump supporters in the D.C. Gulag without due process and tried to smear each and every one of us as insurrectionists. THEN - We just learned from BOMBSHELL tapes released on Tucker Carlson's show that the UnSelect Committee's J6 Narrative was A LIE. Not only was the crowd that day CRAWLING with federal informants - but Liz Cheney and the rest of the UnSelects withheld key video evidence... Like Capitol Police ESCORTING these "insurrectionists" throughout the building! And NOW - It's up to us to undo the damage done by these LIARS who tried to take out Trump and the America First Movement! WE MUST SET THE RECORD STRAIGHT AND EXONERATE OUR PATRIOTS!!! | | == | Peter, take it from one America First patriot who was just vindicated by the Swamp's smear attempts... We MUST do the same for our entire movement right now after YEARS of them bludgeoning us with these lies! If we don't correct the record now that we have the momentum, it just might be too late for us... Peter, w== Help spread the REAL TRUTH about the January 6th Inside Job far and wide. Before they use this Fed-surrection to stop the America First Movement in 2024, let's put their narrative to rest ONCE AND FOR ALL. | | == | | == | Thanks for fighting back, | == | Matt Gaetz Republican, Florida's 1st District | | | | | | == | == == | Copyright (C) 2023 Friends of Matt Gaetz, All rights reserved. name: Censorship Alerts ----------------- House GOP
subject: Will you add your name to our OFFICIAL petition?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC
body:
\-- &n; bsp; & nbsp;
|
---
| | | Peter - we won't mince words with you: **The Liberal Mob just launched a coordinated political AMBUSH to bring down Fox News ONCE AND FOR ALL!**

Here's what we know as of this moment - the Liberal Mob is racing to...

- Block Fox reporters from White House press briefings
- Boycott the network entirely to attack its credibility
- Circulate petitions to take popular hosts off the air
- Strip the network of critical ad dollars to attack Fox financially

_The Liberal Mob 's goal is crystal clear. They want Fox News - the largest news source for Conservatives in America - ripped off the airwaves and shut down for good._

_**[Trusted media sources for Conservatives must be protected, especially in a world where Democrat propaganda networks like CNN and MSNBC control so much of the news cycle and can stir Liberals into a FRENZY whenever they please.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62428008:Jai5hfGDN:m:1:3331421248:796CF4C0349B99619ED1566F4C8539E7:r "Trusted media sources for Conservatives must be protected, especially in a world where Democrat propaganda
networks like CNN and MSNBC control so much of the news cycle and can stir Liberals into a FRENZY whenever they please.")**_

Will you add your name to our official petition so we can prove there are thousands of Conservatives fed up with these attacks on our trusted media networks?
---
| | | [ADD YOUR NAME HERE >>](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62428008:Jai5hfGDN:m:1:3331421248:796CF4C0349B99619ED1566F4C8539E7:r "button")
---
We genuinely need your support to protect Conservative voices before it's too late.

**Without you, it could be all over.**

Thank you,
House Republicans

---
|
---
| Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC.
---
Team Scalise is committed to defending our Conservative House majority and electing Conservatives across the country. Thank you for being a part of our movement. This message was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com because you are a member of the Team Scalise Conservative grassroots network.

name: Jenny Beth Martin, Tea Party Patriots Action
subject: March 10: Take a Stand Against Joe Biden
body:
| | |
---
This week, use our Align Act campaigns to turn off the gas on Biden’s ban on stoves and impeach the man who abandoned our southern border. We also need your help to block Biden’s unauthorized WHO treaty and stop one of California’s most fraud-ridden officials from holding federal office!
---
| | |
---
[](http://lnk.teapartypatriots._nH7FTpH_eb-aGE6GGQ)
---
Despite an outcry from Americans in support of gas stoves, the Biden administration is pressing forward with proposals for bans and unnecessary regulations. We have an opportunity to kill the ban once and for all by submitting comments to the regulatory agency responsible for this government intrusion into American kitchens. **Use the Tea Party Patriots activism tool to**[**submit a ready-made comment**](http://lnk.teapartypatriots._1EkRIw)**, or send your own message in support of gas stoves!**
---
[TAKE ACTION](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.)
---
|
---
| | The act of voting on Election Day could soon risk becoming more than just a constitutional right, but a requirement. Bills in Connecticut and Washington, D.C. have been introduced to [mandate compulsory voting](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.-0XHEIDjxs487pvHtgA) for all eligible residents. In Connecticut, the proposed bill states that should a voter abstain from voting, state law would require him to submit a form explaining why he did not cast a ballot. For failure to complete the explanatory form, voters would then face fines. Proponents of the bills claim that they would expand civic engagement. But commanding participation from uninformed and uninterested parties would certainly only harm a citizenry forced to live under the consequences of their electoral choices. Mandatory voting "will compel voting by people who don't care or don't know about the issues or candidates, thus influencing the outcome," says Connecticut resident Manuel Santos. "Voting as an uninformed citizen is just as bad, perhaps worse, than not voting at all."
---
| | |
---
[](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/7/eyJhaSI6NDkxMDk0ODksImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFRIiwicnEiOiIwMi1iMjMwNzItODcyMmFjMTIyZTg2NGJkOGE1Y2QwZGE1YTU1YzRmZDEiLCJwaCI6bnVsbCwibSI6ZmFsc2UsInVpIjoiNCIsInVuIjoiIiwidSI6Imh0dHBzOi8vYWxpZ25hY3QuY29tL2dvL2ltcGVhY2gtbWF5b3JrYXM_bWlkPTQ2MzY5JmlkPVQxOG85TG5ldWpIaGs5MVFRUSJ9/czUS5brLk6ui91Oq_APhTQ)
---
Congress is considering the impeachment and removal of Joe Biden’s Homeland Security Secretary Alejandro Mayorkas. The impeachment resolution against him explains that he has violated his oath of office and betrayed the Constitution by leaving our southern border exposed and lying to Congress. [**Bring justice to Mayorkas**](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/7/eyJhaSI6NDkxMDk0ODksImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFRIiwicnEiOiIwMi1iMjMwNzItODcyMmFjMTIyZTg2NGJkOGE1Y2QwZGE1YTU1YzRmZDEiLCJwaCI6bnVsbCwibSI6ZmFsc2UsInVpIjoiNSIsInVuIjoiIiwidSI6Imh0dHBzOi8vYWxpZ25hY3QuY29tL2dvL2ltcGVhY2gtbWF5b3JrYXM_bWlkPTQ2MzY5JmlkPVQxOG85TG5ldWpIaGs5MVFRUSJ9/DQ_xit8Z7Ns2v1WaNt21kQ)**and restore security on the border by urging your Members of Congress to support impeachment!**
---
[TAKE ACTION](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/7/eyJhaSI6NDkxMDk0ODksImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFRIiwicnEiOiIwMi1iMjMwNzItODcyMmFjMTIyZTg2NGJkOGE1Y2QwZGE1YTU1YzRmZDEiLCJwaCI6bnVsbCwibSI6ZmFsc2UsInVpIjoiNiIsInVuIjoiIiwidSI6Imh0dHBzOi8vYWxpZ25hY3QuY29tL2dvL2ltcGVhY2gtbWF5b3JrYXM_bWlkPTQ2MzY5JmlkPVQxOG85TG5ldWpIaGs5MVFRUSJ9/PVG4CCTy1C7mHORcVqmVhQ)
---
|
---
| | Should the United States [send the military into Mexico](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.) or at least position troops along the southern border? Following a kidnapping by Mexican drug cartel members that resulted in the deaths of two Americans, some American lawmakers have had enough. House Oversight Committee Chairman James Comer of Kentucky is proposing that America should deal with the cartel by sending troops into Mexico following a kidnapping that resulted in the deaths of two Americans. South Carolina Sen. Lindsey Graham took it a step further by announcing plans to introduce a bill that would authorize the use of U.S. military forces to crack down on the cartels. Rep. Dan Crenshaw of Texas agreed, [tweeting](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.) "2 of the 4 Americans kidnapped by the cartels in Mexico were murdered, and we still haven't declared the cartels a military target. It's time we authorize military force against them." Continuing, he asked Mexican President Andrés Manuel, "Are you listening? We would love for you to be a partner. Help us help you." The proposal puts added pressure on the Biden administration to at long last address the Border Crisis and deal effectively with Mexican cartel trafficking and violence.
---
| | |
---
[](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/7/eyJhaSI6NDkxMDk0ODksImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFRIiwicnEiOiIwMi1iMjMwNzItODcyMmFjMTIyZTg2NGJkOGE1Y2QwZGE1YTU1YzRmZDEiLCJwaCI6bnVsbCwibSI6ZmFsc2UsInVpIjoiOSIsInVuIjoiIiwidSI6Imh0dHBzOi8vYWxpZ25hY3QuY29tL2dvL3N0b3AtYmlkZW5zLWJhY2tkb29yLXdoby10cmVhdHk_bWlkPTQ2MzY5JmlkPVQxOG85TG5ldWpIaGs5MVFRUSJ9/-XZ97Xl82MYJT7gkwNnpLw)
---
Americans were shocked to discover during covid that the government has essentially unlimited power to shut down the economy. Now, Joe Biden is pursuing an international treaty that would make the World Health Organization the _sole authority_ during a pandemic. Thankfully, the Constitution empowers the Senate to stop Biden from entering insane treaties that would eliminate America’s independence. **Protect American sovereignty and**[**urge your Senators**](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.-gi1dSHDUOUKPgw)**to call for a vote on the WHO CA+ treaty – and VOTE NO!**
---
[TAKE ACTION](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.)
---
|
---
| | Last week, Special Presidential Envoy for Climate John Kerry [complained](http://lnk.teapartypatriots._bWlkPTQ2MzY5JmlkPVQxOG85TG5ldWpIaGs5MVFRUSJ9/t52n7ddX0-dSCRcbVFCh2g) that friction between communist China and the United States is [throwing cold water](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.-PbZKt9A) on climate talks. "Regrettably, in the last year ... what was not supposed to happen has happened, which is the climate issue has gotten mixed up into all the other tensions that exist between our countries," he said. "And so they've kind of pulled back a little bit, expressing the feeling that all we're doing is bashing them and bashing them." Kerry's climate negotiations with the repressive regime have recently been made the subject of a formal investigation, with a letter from House Oversight Committee Chair James noting that Kerry has "continued to downplay the CCP's human rights violations and its antagonism against the U.S. while promoting climate negotiations that the CCP does not even appear interested in entering." Kerry holds a cabinet-levels position which didn't exist previous to his [appointmen](http://lnk.teapartypatriots._bWlkPTQ2MzY5JmlkPVQxOG85TG5ldWpIaGs5MVFRUSJ9/ywFIdS7yFuBCXiCjJTaNDg)t by Biden. His office is housed in the State Department with an estimated annual budget of $13.9 million and 45 personnel.
---
| | |
---
[](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.)
---
Joe Biden’s nominee to lead the Labor Department has two of his favorite qualities. She has deep political ties to the Left and she has a carefree attitude when it comes to spending billions of taxpayer dollars. Julie Su oversaw at least $191 billion in fraudulent payments when she ran California’s covid relief payment system. And she bent the knee to Big Labor when they demanded new regulations that would hurt their competitors, like Uber and Doordash. Julie Su is clearly the wrong person to lead the Labor Department. **Urge your Senators to**[**VOTE NO and reject Julie Su**](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.)**!**
---
[TAKE ACTION](http://lnk.teapartypatriots._7g)
---
|
---
| | [CONTRIBUTE](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.)
---
|
---
[](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/7/eyJhaSI6NDkxMDk0ODksImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFRIiwicnEiOiIwMi1iMjMwNzItODcyMmFjMTIyZTg2NGJkOGE1Y2QwZGE1YTU1YzRmZDEiLCJwaCI6bnVsbCwibSI6ZmFsc2UsInVpIjoiMTkiLCJ1biI6IiIsInUiOiJodHRwczovL3d3dy50ZWFwYXJ0eXBhdHJpb3RzLm9yZy8_bWlkPTQ2MzY5JmlkPVQxOG85TG5ldWpIaGs5MVFRUSJ9/ktczAwJbJm-SRhas5OETbQ)
---
| | Tea Party Patriots Action, Inc. operates as a social welfare organization under section 501(c)(4) of the Internal Revenue Code. Contributions to Tea Party Patriots Action are not deductible as charitable contributions for income tax purposes.
---
| | © 2023 [Tea Party Patriots Action, Inc.](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.)2295 Towne Lake Pkwy Ste 116-314, Woodstock, GA 30189 **[View This Email in a Browser](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/m/1/49109489/02-b23072-8722ac122e864bd8a5cd0da5a55c4fd1/54/237/6299fba1-0100-4077-b1be-cd1ef065b8fe)** | **[Manage Subscriptions or Unsubscribe](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.)**
---

# Absentee Voting Permitted for Election Day Weather Warnings
---
| | You may vote absentee when the National Weather Service has issued a winter storm warning for Election Day covering your town or ward if you have concerns for your safety traveling in the storm. Here's how you do it: 1. If you are not sure, check to make sure the winter storm warning covers your town or ward: [https://www.weather.gov/alerts](https://shoutout.wix.com/so/22ORQhBuw/c?w=VH9WtNlPHVxtB7tVuHwb1vtuJpT62e0xd9XeCCiaXN4.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cud2VhdGhlci5nb3YvYWxlcnRzIiwiciI6IjQ0ZTJiNDY5LWRmYTAtNGExMS0yMjIyLWM2ODBhZjJmMjQ5YyIsIm0iOiJtYWlsIiwiYyI6ImI2YzMxN2UzLTcxYTQtNDljMi1hNDE1LTQwN2QyMDdlNmViMSJ9). 2. [Call your town or city clerk’s office](https://shoutout.wix.com/so/22ORQhBuw/c?w=sy4UbLXkBEuzWdFowHzDyHIhlmlzuDyHIqIpB7d2vZc.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9hcHAuc29zLm5oLmdvdi9zdGF0ZWxpc3RjbGVya2FuZHBvbGxpbmciLCJyIjoiNDRlMmI0NjktZGZhMC00YTExLTIyMjItYzY4MGFmMmYyNDljIiwibSI6Im1haWwiLCJjIjoiYjZjMzE3ZTMtNzFhNC00OWMyLWE0MTUtNDA3ZDIwN2U2ZWIxIn0) to make sure they are open the day before election day (at minimum, they have to open between 3:00 p.m. to 5:00 p.m. to allow you to vote absentee). 3\. When you go there, ask your clerk for an absentee ballot application and absentee ballot. 4. Without leaving, fill out the application and the ballot and return them to the clerk (the clerk has to provide you space to fill out this paperwork). If you find your clerk unsure of this process, please refer the clerk to this statute: RSA 657:1, II. If you find that the clerk’s office isn’t open to process your absentee vote or if it declines to do so, you may call,
* The Secretary of State’s Election Help Line at 603-271-3242, or
* The Attorney General’s Election Help Line at 866-868-3703.

---

clean_body: You may vote absentee when the National Weather Service has issued a winter storm warning for Election Day covering your town or ward if you | | Can't see this message? | | | | | | Absentee Voting Permitted for Election Day Weather Warnings | | You may vote absentee when the National Weather Service has issued a winter storm warning for Election Day covering your town or ward if you have concerns for your safety traveling in the storm. Here's how you do it: 1. If you are not sure, check to make sure the winter storm warning covers your town or ward: . 2. to make sure they are open the day before election day (at minimum, they have to open between 3:00 p.m. to 5:00 p.m. to allow you to vote absentee). 3\. When you go there, ask your clerk for an absentee ballot application and absentee ballot. 4. Without leaving, fill out the application and the ballot and return them to the clerk (the clerk has to provide you space to fill out this paperwork). If you find your clerk unsure of this process, please refer the clerk to this statute: RSA 657:1, II. If you find that the clerk’s office isn’t open to process your absentee vote or if it declines to do so, you may call, The Secretary of State’s Election Help Line at 603-271-3242, or The Attorney General’s Election Help Line at 866-868-3703. | | | | | | Share on social | | | | If you feel you received this email by mistake or wish to unsubscribe, please _.

There is an important runoff election for the Phoenix City Council District 6 on March 14. Conservative Sal DiCiccio (R) is term limited and will be replaced by the winner of this race. The two candidates are Republican Sam Stone and Democrat Kevin Robinson. **If you live in District 6 (**[check here](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/e697e9619fc2752f16f79d307c796b93/35693/43e0195181762f89/cb25d5d3cbb7e048c3d6b838967d376c/35693)**), you either received a mail-in ballot or you must vote in person (see below).

****This is a very important race that will determine the balance of power on the City Council.** Phoenix, like many large cities in conservative states, has tended blue with the consequences many cites suffer from with progressive governance. Have you noticed the growing homeless problem in our city?

**Conservative Sam Stone is the strong choice of The Prickly Pear** and we urge our readers in District 6 to mail your ballots in immediately and cast your vote for Sam Stone. [Learn about Sam Stone here](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/e697e9619fc2752f16f79d307c796b93/35693/43e0195181762f89/bd3118e60b17f323c3d6b838967d376c/35693).
---

name: Ruben Gallego
subject: Impulsive decisions are out of character for me
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Serve America PAC
body:
Friends –
Impulsive, emotional decisions are out of character for me.
I am the guy who had a four-year plan to get into Harvard even though my family was dirt poor.
So I thought long and hard about the decision to run for the United States Senate.
I prepared for it long before the possibility of Senator Sinema’s party switch.
I came to the conclusion that as a Marine, a Latino, and someone with a record of standing up for working people, we can build a coalition that can win a 2-way race, 3-way race, 27-way race... doesn’t matter.
The only open question was whether the grassroots support would be there. And I thought it would be. So far, I’ve been right.
So I am asking:
Can you please use this link to split $5, $10 or whatever you can afford between Serve America and my campaign? The amount isn’t as important as the donation, because it all adds up when we’re all chipping in. So please. [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/serve-gallego]
DONATE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/serve-gallego]
Thank you, and adiós,
Ruben

name: Kash Patel
subject: The government and fake news media are lying to you!
body:
I know they don’t want us to find any evidence that the FBI was provoking the protesters into rioting. We need to make sure all FBI involvement in Jan. 6 is released to the public.

[](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c652744%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=F%2bsnlBY6WRNnoeyJWqwjUQ&sysid=1)

Friend,

The government and fake news media are lying to you!

They called the January 6th protest a _“deadly insurrection,”_ but the video evidence doesn’t back it up.

A small number of people broke windows and attacked police officers, and they should be prosecuted. The majority of the protestors were peaceful.

We need to help those January 6th defendants stand up against the Deep State.

**I’m launching the _Kash Foundation_ to offer legal help to America First defendants like the ones from the January 6th witch hunts.** I led the Russiagate investigation for the House Committee and uncovered that the FBI was actively trying to sabotage President Trump. As the former head of counterterrorism and former senior aide to President Trump, I will do everything in my power to help out.

[_**As a personal favor, can you help me raise $33,000 in the next 48 hours to fund our legal battles for the January 6th defendants in court. Click below to show your support today!**_](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c652855%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=g1Bhuuh6H8H5G9v7qw8jLQ&sysid=1)

"The Blueprint to Save America"

|

| [ORDER NOW](https://jonahdschulz.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=fca39b236a4d3fca484c28fd6&id=0ad206cff1&e=3ebdc747e6 "ORDER NOW")
---
| Inspired by Thomas Paine's "Common Sense," this book was written with a simple yet difficult goal: to inspire the present-day American to rekindle the light of liberty within our very soul. _Common Sense for a Dying Nation_ takes a deep and direct dive into the heart of the issues plaguing our politics, government, culture, and spirit. Instead of seeking to diagnose and prescribe solutions for every public policy dispute, this work seeks to get to the root cause by first examining the nature of our God-given rights, the true meaning of liberty, and how we ought to live our lives.

While this work is written with present-day facts, the fundamentals it espouses are timeless and universal. In this brief work, we will focus on rediscovering truth and an unwavering moral center that guides a free society and a good people.
---
|
---

name: Tim Scott
subject: MAJOR announcement
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TIM SCOTT FOR SENATE
body:
| |
---
| | | | | | [<HUGE ANNOUNCEMENT>](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62428145:6G9_ifGoN:m:1:3365131770:D3F320F0348C1E98635320E377AFCD5C:r "Generic Button")
---
It's Senator Tim Scott. I've been trying to get a hold of you all week.

I need you to see this major announcement before 11:59 PM tonight. I've always been able to count on you in the past, so please don't let me down this time.

Access here before midnight tonight:
📎 **[majorannouncement.timscott.doc](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62428145:6G9_ifGoN:m:1:3365131770:D3F320F0348C1E98635320E377AFCD5C:r "majorannouncement.timscott.doc")** 📎
---
| |
* * *
---
| [](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62428144:6G9_ifGoN:m:1:3365131770:D3F320F0348C1E98635320E377AFCD5C:r)
---

Senator Tim Scott here. Serving the people of South Carolina is the most incredible honor of my life, but none of this would be possible without your support.
I made a promise many years ago that I would do everything possible to restore the American Dream and create opportunities for other kids who grew up like I did-in a single-parent home with a mom who worked two jobs just to put food on the table and keep the lights on.

**_Only in our great country can the grandson of a cotton picker grow up to serve in both chambers of Congress. _****
This is just the beginning. **[Can I count on you to join my American Dream Team and keep this fight going?](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62428144:6G9_ifGoN:m:1:3365131770:D3F320F0348C1E98635320E377AFCD5C:r "Can I count on you to join my American Dream Team and keep this fight going?")**
**
---
| | [JOIN MY TEAM](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62428144:6G9_ifGoN:m:1:3365131770:D3F320F0348C1E98635320E377AFCD5C:r "JOIN MY TEAM")
---

Thank you for everything, and God Bless,

Tim Scott
---
| PAID FOR BY TIM SCOTT FOR SENATE

CHARLESTON, SC 29407

name: Kash Patel
subject: January 6th committee lied to you
body:
I know they don’t want us to find any evidence that the FBI was provoking the protesters into rioting. We need to make sure all FBI involvement in Jan. 6 is released to the public.

[](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z27gdl7a3ojkm2d624qhsbm62gjcvg03deb1ev80_rp22sh2s8i66pr0sth62p36c3h2bs)

Friend,

The government and fake news media are lying to you!

They called the January 6th protest a _" deadly insurrection,"_ but the video evidence doesn't back it up.

A small number of people broke windows and attacked police officers, and they should be prosecuted. The majority of the protestors were peaceful.

We need to help those January 6th defendants stand up against the Deep State.

**I 'm launching the _Kash Foundation_ to offer legal help to America First defendants like the ones from the January 6th witch hunts.** I led the Russiagate investigation for the House Committee and uncovered that the FBI was actively trying to sabotage President Trump. As the former head of counterterrorism and former senior aide to President Trump, I will do everything in my power to help out.

The January 6th Committee lied.
* They lied about how Brian Sicknick died.
* They lied about Rep. Barry Loudermilk taking rioters on a reconnaissance mission.
* They lied about Rep. Josh Hawley running away.
* They lied about Ray Epps.

If they were _ "insurrectionists," _then why were some of them being led around by police officers instead of being arrested?

The Deep State wants to turn you against anyone who speaks out against their influence. They are trying to manipulate you into believing their version of events.

name: Tennessee Voter Project
subject: TVP Will Fight For Our LGBTQ+ Community in 2023
disclaimer_text: Paid for by TN Voter Project; Isaac Kimes, Esq
body:
https://www.facebook.com/TNVoterProject [https://www.facebook.com/TNVoterProject]
March 13, 2022
Dear friend,
The LGBTQ+ community in Tennessee needs our support now more than ever. Since 2015, our state has led the nation in passing more anti-LGBTQ+ legislation than any other state [https://www.hrc.org/press-releases/human-rights-campaign-tennessee-continues-obsession-with-anti-lgbtq-legislation-with-house-passage-of-religious-refusal-bill-and-second-anti-drag-bill] . When Democrats are in leadership, we make historic progress on LGBTQ+ rights.
We've got to turn this around and we will .
We need our elected leaders to focus on the issues that Tennesseans actually care about. We need to focus on expanding access to healthcare, investing in youth opportunity, and more workers making a fair day's pay.
Here's what we know: Democrats focus on the real issues.
SUPPORT TVP'S EFFORTS TO ELECT DEMOCRATS WHO CHAMPION LGBTQ+ RIGHTS [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tvpaug17_1]
TVP wants our LGBTQ+ community to know that we care. In the upcoming elections, we'll be fighting like hell to make sure Tennessee is a safe place for LGBTQ+ people . Can you contribute $23 to help TVP support pro-LGBTQ+ candidates in 2023 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tvpaug17_1] ?
Thank you for your support,
Tennessee Voter Project Staff
ICYMI: We launched a Tennessee Voter Project website! Check it out here [http://www.tennesseevoterproject.com] .

subject: What else are they lying about?
body:
I know they don’t want us to find any evidence that the FBI was provoking the protesters into rioting. We need to make sure all FBI involvement in Jan. 6 is released to the public.

[](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c78264%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=M7N%2fcMthuFIRPIzfbsLoJA&sysid=1)

Friend,

The government and fake news media are lying to you!

They called the January 6th protest a _“deadly insurrection,”_ but the video evidence doesn’t back it up.

A small number of people broke windows and attacked police officers, and they should be prosecuted. The majority of the protestors were peaceful.

We need to help those January 6th defendants stand up against the Deep State.

**I’m launching the _Kash Foundation_ to offer legal help to America First defendants like the ones from the January 6th witch hunts.** I led the Russiagate investigation for the House Committee and uncovered that the FBI was actively trying to sabotage President Trump. As the former head of counterterrorism and former senior aide to President Trump, I will do everything in my power to help out.
