name: =?utf-8?Q?Catherine=20Engelbrecht=20|=20True=20the=20Vote?=
subject: Fair Fight Trial, Kirsten's Story, and The Great Voter Roll ERICxit
body:
Join us tonight on Locals 3/13 @ 7p et to hear all the latest | | | | | |
---
| | This week will be another wild one here at True the Vote.
Last week our Judge in the Fair Fight v. True the Vote lawsuit ordered the case to go to trial. This is a huge opportunity for us to tell the full story of what led True the Vote to help electors file voter record challenges in Georgia. Stacey Abrams, Marc Elias, ERIC, and GA Sec. of State Brad Raffensberger, all played a role in what went on to become a critical case for election integrity. It’s the perfect time to publicly air the facts about inaccurate voter rolls and voters’ rightsThe Great Voter Roll ERICxit. We are digging in.
This week there will also be new actions taken in the Konnech case. Filings will become public in a few days. Once that occurs, we’ll email with a more specific update.
We are also working on several great new projects, including a nationwide election-themed scavenger hunt. It’ll be a fun way to get informed and equipped for serving in elections in 2024. More to come on that soon.
And last but never least, please join us tonight, Monday, March 13th, at 7p et, on Locals. We’ll talk about the coming Fair Fight trial, new news on Konnech, and dive into dirty voter rolls, life after ERIC, and what you can do to help in your hometown. [**You can click here to connect.**](https://truethevote.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d9ab56570d4ecf7b7df9d4c25&id=50889768b0&e=ad8cba7e98)****
By staying engaged and working together we really can true the vote. Never stop.
Ever onward -
---
|
---
[](https://truethevote.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d9ab56570d4ecf7b7df9d4c25&id=5ec620b0ed&e=ad8cba7e98)
|
---
**What makes a person decide to work in elections? For Kirsten, motivation came from seeing her children’s schools being led by elected officials with destructive hyper-partisan agendas. She decided to do something about it. Here’s Kirsten’s story....**
Being from Illinois, I ‘d watched for decades as our government officials engaged in more andmore organized criminal behavior, with less and less Federal law enforcement action takenagainst it. Sure, the occasional Chicago Alderman would get busted for taking a bribe here andthere, but these prosecutions were window-dressing, not addressing the real criminalitybehind Machine politics. Worse, it seemed that Chicago Machine politics had been franchised all over the country.
Then 2020 happened. The events of that year started to look an awful lot like the Color Revolution of 2014 Ukraine -- and the same American political figures involved in Ukraine were leading the charge against Donald Trump. There was no question what was afoot. I needed to do something. I needed to be useful to stop this takeover of our country.
True the Vote has seen all of this coming ten years before, now they were urging everyone to get involved in their local elections, so I did. I had to. What was happening in our schools was reason enough to jump in.
As in other communities, the communist infiltration of our schools had begun a while back, but it was not until 2020 that people started comparing notes- it was bad and getting worse, fast. We knew we had to organize and develop a strategy.
In August 2020, the principal at one of the high schools unilaterally declared in a letter to theall the parents, faculty, and staff, that the entire district supported the Black Lives Matter movement - the same movement that was setting our neighborhoods on fire. Our parents’ group grew quickly.
In Fall 2020, our group lead the charge in getting the schools reopened, overriding theschool board’s plan to focus on making remote learning “exciting.” We sent a few district wide emails (yes, we typed each email address in manually) reminding teachers that their political views were to remain private and that they could withdraw from the teachers’ union per the SCOTUS decision in AFSCME v Janus. And we got the principal fired.
We assembled an extremely impressive slate of candidates for the April 2021 elections andcampaigned hard. Alas, this is Illinois, and we inevitably ran up against the powerfulinfrastructure of the Teachers’ Union. Our slate lost badly. And I saw our broken election process up close.
Desperate to be useful in the election integrity movement, I attended a workshop in myarea where I learned election basics and more importantly, common election fraud schemes. While organizing people is not my strength, I decided to become an Election Judge Coordinator and Poll Watcher. I read the manual, worked with new friends to share ideas, and recruited on social media. I managed to get six people through the process and into Election Judge seats.
On Primary Day, I went to a work in a polling place in a nearby town. The Polling Place was immaculately run, everything by the book. As I was learning about the process from the the Election Judges in between voters, I got a text from a neighbor. All hell had broken loose at my own polling place. I tore out of there and headed straight into disaster.
Pretty much everything had gone wrong. The Election Judges were not able to access the polling place the night before to set up, so it opened 2.5 hours late. One Election Judge called in sick. The other two were first-timers, and one of them was 16 years old. The touchscreens didn’t work. The Sharpies were bleeding through. Two precincts were sharing equipment and judges, resulting in voters getting the wrong ballots. The scanner was broken, and they couldn’t locate the lockbox backup, so ballots were strewn in a pile on the floor. The Judges were forgetting to initial the ballots and they had had time to set up only two election booths, so voters were getting heated. It was a mess, but it would have been worse had we not been there to help. And next time, we’ll be prepared.
I’m proud and humbled to join the ranks of all the patriots who are stepping up in ways bigand small to serve in our elections. I hope my story will inspire you to serve in 2024 - it’s truly been one of the greatest experiences, and honors, of my lifetime.
[](https://truethevote.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d9ab56570d4ecf7b7df9d4c25&id=f353e9e87d&e=ad8cba7e98)
| |

---
| | |
---
_Copyright © 2023 True the Vote, All rights reserved._
You are receiving this email because you opted in for updates via the True the Vote website.

**Our mailing address is:**
True the VotePO Box 3109# 19128Houston, TX 77253-3109
[Add us to your address book](https://truethevote.us8.list-manage.com/vcard?u=d9ab56570d4ecf7b7df9d4c25&id=10c8087c36)

Want to change how you receive these emails?
You can [update your preferences](https://truethevote.us8.list-manage.com/profile?u=d9ab56570d4ecf7b7df9d4c25&id=10c8087c36&e=ad8cba7e98&c=03660b4cf1) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://truethevote.us8.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=d9ab56570d4ecf7b7df9d4c25&id=10c8087c36&e=ad8cba7e98&c=03660b4cf1).
|

subject: We are at a critical point
body:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/vs9ctqKDTN

I hope you're having a great day. There's something important I
want to share with you today. For years, we've seen a growing
effort from radical activists to destroy the principles of
liberty that have made our nation the freest and most prosperous
in history. These radicals have found a willing ally in the Biden
administration's education department

http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/os9ctqKDTN

Please see a special message from our
sponsor:

Dear
Fellow American,

I hope
you're having a great day. There's something important I want to
share with you today.

For
years, we've seen a growing effort from radical activists to
destroy the principles of liberty that have made our nation the
freest and most prosperous in history. These radicals have found
a willing ally in the Biden administration's education
department.

And right
now-with the help of these government bureaucrats-they are
actively denigrating the U.S. Constitution in America's schools
while teaching destructive ideologies like critical race theory
and socialism.

We are at
a key point in our history. We must defend our nation's founding
documents and principles of liberty through education.

And
that's why I'm emailing you today.

Hillsdale
College recently produced a limited number of DVD box sets of our
very popular "Constitution 101" online course, and I'd like you
to have a copy.

The
course features Hillsdale's faculty-the same professors who teach
our required course on the Constitution on campus. And when you
view "Constitution 101," you'll learn about:

The
original design and purpose of the Constitution.
The
challenges it faced during the Civil War.
How
it has been undermined for over a century by progressivism and
liberalism.
How
limited government under the Constitution might be revived in our
own time.

Right
now, it can be yours when you make a tax-deductible gift of $100
or more. You can take advantage of this limited-time offer using
this secure link:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/61592350:s9ctqKDTN:m:3:2532013465:EB5AE27AD392CE754DB459F13969E0A0:r

And when
you do, you'll not only get your own DVD box set, but you'll help
expand our national educational outreach efforts such as free
online courses, classical K-12 education curriculums, and
Imprimis-our digest of liberty.

We need
your support because we REFUSE all government funding, even
indirectly in the form of student grants or loans.

So,
please reserve your DVD box set with a gift of $100 or more using
this secure link:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/61592350:s9ctqKDTN:m:3:2532013465:EB5AE27AD392CE754DB459F13969E0A0:r

And
remember, as I mentioned above, supplies are limited, so be sure
to reserve your copy today.

Warm
regards,

Bill
Gray, '01
Vice
President
National
Donor Outreach
Hillsdale
College

clean_body: I know they don't want us to find any evidence that the FBI was provoking the protesters into rioting. We need to make sure all FBI involvement in Jan. 6 is released to the public. Friend, The government and fake news media are lying to you! They called the January 6th protest a " deadly insurrection," but the video evidence doesn't back it up. A small number of people broke windows and attacked police officers, and they should be prosecuted. The majority of the protestors were peaceful. We need to help those January 6th defendants stand up against the Deep State. I 'm launching the Kash Foundation to offer legal help to America First defendants like the ones from the January 6th witch hunts. I led the Russiagate investigation for the House Committee and uncovered that the FBI was actively trying to sabotage President Trump. As the former head of counterterrorism and former senior aide to President Trump, I will do everything in my power to help out. Support the January 6th Defendants Goal: $33,000 Email: dpwillis67@gmail.com Donation: PENDING The January 6th Committee lied. They lied about how Brian Sicknick died. They lied about Rep. Barry Loudermilk taking rioters on a reconnaissance mission. They lied about Rep. Josh Hawley running away. They lied about Ray Epps. If they were "insurrectionists," then why were some of them being led around by police officers instead of being arrested? What else are they lying about? I know they don't want us to find any evidence that the FBI was provoking the protesters into rioting. We need to make sure all FBI involvement in Jan. 6 is released to the public. And they used innocent protestors to push their agenda. Now they need your help to set them free. I know all about this firsthand. I've seen how the Department of Justice and the government work. I've even been on the receiving end of their spying. This is just the beginning. The Deep State wants to turn you against anyone who speaks out against their influence. They are trying to manipulate you into believing their version of events. Please send your urgent donation today to fund our new America First organization to defend our supporters in the courts. ** Thank you, Kash Patel The Fight With Kash Foundation is a 501(c)(3) nonprofit. name: Kevin McCarthy
subject: These numbers are terrifying
disclaimer_text: Paid for by McCarthy for Congress
body:
| |
---
| | | | [](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62428186:6RtI7fGNx:m:1:3365131770:EE9634BEB7A6F70225AC8C0C8BE5E4E4:r)
---

I need 30 seconds of your time to go over some numbers.

The FEC has raised the maximum contribution limit for campaigns by 14%. Democrats have always held a fundraising advantage. Especially in the last 15 years, the Silicon Valley and Wall Street Crowd have cozied up to Pelosi, Biden, Hillary and the Obamas. That ultra wealthy donor base is what helped Pelosi raise $1 BILLION for Democrats during her time in House Leadership.

Now let's imagine what kind of impact 14% can have when you have that kind of money in your corner.

You can see it already- Democrats are outraging Republicans TWO TO ONE.

They have in their coffers, DOUBLE, what we have in ours.

---
| [](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62428186:6RtI7fGNx:m:1:3365131770:EE9634BEB7A6F70225AC8C0C8BE5E4E4:r)
---

Democrats' fundraising capability is greater today than it has EVER been and they will use it to promote and support the most contentious issues facing Americans today.

We are looking Armageddon in the face.

I'm reaching out to EVERY donor in the Republican Party. With our new found disadvantage, the ONLY way to fight back is if EVERY Conservative patriot steps up and does their part. Without YOU, we lose.

Can I ask you to chip in whatever you can give to help us fight the liberal elite and stand up for America?

---
| | [RUSH EMERGENCY SUPPORT](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62428186:6RtI7fGNx:m:1:3365131770:EE9634BEB7A6F70225AC8C0C8BE5E4E4:r)
---

Thank you,
Speaker Kevin McCarthy

name: Indiana Republican Party
subject: We brought receipts
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE INDIANA REPUBLICAN STATE COMMITTEE
body:
Republicans are preparing to deliver big, again
| | | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/f7f15e9875c39250df60ac364a9f256a/40313/a2b0c6fd87f2eda9/330c670fba24e9edc3d6b838967d376c/40313)
---
Hoosier Republican,
[](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/f7f15e9875c39250df60ac364a9f256a/40313/a2b0c6fd87f2eda9/fcb2b1c7189fcdd1c3d6b838967d376c/40313)**Results matter.** **And Republicans are preparing to deliver them, again.** With the legislative session _just past the halfway point_ , we wanted to share an update on the **commonsense conservative policies** that are currently making their way through the statehouse and one that has already been signed by the governor. [Help us continue to elect Republicans who will deliver results for Hoosiers >>> ](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/f7f15e9875c39250df60ac364a9f256a/40313/a2b0c6fd87f2eda9/e256bb872ed5bdccc3d6b838967d376c/40313)[](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/f7f15e9875c39250df60ac364a9f256a/40313/a2b0c6fd87f2eda9/f495ea1b9c0f3c25c3d6b838967d376c/40313)
---
Here are just a few highlights —
---
:: [Senate Enrolled Act (SEA) 2](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/f7f15e9875c39250df60ac364a9f256a/40313/a2b0c6fd87f2eda9/dce9c49c94ea0b5fc3d6b838967d376c/40313) // SIGNED INTO LAW ON FEB. 22, 2023 // SEA 2 enables up to half a million Hoosier small businesses save over $100 million in federal taxes combined by allowing them to fully deduct state tax payments on their federal taxes. :: [House Bill (HB) 1002 ](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/f7f15e9875c39250df60ac364a9f256a/40313/a2b0c6fd87f2eda9/f9d8eabf99e30ca5c3d6b838967d376c/40313)// PASSED HOUSE, ASSIGNED TO SENATE COMMITTEE // HB 1002 would expand work-based learning in schools. :: [House Bill (HB) 1492 ](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/f7f15e9875c39250df60ac364a9f256a/40313/a2b0c6fd87f2eda9/ee70fae5ac349869c3d6b838967d376c/40313)// PASSED HOUSE, ASSIGNED TO SENATE COMMITTEE // HB 1492 would make additional investments into the Secured School Safety Grant program. :: [Senate Bill (SB) 5 ](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/f7f15e9875c39250df60ac364a9f256a/40313/a2b0c6fd87f2eda9/9c4e974ea6ee8a42c3d6b838967d376c/40313)// PASSED SENATE, ASSIGNED TO HOUSE COMMITTEE // SB 5 would establish additional consumer data protections.
---
Hoosier Republican, [with your continued support](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/f7f15e9875c39250df60ac364a9f256a/40313/a2b0c6fd87f2eda9/8ee42af5a96b6dfdc3d6b838967d376c/40313), we can continue to elect Republicans who will work every day for Hoosiers like you. **Stay tuned as the legislative session continues and more bills make their way to the governor’s desk!** – Indiana Republican Party
---
| | PAID FOR BY THE INDIANA REPUBLICAN STATE COMMITTEE. WWW.INDIANA.GOP.

subject: We’re giving you one more chance to stay.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRCC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
Your 3 year membership streak is at risk.

|
---
| | | |
Hey, we haven't heard from you. Are you letting your 3 year Republican Membership streak disappear or did you miss our email?
---
| | | [RENEW YOUR MEMBERSHIP](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zm9v9b3m53eg42524ialo4v6164php6h3ei474c0_rp22sh2s8i66pr0sth61or4cth2bs "RENEW YOUR MEMBERSHIP")
---

The 2022 Midterm Elections were one of the toughest battles we've seen**, but the worst has yet to come. **

**The Democrats are prepared to pull out all the stops to attempt to stop us from implementing sound Conservative policies, and worse yet, they 're going to try to stop us from taking back the White House. **

**Now more than ever before, we need you to STAY on our team,_[but you only have until midnight tonight to renew your 2023 House Majority Membership.](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zmbc38hdtfiqivavr0ft0kmngd4teqjps14tadk0_rp22sh2s8i66pr0sth61or4cth2bs "but you only have until midnight tonight to renew your 2023 House Majority Membership.")_**

---
| | | [RENEW YOUR MEMBERSHIP](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zrl0e2fbmuagnnjh7juv19opdbqjvv9qbha0q6ho_rp22sh2s8i66pr0sth61or4cth2bs "RENEW YOUR MEMBERSHIP")
---
You've fought with us for three consecutive years, and we need you to stick by our side as we go into battle this year.

We can't DEFEND OUR MAJORITY without you. **_[Renew your membership before it's too late >>>](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zrhq0biqd7875v9059i77bsmoe10n40i3idvfk40_rp22sh2s8i66pr0sth61or4cth2bs "Renew your membership before it’s too late")_**

\---------- Forwarded message ---------
From: Mark, 2023 Membership Services
Date: Tues, Dec 20, 2022 at 11:32 AM
Subject: We hate to see you go.

Friend, for the last **3 years** , you have stood by House Republicans' side. You've supported the Conservative fight furiously and consistently through every battle we've seen,**but we have bad news for you. **

**It pains me to tell you that for the first time ever, you 've failed to renew your Republican Membership and have lost your support streak.**

There's good news though, Friend. I spoke with leadership about this exceptional circumstance, and they have allowed us to extend our Membership renewal period to **_[11:59 PM TONIGHT.](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z2f5vjf1m869jsh3pb7f4flm032h248dmp1p65l8_rp22sh2s8i66pr0sth61or4cth2bs "11:59 PM TONIGHT.")_**

**_[Are you going to renew your House Majority Membership and become a sustained Republican Member for 4 consecutive years, or have we lost your support to the Left, and you are going to let your streak fade away?](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zvin5vi74sfitj2nhbh8h1mtrp0piujug5a0osbo_rp22sh2s8i66pr0sth61or4cth2bs "Are you going to renew your House Majority Membership and become a sustained Republican Member for 4 consecutive years, or have we lost your support to the Left, and you are going to let your streak fade away?")_**

---

---

We just finished the biggest battle of our lives. The 2022 Midterm Elections took everything we had, and the fight still isn't over. More than ever, we need our strongest grassroots supporters on our side.

You only have until **_[11:59 PM](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zf1kf04os457dckn4rmlb76ebnlfsof9hejop1s8_rp22sh2s8i66pr0sth61or4cth2bs "11:59 PM")_** to let us know if you plan to stand against the Left and their radical socialist agenda for a 3rd year in a row. **_[Renew before it's too late >>>](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z7s3do97uj0m11mjd8hmjflh7r7bbf01o3scl3co_rp22sh2s8i66pr0sth61or4cth2bs "Renew before it’s too late")_**

Americans across the country are counting on you. Don't let them down.

Thank you,

Mark, National Republican Membership Office

name: American Action News

name: Kristina Zahorik
subject: NEW DATE, NEW LOCATION - IDCCA Party Builder Awards
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Illinois Democratic County Chairs' Association
body:
Come join us on March 27th at the Mid-America Carpenters Regional Council Hall!

[](https://act.myngp.com/el/uJDG038y6gi0XNmmn0-_K-KeanaxDA6BvhgdrfqMPdQ=/O5n8bCQV5CvLYQeRczneyZC4mswDIwkIPE-sOux_L3Q=?refcode=EM_EV_230313PBR1_N_KZ_90DO_5_NG_N_Logo)
Fellow Democrat,

I'm pleased to announce that on Monday, March 27th from 5:30 pm to 7:00 pm at the Mid-America Carpenters Regional Council (12 E. Erie, Chicago) we will be hosting the 2023 IDCCA Party Builder Awards!

We are excited to be honoring **Deborah Cosey-Lane** and **Mike Macellaio** on a new date and new location for the Party Builder Awards.

**[If you have not RSVP'd yet, click the link now to get your ticket! Previous tickets and pledges will be honored at the event.](https://act.myngp.com/el/uJDG038y6gi0XNmmn0-_K-KeanaxDA6BvhgdrfqMPdQ=/R-odxuw-j0jM2pqabITpLAyxnUmmMNyKTU0NddfAI18=?refcode=EM_EV_230313PBR1_N_KZ_90DO_5_NG_N_L1)** [**RSVP NOW**](https://act.myngp.com/el/uJDG038y6gi0XNmmn0-_K-KeanaxDA6BvhgdrfqMPdQ=/R-odxuw-j0jM2pqabITpLAyxnUmmMNyKTU0NddfAI18=?refcode=EM_EV_230313PBR1_N_KZ_90DO_5_NG_N_B1&amount=5)
You can find more information about the event and how to get your ticket below:

_**Please join us for IDCCA 's 2023 Party Builder Awards Reception**_

**WHEN:** Monday, March 27th from 5:30 pm - 7:00 pm

**WHERE:** Mid-America Carpenters Regional Council Hall, 12 E Erie St, Chicago

**Honorary Event Co-Chairs: Tim Drea** , President of the Illinois AFL-CIO & **Bob Reiter** , President of the Chicago Federation of Labor

**Honorary Event Host Committee:** Hon. **JB Pritzker** , Hon. **Juliana Stratton** , Hon. **Kwame Raoul** , Hon. **Alexi Giannoulias** , Hon. **Susana Mendoza** , Hon. **Mike Frerichs** , Hon. **Don Harmon** , Hon. **Emanuel "Chris" Welch**, Hon. **Lisa Hernandez** , and Hon. **Toni Preckwinkle**

**RSVP HERE:****[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2023partybuilderawards](https://act.myngp.com/el/uJDG038y6gi0XNmmn0-_K-KeanaxDA6BvhgdrfqMPdQ=/R-odxuw-j0jM2pqabITpLAyxnUmmMNyKTU0NddfAI18=?refcode=EM_EV_230313PBR1_N_KZ_90DO_5_NG_N_L2)**

Thank you again for your loyal support.

Best wishes,

Kristina Zahorik
IDCCA President

name: Rand Paul
subject: Taking the fight to corrupt teachers unions
body:
Socialists are teaching your children to hate America.

[](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zc13lqhmlo4i9a49nkk1dmjjg73kmc6j2ed56670_rp22sh2s8i66pr0stj60ob4cdh2bs)
Friend,

Socialists are teaching your children to hate America.

They have taken over classrooms and indoctrinated hundreds of thousands of students with Critical Race Theory. They would rather focus lessons on pronouns and gender identity than teach trade skills, science, or basic math.

_It 's no wonder our kids have developed the highest levels of anxiety and depression in the world._

I'd like to introduce you to an organization that is leading the fight to take back our school boards from the radical Left and protect our children, **Parents Union of America (PUOA).**

I just talked with Jessi Melton, President of PUOA, and told her that I would reach out to my supporters and help raise $15,000 this week to fund their efforts.

[_**Friend, can I count on you to share my support for PUOA? Click here to donate $10, $25, $50, or any amount today >>>**_](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zsq2eap1o5qi1r8rmk53t7okshget468ekvbkhi8_rp22sh2s8i66pr0stj60ob4cdh2bs)

I want to share a message from PUOA:

_**" We stand as a counter-offensive **__**against the powerful, agenda-driven Teachers ' Union**_ _**, which has systematically sought to destroy wholesome American values and indoctrinate our children. "**_

_Parents Union of America is the ANTI teachers-union_.

Their mission is to target the most populous school districts and remove the incompetent school board members put in place by the Anti-American, corrupt Teachers' Union.

**I, for one, am sick and tired of socialists indoctrinating our children. And the corrupt Teacher Unions are to blame.**

We can't allow the same people who turn a blind eye to inappropriate textbook material and socialist indoctrination to remain in charge of American schools.

[_**Will you join the fight to save America 's schools from the corrupt Teacher's Union? Please send your urgent donation NOW >>> **_](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zbb6m9tom86o5thaa58pfhm2ha5sp130vd6affjo_rp22sh2s8i66pr0stj60ob4cdh2bs)

PUOA does more than fight to remove corrupt school board members. They work to fill school boards with America-First candidates and parents.

They plan to replace corrupt school board members with America-First candidates. They recruit and train conservative candidates and raise money to get them elected. These candidates MUST display the ability and willingness to fight for conservative values by going on the offensive.

**Parents Union of America refuses to stay on the defensive when our children are involved. **

I know this is a lot to ask, but can you help me keep my promise to raise $15,000 this week for Parents Union of America?

** Click below to send your gift.**
[_**Donate $10**_](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z4n0pj3rucrv5maadjnrvpibl5vtrh7osj7rp8no_rp22sh2s8i66pr0stj60ob4cdh2bs)

[_**Donate $250**_](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z4qh8rk1uaqb15pd8cfsh4pnsmh4t0c5dod7b2v0_rp22sh2s8i66pr0stj60ob4cdh2bs)
[_**Donate $500**_](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zn378s9cr3vssfdj8kg0ri2uv7ugo78mpc9e6320_rp22sh2s8i66pr0stj60ob4cdh2bs)

Thank you,

Senator Rand Paul

name: Rand Paul
subject: Taking the fight to corrupt teachers unions
body:
Socialists are teaching your children to hate America.

[](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zchaumeu725qgvd358apgacksssn0cmpnc5vt8a0_rp22sh2s8i66pr0stj60ob4c5h2bs)
Friend,

Socialists are teaching your children to hate America.

They have taken over classrooms and indoctrinated hundreds of thousands of students with Critical Race Theory. They would rather focus lessons on pronouns and gender identity than teach trade skills, science, or basic math.

_It 's no wonder our kids have developed the highest levels of anxiety and depression in the world._

I'd like to introduce you to an organization that is leading the fight to take back our school boards from the radical Left and protect our children, **Parents Union of America (PUOA).**

I just talked with Jessi Melton, President of PUOA, and told her that I would reach out to my supporters and help raise $15,000 this week to fund their efforts.

[_**Friend, can I count on you to share my support for PUOA? Click here to donate $10, $25, $50, or any amount today >>>**_](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z6pkf6jghheai0b3hlfj73ocoungq3t9gukpih6o_rp22sh2s8i66pr0stj60ob4c5h2bs)

I want to share a message from PUOA:

_**" We stand as a counter-offensive **__**against the powerful, agenda-driven Teachers ' Union**_ _**, which has systematically sought to destroy wholesome American values and indoctrinate our children. "**_

_Parents Union of America is the ANTI teachers-union_.

Their mission is to target the most populous school districts and remove the incompetent school board members put in place by the Anti-American, corrupt Teachers' Union.

**I, for one, am sick and tired of socialists indoctrinating our children. And the corrupt Teacher Unions are to blame.**

We can't allow the same people who turn a blind eye to inappropriate textbook material and socialist indoctrination to remain in charge of American schools.

[_**Will you join the fight to save America 's schools from the corrupt Teacher's Union? Please send your urgent donation NOW >>> **_](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zedr6v9e4dusbeum6g5s6gklh6hgvi3tsh485a3o_rp22sh2s8i66pr0stj60ob4c5h2bs)

PUOA does more than fight to remove corrupt school board members. They work to fill school boards with America-First candidates and parents.

They plan to replace corrupt school board members with America-First candidates. They recruit and train conservative candidates and raise money to get them elected. These candidates MUST display the ability and willingness to fight for conservative values by going on the offensive.

**Parents Union of America refuses to stay on the defensive when our children are involved. **

I know this is a lot to ask, but can you help me keep my promise to raise $15,000 this week for Parents Union of America?

** Click below to send your gift.**
[_**Donate $10**_](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zvhch7t1j31snq2l77s3htg7oceorv9nk1gk3of8_rp22sh2s8i66pr0stj60ob4c5h2bs)
[_**Donate $25**_](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2ztt0vb4n89k74iqsovt922pappak7kmnr7bfrmko_rp22sh2s8i66pr0stj60ob4c5h2bs)
[_**Donate $50**_](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zgdodcj007bk2sedqhambirnuv78r4h18e40ihf8_rp22sh2s8i66pr0stj60ob4c5h2bs)
[_**Donate $100**_](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2ztevg3h5c6pmcl25bj155l6ai92eabtpuf3vvkl0_rp22sh2s8i66pr0stj60ob4c5h2bs)
[_**Donate $250**_](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zvsktqohrqj8se44ag2b200d92gai2k63q62mfv8_rp22sh2s8i66pr0stj60ob4c5h2bs)
[_**Donate $500**_](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z38nu5p0c21708an0mt55h4u9bq2vekl3isjoac8_rp22sh2s8i66pr0stj60ob4c5h2bs)

Thank you,

Senator Rand Paul

name: Rep. Jeff Jackson
subject: Winning back the House
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY VOTEVETS, VOTEVETS
body:
I’d be hard pressed to find an organization as effective as VoteVets.
#
Hey Derek, this is Representative Jeff Jackson. I’m the Member of Congress from North Carolina’s 14th District.
You might not know who I am (or, if you’re on TikTok, maybe you do), but I know VoteVets.
Their mission — supporting Veterans like me in campaigns around the country — is one that’s especially important right now.
The Republican majority in the House is razor thin, just a handful of seats. But control is control, and whichever party holds the House has a lot of power. We’re seeing that power manifest in a few ways this year — the dangerous impasse over the debt ceiling being the most obvious example.
If we want to win back the House — and we do, right? — we’ve got to figure out how to win in tough places. That’s exactly what VoteVets does.
They target races where they can have the most impact, they elevate Veterans and family members with powerful voices and stories, and they reach the voters we need to win. And thanks to people like you, they’re one of the most successful organizations in the country.
I’d be hard pressed to find an organization as effective as VoteVets.
So, after all that, I’ve got a question for you:
**[Can you make a donation of $3 (or whatever feels appropriate for you) to VoteVets today? It might only be March, but the work to take back the House has already started. And ahead of this first quarterly FEC deadline of the year, there’s never been a better time to join.**](https://act.votevets.org/go/2927?c0=vv-pac-em-mar23.Xt_ByJ&refcode=em230313-1-15&t=1&akid=7786%2E3013755%2E7Cs6eU)

clean_body: I’d be hard pressed to find an organization as effective as VoteVets. Hey Derek, this is Representative Jeff Jackson. I’m the Member of Congress from North Carolina’s 14th District. You might not know who I am (or, if you’re on TikTok, maybe you do), but I know VoteVets. Their mission — supporting Veterans like me in campaigns around the country — is one that’s especially important right now. The Republican majority in the House is razor thin, just a handful of seats. But control is control, and whichever party holds the House has a lot of power. We’re seeing that power manifest in a few ways this year — the dangerous impasse over the debt ceiling being the most obvious example. If we want to win back the House — and we do, right? — we’ve got to figure out how to win in tough places. That’s exactly what VoteVets does. They target races where they can have the most impact, they elevate Veterans and family members with powerful voices and stories, and they reach the voters we need to win. And thanks to people like you, they’re one of the most successful organizations in the country. I’d be hard pressed to find an organization as effective as VoteVets. So, after all that, I’ve got a question for you: If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:_ | | | | | | | | | ** I hope you’ll consider it — I know I’m grateful that VoteVets is with us in this fight. Thanks a lot, Jeff PAID FOR BY VOTEVETS, VOTEVETS.ORG, NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE OR CANDIDATE’S COMMITTEE

name: Candace Owens
subject: Here’s the real disease hurting our communities
body:
There's a plague worse than COVID that no one is allowed to talk about -- the victimhood mentality.

[](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c652870%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=O3uuUn62HxXX6hAUoGwK5Q&sysid=1)

Friend,

There's a plague worse than COVID that no one is allowed to talk about -- the victimhood mentality.

This plantation of the mind traps people into believing that they are powerless. It prevents them from seeing themselves as anything but a victim.

**If you hold a permanent view of yourself as a victim, you become your own oppressor.**

The victimhood mentality is destroying the Black family. It's killing our children with abortion. It's keeping us dependent on government welfare.

My name is Candace Owens, and I co-founded the BLEXIT Foundation to SHATTER the victimhood mentality in America. And to help do that, I’ve set a goal to raise $50,000 this month to support education and resources for these communities.

[_**Can you help leave a legacy of freedom and victory instead of oppression and victimhood? Click here to rush your support with $10, $35, $50, or any amount >>>**_](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c652871%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=Le%2fJ8MJcv%2fZzP0B2evnceA&sysid=1)

I, too, once believed the narrative of victimhood until my grandfather told me a story that changed my life. _It taught me never to be a victim again_.

My grandfather grew up during the Jim Crow era and lived through real racism -- not this fake racism you see in the media.

As a boy, he worked on the family’s share crop farm. Each morning he would wake up at 4 am to lay out the tobacco to dry. **Despite their difficult circumstances, they stayed together as a family and persevered. **

**Then one night, the KKK showed up. **

My grandfather woke up to the sound of gunshots. Bullets came flying through the walls of his home. He and his siblings had to hide underneath their beds.

_But a smirk always came across my grandfather’s face when he told me what happened next. _

_**“My father got his shotgun and fired back at them boys!” **_

My grandfather was proud of how, in the face of this real danger, his father refused to cower and fought back!

I’ve been the target of racism and death threats because I’ve spoken out about my beliefs. But I’m not going to let that stop me.

I overcame the victimhood mentality and want to help offer others the education and resources to do the same.

[_**Will you send a gift of $10, $35, $50, or any amount to END the victimhood mentality?**__**Click here to rush your support >>>**_](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c652872%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=h9a%2fC7Oac3v4YEXdkAk5Pg&sysid=1)

Here's how BLEXIT is connecting with Black and minority communities:

We put together **BLEXIT’s Guide Against Critical Race Theory** for parents, grandparents, and teachers.

This guide walks you through how to spot Critical Race Theory (CRT) in the classroom and gives examples so you can spot it. It also explains the rights of students and parents and offers ways to fight back.

This resource encourages people to think critically about the victim mentality promoted by CRT and how it affects the next generation.

**In addition to our online resources, BLEXIT State Chapter members bring our inspirational message directly to their communities.**

Our state chapters are the hands and feet of BLEXIT. Our volunteers and state chapter leaders are changing the narrative surrounding America’s minority communities through community service, social engagement, educational activities, and virtual events.

We currently have 43 chapters across the nation made up of more than 14,000 volunteers!

Your generous support will give people access and a platform to realize that they’re more powerful than they can imagine and help them break free from the victimhood mentality.

Will you chip in today and help us reach our February goal of raising $50,000 to reach Black and minority communities? Click below to donate.

[_**Donate $10 >>>**_](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c652873%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=AxbE49YFVdNybnUtgmC28A&sysid=1)
[_**Donate $35 >>>**_](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c652874%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=TMUwMJhMeMfmnxMZSX0CJg&sysid=1)
[_**Donate $50 >>>**_](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c652885%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=xCP9aMw1HkVT%2bEY2PAzpEA&sysid=1)
[_**Donate $100 >>>**_](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c652886%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=2oSrEqaTqwFpGfaeQ50yXg&sysid=1)
[_**Donate $250 >>>**_](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c652887%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=qJDuqJk%2fhNFWBXp5ruX6%2bg&sysid=1)
[_**Donate $500 >>>**_](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c652888%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=Ig7ShW6A54p9VTgA5f2ygg&sysid=1)
[_**Donate $1,000 >>>**_](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c652889%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=Mg7XXFqbetuChJmTAR966g&sysid=1)
[_**Donate $2,500 >>>**_](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c652880%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=iRIapNn0VfL4L5V3RkT0MA&sysid=1)
[_**Donate Any Amount >>>**_](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c652881%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=qwTAezN%2f89gO0gIMUf5XQw&sysid=1)

Thank you,

Candace Owens
President
BLEXIT Foundation

name: Experienced Leadership
subject: We’re in Trouble
disclaimer_text: Paid for by STAR PAC
body:
Veterans understand responsibility and accountability. Washington's politicians do not.

[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62428244:6MLa3fGNX:m:1:3365131770:387775D3F6B1D304403D4FCBE98A8C58:r "Headlines") Peter: Everywhere you look, America has a national security threat that needs attention. Ukraine and Russia. China and Taiwan. Americans kidnapped in foreign countries. Iran's Uranium program. Spy Balloons flying across the United States Frequent Cyber security attacks. The answer from Democrats in Washington is to grow the size of our government and to keep spending, but we have a different solution. **[Help us elect Conservative Veterans to lead our nation on a path towards stronger national security and prosperity!](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62428244:6MLa3fGNX:m:1:3365131770:387775D3F6B1D304403D4FCBE98A8C58:r "Help us elect Conservative Veterans to lead our nation on a path
towards stronger national security and prosperity!")** In 2022, STAR PAC supported Veterans like John James, Derrick Van Orden, Ronny Jackson, Rich McCormick, Ryan Zinke, [](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62428244:6MLa3fGNX:m:1:3365131770:387775D3F6B1D304403D4FCBE98A8C58:r "Banner")and Monica De La Cruz, among others who were victorious, but we still have a lot of work to do if we are going to properly address our nation's national security threats. We are still fighting to help restore the 8,000 service members who were impacted by the Biden vaccine mandates. We are seeking to end the CRT and DEI programs in the Department of Defense. We are still working end the invasion on our Southern Border going unanswered and to stop the fentanyl entering our country at an historic rate from killing our citizens. **Unfortunately, we 've got leaders doing a duck and cover instead of addressing issues that matter. America needs problem solvers, not politicians.** **[Will you join STAR PAC in the fight to protect our country? Donate today and help us elect more Veterans to defend our values in Congress!](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62428244:6MLa3fGNX:m:1:3365131770:387775D3F6B1D304403D4FCBE98A8C58:r "Will you join STAR PAC in the fight to protect our country?
Donate $50, $100, or $500 today and help us elect more Veterans to defend our values in Congress!")** **Just look at how Brandon has handled the train derailment in East Palestine, Ohio.** Just look at how he and his allies want to blame others for our nation's problems. **Veterans understand responsibility and accountability. Washington 's politicians do not.** I'm a Maine and I don't tolerate excuses. The men and women STAR PAC brings to Washington live by this principle too and that's why we're not stopping until we fix these problems. But conservative Veterans are still outnumbered by the Leftists and RINOs who don't share our values and that's why we have this mess on our hands. It's also why we need your help to recruit, train and elect more brave Veterans who are seeking to continue their service to this nation. Will you join the STAR PAC team and help us safeguard our country? **[Donate today!](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62428244:6MLa3fGNX:m:1:3365131770:387775D3F6B1D304403D4FCBE98A8C58:r "Donate today!")** God Bless America, Rep. Jack Bergman (MI-1)
Lt. Gen., USMC (ret.)
Founder and Chairman, STAR PAC | | [SUPPORT CONSERVATIVE VETERANS](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62428244:6MLa3fGNX:m:1:3365131770:387775D3F6B1D304403D4FCBE98A8C58:r "SUPPORT
CONSERVATIVE VETERANS")

He established STAR PAC to help fill the void and to support conservative Veterans--men and women who know what it means to defend the Constitution from ALL enemies, foreign AND domestic as they seek elective office. He believes it's one of the many ways we can fix Washington and he hopes you'll join him in this mission._

In 2022, STAR PAC supported Veterans like John James, Derrick Van Orden, Ronny Jackson, Rich McCormick, Ryan Zinke, "Banner"and Monica De La Cruz, among others who were victorious, but we still have a lot of work to do if we are going to properly address our nation's national security threats. We are still fighting to help restore the 8,000 service members who were impacted by the Biden vaccine mandates. We are seeking to end the CRT and DEI programs in the Department of Defense. We are still working end the invasion on our Southern Border going unanswered and to stop the fentanyl entering our country at an historic rate from killing our citizens. Unfortunately, we 've got leaders doing a duck and cover instead of addressing issues that matter. America needs problem solvers, not politicians. "Will you join STAR PAC in the fight to protect our country? Donate $50, $100, or $500 today and help us elect more Veterans to defend our values in Congress!" Just look at how Brandon has handled the train derailment in East Palestine, Ohio. Just look at how he and his allies want to blame others for our nation's problems. Veterans understand responsibility and accountability. Washington 's politicians do not. I'm a Maine and I don't tolerate excuses. The men and women STAR PAC brings to Washington live by this principle too and that's why we're not stopping until we fix these problems. But conservative Veterans are still outnumbered by the Leftists and RINOs who don't share our values and that's why we have this mess on our hands. It's also why we need your help to recruit, train and elect more brave Veterans who are seeking to continue their service to this nation. Will you join the STAR PAC team and help us safeguard our country? "Donate today!" God Bless America, Rep. Jack Bergman (MI-1) Lt. Gen., USMC (ret.) Founder and Chairman, STAR PAC | | "SUPPORT CONSERVATIVE VETERANS" | Paid for by STAR PAC Not Authorized by any Candidate or Candidate Committee Lt. Gen. Jack Bergman (USMC, ret) represents Michigan 's 1st Congressional District and is the highest-ranking combat Veteran serving in Congress. He established STAR PAC to help fill the void and to support conservative Veterans--men and women who know what it means to defend the Constitution from ALL enemies, foreign AND domestic as they seek elective office. He believes it's one of the many ways we can fix Washington and he hopes you'll join him in this mission. This message was intended for: mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com You were added to the system October 12, 2022. name: Coach
subject: My response to Biden’s ‘Equity’ push [READ MORE >>]
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tuberville for Senate, Inc
body:
Free speech and freedom aren’t free. Read more >>>
| | | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/c8e2774da8d4d6d3c3d6b838967d376c/33013/40f48dbc81e4f19f/0b165a54c7d4d331c3d6b838967d376c/33013)
---
Peter, The sign of a losing argument and ideology is the feverish push to suppress speech. Our Founding Fathers knew that, along with acknowledging our diverse makeup as a nation – but one foundational American principle has always been: _Our ability to respectfully and responsibly voice our values is what distinguishes us as a thriving nation.**America is free, even when we disagree.**_ Dictators and despots have historically flown their tyrannical banner in the name of ‘equity’ and ‘diversity’ ... until you happen to disagree with them.
---
[](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/c8e2774da8d4d6d3c3d6b838967d376c/33013/40f48dbc81e4f19f/97e5e11537824c6cc3d6b838967d376c/33013)
---
This equity situation that President Biden is trying to push on the American people is all about control. That’s why I’m **[calling out Joe Biden's latest attempt to force progressive ideology on the American people.](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/c8e2774da8d4d6d3c3d6b838967d376c/33013/40f48dbc81e4f19f/9c1c840e9bc5aa97c3d6b838967d376c/33013)** – Coach

name: Cliff Schecter, Blue Amp Action
subject: When you’d think Fox Entertainment has reached the lowest depths, with texts proving they knew they were lying to their viewers about "election fraud" and did it anyhow, likely playing a role in incting January 6th, they get worse …
body:
Fox propaganda update
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | | _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T4d91c462-e1d2-4bc4-ae91-00d1dfd44402/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
|
---
| |
---
| | | | | **Update:**_ Incredibly, just when you think Fox Entertainment (I'll never use "News" in referring to them again) has reached the lowest depths of the gutter, with texts proving they knew they were lying to their viewers about "election fraud" and did it anyhow, likely playing a role in incting January 6th, they get worse._ _**Tucker Carlson's been using the 40,000 hours of Jan 6th video the vile Kevin McCarthy gave only to him, to cherry pick parts of it to pretend the violent coup attempt was a friendly walk in the park.** **Even Mitch McConnell said it was false, and Republian Senator Thom Tillis referred to it as "bullshit."** _**_After all the damage Fox has done to our democracy, to humanity, the unhinged, desipicable Carlson is still trying to destroy us even more. He, and they, must be stopped._** **Please read the rest below for one way we can begin curtailing their disastrous influence on our country.** Cliff On Wed, Mar 8, 2023 at 2:39 PM Cliff Schecter, Blue Amp Action <info@mail.blueampaction.com> wrote: Peter, **_Fox News is a propaganda organization._ **_**Dangerous conspiracy-mongers that pollute the minds of millions of Americans, turning them into right-wing kooks and Russian sympathizers. **_ _**[](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tc9671e50-b6cc-40de-8192-c41cd64ef056/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)**_ _You may have seen the news re the Dominion Voting Systems' lawsuit vs Fox. It produced texts and emails proving _**Tucker Carlson, Laura Ingraham, Sean Hannity, their supposedly *serious newsman* Brett Baier and owner Rupert Murdoch knew Trump's bs about "election fraud" was just that. Bs. But like the treacherous jackals they are, they repeated it anyhow.** _**Because, Fox cares only for ratings and profits, **not anything approaching integrity or their fellow human beings**.** __**Fox has turned tens of millions of Americans against their country, communities and democracy. **_ [**_Will you join Blue Amp Action in giving VoteVets $5, $10, $25 or whatever you can so they can promote this video far and wide and begin the process of de-Foxing our country to stabilize our democracy?_**](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tb8413124-2ee7-4862-b2ca-3d67b7fa8cec/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) **_So, It's a sick joke this station can call itself news, much less be played at our military bases. In fact, one in seven of those who stormed the Capitol in an attempted coup had military experience._** _As an American, and son of a father who spent much of his career on a military base,** it's sickening we allow Fox's cabal of conspiracists anywhere near our military** to convince our troops to not only hate their country, but use their training to attack it._

We fight for these values every day. disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BOB CASEY FOR SENATE INC
body:
and not many people expected me to win either [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60115558/396066972/-744169294?refcode=Header&ms=Header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDU4NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNjZhY2Q3OC1hZGMxLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=J2jI-wQIW_vKtIKqS1UK9fWkDNHodwi40Ze8ilCcLhY=&emci=705e24da-89bf-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=a66acd78-adc1-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=8943725) Peter, my friend Amy Klobuchar has been a tireless champion for working families in Minnesota, Pennsylvania, and across the rest of the country. That's why I plan to do everything I can to help keep her in the Senate. [**I hope you'll consider splitting a contribution to support both of us today.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60115559/396066973/225853740?refcode=em23_230313_mm1ak_fndt_gq_act___ak_ettx&utm_campaign=em23_230313_mm1ak_fndt_gq_act___ak_ettx&utm_medium=email&refcode2=a66acd78-adc1-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&amount=5&amounts=5,10,25,50,100&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDU4NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNjZhY2Q3OC1hZGMxLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=J2jI-wQIW_vKtIKqS1UK9fWkDNHodwi40Ze8ilCcLhY=)

Thanks for your support,

Bob Casey
* * *
Peter, I want to tell you a little bit about why fighting for American families in the U.S. Senate is so important to me. [**My work is made possible by people like you so, if you’re able, I hope you split a contribution of any amount between myself and Bob Casey to help us keep going.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60115560/396066974/225853740?refcode=em23_230313_mm1ak_fndt_gq_act___ak_ettx&utm_campaign=em23_230313_mm1ak_fndt_gq_act___ak_ettx&utm_medium=email&refcode2=a66acd78-adc1-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&amount=5&amounts=5,10,25,50,100&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDU4NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNjZhY2Q3OC1hZGMxLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=J2jI-wQIW_vKtIKqS1UK9fWkDNHodwi40Ze8ilCcLhY=) | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60115561/396066975/225853740?refcode=em23_230313_mm1ak_fndt_gq_act___ak_ettx&utm_campaign=em23_230313_mm1ak_fndt_gq_act___ak_ettx&utm_medium=email&refcode2=a66acd78-adc1-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&amount=5&amounts=5,10,25,50,100&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDU4NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNjZhY2Q3OC1hZGMxLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=J2jI-wQIW_vKtIKqS1UK9fWkDNHodwi40Ze8ilCcLhY=)

Every day, I’m reminded of the fact that I stand on the shoulders of those before me. I am the daughter of a newspaperman and a teacher and the granddaughter of an iron ore miner who saved his money in a coffee can in the basement to send my dad to college. No one expected me to run for elected office -- and not many people expected me to win either.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60115562/396066976/225853740?refcode=em23_230313_mm1ak_fndt_gq_act___ak_ettx&utm_campaign=em23_230313_mm1ak_fndt_gq_act___ak_ettx&utm_medium=email&refcode2=a66acd78-adc1-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&amount=5&amounts=5,10,25,50,100&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDU4NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNjZhY2Q3OC1hZGMxLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=J2jI-wQIW_vKtIKqS1UK9fWkDNHodwi40Ze8ilCcLhY=)
---
**But thanks to supporters like you, our grassroots movement beat the odds, and I became the first woman elected to the U.S. Senate from Minnesota._That’s the American dream in action._ **

Every day since then I’ve been fighting for progress. And I want you to know:

**I will never stop fighting to build a nation that works for working families.**
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60115563/396066977/225853740?refcode=em23_230313_mm1ak_fndt_gq_act___ak_ettx&utm_campaign=em23_230313_mm1ak_fndt_gq_act___ak_ettx&utm_medium=email&refcode2=a66acd78-adc1-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&amount=5&amounts=5,10,25,50,100&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDU4NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNjZhY2Q3OC1hZGMxLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=J2jI-wQIW_vKtIKqS1UK9fWkDNHodwi40Ze8ilCcLhY=)
---
**[But I can’t do it alone, Peter. That's why I'm so thankful to have grassroots supporters like you by my side. If you can, I’m asking you to split a quick donation between myself and Bob Casey today to help us continue this fight.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60115564/396066978/225853740?refcode=em23_230313_mm1ak_fndt_gq_act___ak_ettx&utm_campaign=em23_230313_mm1ak_fndt_gq_act___ak_ettx&utm_medium=email&refcode2=a66acd78-adc1-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&amount=5&amounts=5,10,25,50,100&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDU4NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNjZhY2Q3OC1hZGMxLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=J2jI-wQIW_vKtIKqS1UK9fWkDNHodwi40Ze8ilCcLhY=)**

Thank you so much -- people like you have never let me down.

\-- Amy

clean_body: and not many people expected me to win either Peter, my friend Amy Klobuchar has been a tireless champion for working families in Minnesota, Pennsylvania, and across the rest of the country. That's why I plan to do everything I can to help keep her in the Senate. = Thanks for your support, Bob Casey Peter, I want to tell you a little bit about why fighting for American families in the U.S. Senate is so important to me. = | = Every day, I’m reminded of the fact that I stand on the shoulders of those before me. I am the daughter of a newspaperman and a teacher and the granddaughter of an iron ore miner who saved his money in a coffee can in the basement to send my dad to college. No one expected me to run for elected office -- and not many people expected me to win either. = But thanks to supporters like you, our grassroots movement beat the odds, and I became the first woman elected to the U.S. Senate from Minnesota.That’s the American dream in action. Every day since then I’ve been fighting for progress. And I want you to know: I will never stop fighting to build a nation that works for working families. = = Thank you so much -- people like you have never let me down. \-- Amy Help Amy Klobuchar and Bob Casey continue fighting for you. Chip in.** If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately and be split between Amy Klobuchar and Bob Casey: | | = | = | = | = | = | = PAID FOR BY BOB CASEY FOR SENATE INC. name: Harriet Hageman
subject: I think it's time to clean house and start over. What do you think?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY HAGEMAN FOR WYOMING**
body:
| | | [ ](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62428871:6WqqafGNN:m:1:3365131770:0B87C4FFE48E918C9683F4E16FE1CCB3:r)
---
Peter, I have a simple question for you: [**Does our federal government need to be fumigated?**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62428871:6WqqafGNN:m:1:3365131770:0B87C4FFE48E918C9683F4E16FE1CCB3:r)
| [ **RESPOND NOW!** ](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62428871:6WqqafGNN:m:1:3365131770:0B87C4FFE48E918C9683F4E16FE1CCB3:r)
---
There is so much corruption in Washington, DC in the current administration and our federal agencies like the FBI and DOJ.

I've always said that sunlight is the best disinfectant - especially when it comes to exposing the corruption and the criminals in our government. [**Do you agree?

**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62428871:6WqqafGNN:m:1:3365131770:0B87C4FFE48E918C9683F4E16FE1CCB3:r) We're seeing bureaucrats in the Department of Justice, FBI, and Department of Homeland Security, engaging in blatantly illegal acts.

I think it's time to clean house and start over.[ **What do you think?

**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62428871:6WqqafGNN:m:1:3365131770:0B87C4FFE48E918C9683F4E16FE1CCB3:r) I'm reaching out to true patriots like you to see what you think. [**Click here to let me know your thoughts.

**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62428871:6WqqafGNN:m:1:3365131770:0B87C4FFE48E918C9683F4E16FE1CCB3:r) I look forward to seeing your response.

Thank you, Harriet Hageman
| **PAID FOR BY HAGEMAN FOR WYOMING**

name: Roy Cooper
subject: SIGN ON: Support a clean energy future >>>
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cooper for North Carolina
body:
We still have work to do.
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60117574/396075477/823540626?refcode=ea.0104e6f0-b2c1-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ms=ea.0104e6f0-b2c1-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMTA0ZTZmMC1iMmMxLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=TWzk2scBY08bUWlsWdag6Oc1RWyIujiyBXLj18Ur2uI=&emci=fe37c999-7dbf-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=0104e6f0-b2c1-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=1049176)
Peter — Climate change is an imminent, existential threat to our planet. Yet too many far-right legislators in Raleigh and Washington, D.C. are still ignoring it — or even playing it off as a hoax. **Meanwhile, my administration is doing the work to invest in our environment and our future.** One of my key priorities as governor has always been to set North Carolina on a path to a clean energy economy. We know that this is good for our planet and our economy. **[Peter, I’m committed to our ongoing work to secure our clean energy future, and I need to know you’re with me. Can you sign on to show your support for reducing greenhouse gas emissions and expanding clean energy opportunities?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60117575/396075479/888418934?refcode=ea.0104e6f0-b2c1-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ms=ea.0104e6f0-b2c1-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMTA0ZTZmMC1iMmMxLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=TWzk2scBY08bUWlsWdag6Oc1RWyIujiyBXLj18Ur2uI=&emci=fe37c999-7dbf-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=0104e6f0-b2c1-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=1049176)** The facts are clear: Greenhouse gas emissions are endangering our planet’s future, and we have to transition away from fossil fuels. That’s why I signed into law the first-ever carbon reduction goals for our state and made a commitment to carbon neutrality by 2050. Renewable energy is also key to ensuring that our electric grid is resilient and reliable. **My administration recently published a report outlining our progress toward our climate goals, but there’s still work to do. Expanding affordable, reliable clean energy options is key.** **[Sign on to show your support for fighting climate change with renewable, sustainable energy initiatives>>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60117576/396075480/888418934?refcode=ea.0104e6f0-b2c1-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ms=ea.0104e6f0-b2c1-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMTA0ZTZmMC1iMmMxLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=TWzk2scBY08bUWlsWdag6Oc1RWyIujiyBXLj18Ur2uI=&emci=fe37c999-7dbf-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=0104e6f0-b2c1-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=1049176)** | [SIGN ON](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60117577/396075481/888418934?refcode=ea.0104e6f0-b2c1-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ms=ea.0104e6f0-b2c1-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMTA0ZTZmMC1iMmMxLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=TWzk2scBY08bUWlsWdag6Oc1RWyIujiyBXLj18Ur2uI=&emci=fe37c999-7dbf-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=0104e6f0-b2c1-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=1049176)

clean_body: We still have work to do. | Peter — Climate change is an imminent, existential threat to our planet. Yet too many far-right legislators in Raleigh and Washington, D.C. are still ignoring it — or even playing it off as a hoax. Meanwhile, my administration is doing the work to invest in our environment and our future. One of my key priorities as governor has always been to set North Carolina on a path to a clean energy economy. We know that this is good for our planet and our economy. The facts are clear: Greenhouse gas emissions are endangering our planet’s future, and we have to transition away from fossil fuels. That’s why I signed into law the first-ever carbon reduction goals for our state and made a commitment to carbon neutrality by 2050. Renewable energy is also key to ensuring that our electric grid is resilient and reliable. My administration recently published a report outlining our progress toward our climate goals, but there’s still work to do. Expanding affordable, reliable clean energy options is key. | Thank you, Roy ****=** **=** Send donations via check to: Cooper for North Carolina PO Box 1190 Raleigh, NC 27602 Thank you! mailto:info@roycooper.com | Cooper for North Carolina PO Box 1190 Raleigh, NC 27602 United States Paid for by Cooper for North Carolina Any donor history information in this email reflects what we have on file for this specific email address. name: Wes Moore
subject: Add Your Name: Bring the FBI headquarters to MD!
body:
| [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60117891/396076973/-926250309?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ1NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMDY2NGUzMy1iNGMxLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=LvWw_4SwwXMdWcYr-LTZTKLENyGm5NZ3cqyEW56ioX0=&emci=5dc3652f-b0c1-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=c0664e33-b4c1-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=24635485)
---
Team, The Federal Bureau of Investigation (FBI) headquarters is in need of a new home, and last week, **I made the case that the new FBI headquarters should be built here in Prince George’s County, Maryland.** This is a legacy-defining moment for the Biden Administration and a generational opportunity for our state — _it would be a historic investment in a historic county at a historic moment in history._ By making Maryland its new home, the FBI will benefit from our pipeline of talented cybersecurity experts from the NSA, U.S. Cyber Command, Fort Meade, Bowie State, Johns Hopkins University, and the University of Maryland, all of which call Maryland home. We have the diverse, skilled, and service-oriented workforce to power the FBI’s mission forward. And Maryland will benefit from the FBI, creating opportunities and championing equity in a majority Black jurisdiction. **[If you’re with me and want to see President Biden build the new FBI HQ here in Maryland, add your name to show your support →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60117892/396076974/-524758514?refcode=fl_em_pt_20230312fbi_wm_md_xx_l1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ1NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMDY2NGUzMy1iNGMxLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=LvWw_4SwwXMdWcYr-LTZTKLENyGm5NZ3cqyEW56ioX0=&emci=5dc3652f-b0c1-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=c0664e33-b4c1-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=24635485)** | [ADD YOUR NAME](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60117893/396076975/-524758514?refcode=fl_em_pt_20230312fbi_wm_md_xx_btn&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ1NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMDY2NGUzMy1iNGMxLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=LvWw_4SwwXMdWcYr-LTZTKLENyGm5NZ3cqyEW56ioX0=&emci=5dc3652f-b0c1-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=c0664e33-b4c1-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=24635485)

If you haven’t read my op-ed in the _Washington Post_ about why Maryland is the best home for the FBI, [you can check it out here.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60117894/396076976/1708645485?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ1NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMDY2NGUzMy1iNGMxLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=LvWw_4SwwXMdWcYr-LTZTKLENyGm5NZ3cqyEW56ioX0=&emci=5dc3652f-b0c1-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=c0664e33-b4c1-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=24635485)
Thanks for joining me in raising your voice and working to move Maryland and our country forward.
Elevate,
Wes

name: Bob Lorinser
subject: What is the Democratic Rural Fund?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE FRIENDS OF DR
body:
Hi,
As my extended efforts in outreach begin today, here's a great explanation of what I'm fighting for with the democratic rural fund. Pass it along to anyone who may be interested.
Thank you,
-Dr. Bob
What is the Rural Fund?
Champions of the rural working class need your support the most.
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/miruralfund [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/miruralfund]
CONTRIBUTE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/miruralfund]
Bob Lorinser is running for Congress to represent one of the most critical constituencies in America, people of the rural heartland. He and others believe the future of Democratic success significantly depends on supporting candidates in rural, red districts.
"Our district in Northern Michigan and the UP is one of the most beautiful in the country, but we lack a Congressperson willing to alleviate the pain of struggling rural communities," said Lorinser. "Two cycle strategies make candidates the most viable, and we need long-term support to enact change."
Lorinser ran for the seat in 2022. This year, he expanded his mission. Lorinser created the Rural Fund [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/RuralFund] , an initiative that directly financially benefits his campaign but with a modified goal of advancing shared Democratic principles in areas where candidates need it the most - across the heartland.
"The idea is to use my platform not only to advocate for issues that affect my district but to spark a movement in other ruby-red, conservative districts around us," said Lorinser. "We want to inspire other candidates to be undaunted in adversity. Rural America needs tenacious Democrats who never give up, despite the odds. It's the only way to enact long-term change.
"We've already laid a lot of groundwork, but Democrats have a lot of work to do to convince neglected voters they deserve better," said Lorinser. "Hardworking families get by with tenacity, grit, and perseverance. It's how they survive, but they deserve so much more.
Lorinser is running on affordable and accessible healthcare for all, childcare, education, and housing. He champions workers' rights, livable wages, and organized labor. He considers himself a fierce fighter for conservation and an advocate for Great Lakes' protections and environmental sustainability. Much of his platform centers on individual liberties - women's rights, non-discrimination of the LGBTQ+ community, and care for young people who are victims of the proliferation of depression and violence.
"I grew up in a working-class Midwest home and dedicated my life to public service - as a social worker, physician, diplomat, and public health director," said Lorinser. "Voters in Northern Michigan are fiercely independent, and if I can reach them, there's no place riper to change the most minds.
"Victory is, of course, the goal, but our journey and our mantra supersedes winning an election. Expanding communication and outreach through the Rural Fund is about educating the public on initiatives and legislation that help hardworking families of America's rural heartland."
Lorinser says the fundraising angle is to ignite a united strategy among quality candidates and eventually establish partnerships among campaigns and programs. He hopes to build a strong field network starting on the ground in Michigan's 1st District.
"Candidates like me fight to represent people and embody a larger cause." - Dr. Bob Lorinser
The premise is that it's not too late for the party to make amends and rebuild relationships with people who live on the quiet dirt roads of America, restoring Democrats' reputation as champions of working people, committed to improving their lives and undaunted by wealth and power.
"Rural America is one of the last bastions for Democrats," said Lorinser. "Without funding and party support, losing ground in our communities could soon be catastrophic for a party committed to helping citizens."
Lorinser says he's fighting for a kind of politics that reaches every corner of our country, putting people before profit and country before party. Against the GOP's corporate PACs and dark money, he is promoting and using the Rural Fund to seek founding donors, volunteers, and field staff for the campaign.
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:
CONTRIBUTE $25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/miruralfund?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=express_lane_25]
CONTRIBUTE $50 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/miruralfund?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=express_lane_50]
CONTRIBUTE $100 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/miruralfund?express_lane=true&amount=100&refcode=express_lane_100]
OTHER AMOUNT [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/miruralfund]

| | Bob Lorinser is running for Congress to represent one of the most critical constituencies in America, people of the rural heartland. He and others believe the future of Democratic success significantly depends on supporting candidates in rural, red districts. "Our district in Northern Michigan and the UP is one of the most beautiful in the country, but we lack a Congressperson willing to alleviate the pain of struggling rural communities," said Lorinser. "Two cycle strategies make candidates the most viable, and we need long-term support to enact change."
Lorinser ran for the seat in 2022. This year, he expanded his mission. Lorinser created [the Rural Fund](https://www.votedrbob.com/so/86OQefoJE/c?w=ldrvyInn8tuq0gEZX1yKShhPxh5zfUKhwGkLv0kPaTY.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYWN0Ymx1ZS5jb20vZG9uYXRlL21pcnVyYWxmdW5kIiwiciI6ImU5MmE5YmZjLWQ4MWQtNGVkYS1hODIwLTk3ODQ5YTBhZGI4NiIsIm0iOiJtYWlsIiwiYyI6IjE4NjYyNmQ1LWNhNWUtNDYzMy04MzRhLWU4ODNkMGJkZGQ3NSJ9), an initiative that directly financially benefits his campaign but with a modified goal of advancing shared Democratic principles in areas where candidates need it the most - across the heartland. "The idea is to use my platform not only to advocate for issues that affect my district but to spark a movement in other ruby-red, conservative districts around us," said Lorinser. "We want to inspire other candidates to be undaunted in adversity. Rural America needs tenacious Democrats who never give up, despite the odds. It's the only way to enact long-term change.
"We've already laid a lot of groundwork, but Democrats have a lot of work to do to convince neglected voters they deserve better," said Lorinser. "Hardworking families get by with tenacity, grit, and perseverance. It's how they survive, but they deserve so much more. Lorinser is running on affordable and accessible healthcare for all, childcare, education, and housing. He champions workers' rights, livable wages, and organized labor. He considers himself a fierce fighter for conservation and an advocate for Great Lakes' protections and environmental sustainability. Much of his platform centers on individual liberties - women's rights, non-discrimination of the LGBTQ+ community, and care for young people who are victims of the proliferation of depression and violence. "I grew up in a working-class Midwest home and dedicated my life to public service - as a social worker, physician, diplomat, and public health director," said Lorinser. "Voters in Northern Michigan are fiercely independent, and if I can reach them, there's no place riper to change the most minds.
"Victory is, of course, the goal, but our journey and our mantra supersedes winning an election. Expanding communication and outreach through the Rural Fund is about educating the public on initiatives and legislation that help hardworking families of America's rural heartland." Lorinser says the fundraising angle is to ignite a united strategy among quality candidates and eventually establish partnerships among campaigns and programs. He hopes to build a strong field network starting on the ground in Michigan's 1st District. "Candidates like me fight to represent people and embody a larger cause." - Dr. Bob Lorinser The premise is that it's not too late for the party to make amends and rebuild relationships with people who live on the quiet dirt roads of America, restoring Democrats' reputation as champions of working people, committed to improving their lives and undaunted by wealth and power. "Rural America is one of the last bastions for Democrats," said Lorinser. "Without funding and party support, losing ground in our communities could soon be catastrophic for a party committed to helping citizens." Lorinser says he's fighting for a kind of politics that reaches every corner of our country, putting people before profit and country before party. Against the GOP's corporate PACs and dark money, he is promoting and using the Rural Fund to seek founding donors, volunteers, and field staff for the campaign.
