name: 4Patriots
subject: The Food Crisis of 2023
body:
There are currently 38 million Americans, including 12 million children, who are struggling with food insecurity.

# The Food Crisis of 2023
We live in uncertain times. There are currently 38 million Americans, including 12 million children, who are struggling with food insecurity. As inflation and supply chain disruptions continue to push food costs higher and higher, families are feeling the weight of financial distress as they struggle to make ends meet. John Boyd Jr., a fourth-generation farmer, warns that food shortages are coming. "For so long, we've enjoyed lots of food in this country, so we've never ever faced a food shortage. The worst is yet to come." **Leading industry sources are worried about food shortages. Experts say more grocery hoarding may come as disruptions push America's food supply "near its breaking point".** As a result of this crisis, survival food is more important than ever. If you don't take action or if you stockpile the wrong foods, you could be setting your family up to be hungry in a time of crisis. It sounds harsh, but the truth is too many people with good intentions are making critical mistakes with their survival food. Mistakes like...
* Getting MREs with a 5-year shelf life - depending on where you purchase them from they could be near expired...
* Getting gross survival foods that are tough to stomach and so high in salt, MSG and preservatives you could clog your arteries and get yourself sick...
* Or simply getting the wrong foods and leaving a critical hole in your meal plan, which means you risk becoming malnourished...

Well, no need to worry anymore... Obviously, waiting on the government for a handout in a disaster just isn't an option. And we were completely turned off by the crazy high cost of survival food sold by some companies. That's why I ordered and got my very own stockpile of the best-selling [**4Patriots Survival Food Kits**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c652837%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=Dq5GvQR7iG1jIn19oAR%2bUw&sysid=1). Currently the 4Patriots Survival Food Kits are flying off the shelves because:
* **4Patriots Survival Food Kits are a tremendous value.** This is _not_ ordinary food. This is delicious, nutritious, good-for-25-years super survival food that helps keep you from going hungry in a crisis. This is high-quality survival food without gross fillers or weird "frankenfood" that the other guys use to pad their survival meals. They are handpacked right in a family-owned facility in the U.S.A. and you won't believe how inexpensive these kits are.
* There's no fancy packaging, it's sturdy, triple-layer stuff and can stand up to most of the crazy things that happen in a crisis. This food **is designed to last for 25 years** , so you have complete peace of mind for the long term. And they're using compact kits so you can store them anywhere in your house without any extra hassle. They're sturdy, water-resistant and stack easily. And extremely covert too.
* You can make these meals in less than 20 minutes. Just add boiling water, simmer, and serve.
* **Customers rave about the delicious flavor of this food - it doesn't taste like "survival food."** And you get a whole slew of choices for breakfast, lunch and dinner so you don't get stuck eating the same thing day-in and day-out.
* **You get an easy, no nonsense monthly payment plan with no interest!**

And that's not all, because... [**You also get $318 worth of FREE gifts!**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c652838%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=9yeZCL9afgKS063wYPm6AQ&sysid=1) **FREE Bonus #1:** because they are so popular and a true foundation for your preparedness plan, they're going to give you _**2**_ of their popular 72-Hour Survival Food Kits when you get your 3-Month Kit today. That's extra meals (on the house), grab-and-go portability and a way to get through a short-term crisis without even breaking into your stash. **People love these kits.** It's one of the top-rated items on our website. And you get... **FREE Bonus #2:** You'll get a **Victory Garden Survival Seed Vault** with thousands of non-GMO heirloom seeds inside, designed to stay fresh for years. You can harvest and replant them over and over again. **FREE Bonus #3:** You also get their **Sun Kettle Personal Water Heater.** With your Sun Kettle Personal Water Heater, you can boil water without fuel, flames, smoke or noise. Use your Sun Kettle to purify water, cook food, wash up, clean up and much more. It's like having a mini-microwave the size of a thermos. **FREE Bonus #4:** You'll also get an **Exclusive Ultimate Survival Digital Library.** With these 4 digital books, you'll have the information and tips to help you prepare for an emergency. Together, these digital books are valued at $20, but they're yours free as a thank you for your order. But that's not all because you also get... **FREE Bonus #5:** You also get their **Digital Meal Planning & Recipe Guide**. Inside, you'll find easy ways to whip up delicious meals you'd be proud to serve your kids, and you'll get this brand NEW report for FREE. **FREE Bonus #6:** You also get **Freedom Joe's Survival Coffee.** Rich, aromatic coffee designed to last 25 years. Coffee is one of the most in-demand items when the "you-know-what" hits the fan. Stay alert when the going gets tough with a cup of premium survival coffee from 100% pure Arabica beans. You get 30 servings of delicious, aromatic survival coffee added to your Kit. **FREE Bonus #7:** You also get **Bugle Boy Survival Cocoa.** Warm up with each cup of chocolatey goodness that is sure to satisfy the young and the young at heart. With your Survival Cocoa Kits, you'll have the satisfying comfort of a steaming cup of cocoa when you and your loved ones need it most. You'll get 14 servings of this taste-tested hot cocoa FREE for arming yourself with survival food. But we're still not done, because you also get... **FREE Bonus #8:** You also get **$25 OFF your next purchase.** This is FREE money in the bank for you. You get $25 off any future purchase of $100 or more. Use it to get whatever you need to round out your preparedness plan... best-selling survival food, solar gadgets and so much more! It's completely up to you. That's what we call an incredible deal. But we want to sweeten the pot. So when you order your 3-Month Survival Food Kit today, you also get... **FREE Bonus #9:** **You get FREE Shipping and Handling on your entire order!** It's not cheap to ship 688 servings of food in two totes (plus all the FREE gifts you're getting). But you deserve it for becoming a loyal customer. And frankly, we want to do it for you. [**Get Your 4Patriots Survival Food Kits Rushed To You Plus All Your FREE Bonuses While Supplies Last!**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c652839%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=wg2FjDN2rJR7iuePSmgGsg&sysid=1) Isn't that great? The best part is... You'll have the peace of mind and security that comes from having your very own survival food stockpile. On great-tasting, survival food protection without the sticker shock. **Look, this food tastes homemade.** It's built to last the long haul. It's a snap to prepare. And everyone from former Navy SEALs to middle-American grandmas are singing its praises. [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c652830%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=EnUFHoRjaZwc%2b4Et0EjhMw&sysid=1) You need to get 'er done today. Why? Because if you don't [**take action**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c652831%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=0xCB0aDBkEdkDLjfO%2b2kfg&sysid=1) to get your food stockpile today, you'll be in the same boat as the brainwashed masses who think "everything is fine." And if a crisis hits and your family asks, "What are we going to eat?" your mouth will go dry, and you'll feel powerless. But what if you decide to secure your food stockpile instead? Just [**imagine how much better you'll feel right away**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c652832%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=A254pR2JVlPnP8h2YnP3qg&sysid=1). When a crisis hits, you will be able to calmly reassure them that they're safe and they will have plenty to eat. Listen, I can't predict the future. I don't know exactly when or how a crisis will hit. **As it stands today, it's every man for himself.** In a crisis, the loss will be beyond what you can imagine. That's why I want you to have the same peace of mind that I do. [**Get Your 4Patriots Survival Food Kits Rushed To You Plus All Your FREE Bonuses While Supplies Last!**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c652839%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=wg2FjDN2rJR7iuePSmgGsg&sysid=1) To your survival,

Frank Bates
Patriot Headquarters **More Raving Reviews From Customers!** | | **Rory H.** I was surprised to find that the densely packed packages were easy to prepare and were tasty as well. I definitely recommend having survival food on hand for the times when 'life' happens while we are planning other things.
---|---
| **Billy H.** Received my food kit, and I was able to make the potato soup on my cookstove. Just needed boiling water. Gave it a good stir and let it simmer. When I opened up the pot, it smelled so good. You can see the chunks of potatoes and carrots in each bite you take. It's a good soup.
---|---
| **Kevin S.** The 72 hour kit is a perfect starter kit for any scenario. Put one in your car, work bag, in your house or RV. If you want to start preparing safe food, this is where to start.
---|---
| **Carol B.** I have been iced in this weekend. I thought I would try my potato soup. To my utter delight, IT WAS DELICIOUS. Thank you for such a wonderful product and the peace of mind it brings.
---|---
| **Ken K.** I am not a full-blown survivalist. I am not an idiot, either. I have been through enough in my life and have seen friends who have been through an emergency situation. Save up if you have to, but get at least a month's supply. It tastes good. Although if it's a dire of an emergency, you will be happy to eat anything. IF you have something to eat for your family. We made some of this product, and had family and friends over for them to taste. They all agreed they didn't think anything would be this good, and they will be ordering. Just do something. You can't miss out on this deal.
---|---
| **Justin A.** My wife and I tried the food and we were both surprised about how good it tasted and how satisfied it made us feel afterwards. It feels good knowing that I can provide for my family if a crisis arose and I intend to get more in the future. Also the shipping and customer service has been top notch. This is probably the cheapest survival food I have found, and the company is great.
---|---
| **Gary M.** I actually had lost my job and was homeless for a while. I dug into my food supply, and I cannot fully describe how delicious and easy to prepare everything is. I felt like I was eating like a king. I am going to stock up again as soon as I settle into my new job. Everyone should participate with this company. You will not be disappointed.
---|---
| **John H.** We're in Florida and have made many preparations for the aftermath of a possible hurricane. While we are thankful that Florida has not been hit in several years, it gives us great peace of mind to know we have our 4Patriots kit stashed away, knowing it's not a case of "if" but "when."
---|---

Real reviews from real customers. Sometimes customers receive a free product to test or as a thank you for submitting honest feedback. For more information see [Terms & Conditions](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c652833%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=qFly7Q20mXtF46E5miDcVw&sysid=1).

Friend, The government and fake news media are lying to you! They called the January 6th protest a " deadly insurrection," but the video evidence doesn't back it up. We need to talk about Florida's "Resign To Run" Law and how Governor Ron DeSantis is trying to abuse his authority as Governor of Florida to urge the Republican legislature to change the law so that he can keep his job as Governor, and also run against President Donald Trump in the GOP primary during the 2024 presidential election.
LOOMER UNLEASHED is a free, reader-supported publication. To receive new posts and support my independent journalism, please consider becoming a paid subscriber for a small fee of $7 per month.
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack..apdvx9P3vSQpcsVJL9Fl4u3xnUTgWyahkcEiBQLQyxM?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget-preamble&utm_content=107727821)
**WATCH HERE:[https://rumble.com/v2cjydu-the-worst-kept-secret-in-florida.html](https://substack.com/redirect/e776322b-a4bc-480b-8b37-47a52e1eb7c0?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
Some of you, depending on where you live, may have never heard about the "Resign to Run" law. "Resign to Run" is a Florida law that requires any state official who qualifies for federal public office to resign from the state office he or she presently holds before jumping in the ring if the terms, or any part thereof, run concurrently with each other."
**Florida Statutes, Chapter 99.012**
**Whereas, Florida Statutes Chapter 99.012 (4)(a), reads,**_**" Any officer who qualifies for federal public office must resign from the office he or she presently holds if the terms, or any part thereof, run currently with each other."**_
Ron DeSantis recently won re-election in the 2022 midterm election to serve a second, four year term. That means his second term as Governor is going to carry on until 2027, while the presidential election year is 2024. With the election taking place in November, that means the next President of the United States will be inaugurated in January of 2025.
This is problematic because, one, it's clear that Governor Ron DeSantis deceived Florida voters into thinking that he truly wanted to serve a second term as Governor. And two, how is the Governor supposed to carry out his duties as Governor of Florida if, by chance, he somehow becomes the GOP nominee and makes it to the White House? How can one run a full time, national Presidential primary campaign and also be a full time Governor?
The answer is simple, you can't do both, because doing so would require you to neglect one or the other.
That is the dilemma that is created when elected officials run for higher officer, and that's the reason why the "Resign to Run" law was created. It was created so that politicians cannot have their cake and eat it too, so that if you are an elected state official, you have to resign from the office that you currently hold in order to run for higher office. However, Ron DeSantis thinks that he is above the law, which is strange, given that he has presented himself as a "law and order" candidate.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/81e8aed6-42c9-49a0-ab3e-0d1bb523ac75?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
When you think of Governor Ron DeSantis and the fact that [he's trying to pressure the Florida Republican legislature to change Florida law only to benefit himself and his political aspirations,](https://substack.com/redirect/b5db2cea-f55c-4b4c-9a2f-26889eb26683?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) the first thing that comes to my mind is self-serving political corruption. This is the type of thing that you would expect from Third World leaders, dictators, and authoritarian individuals who abuse the political system to further enrich themselves and carry out their dictatorships.
Well, that's exactly what Ron DeSantis is trying to do. He's acting like an absolute tyrant so that he can control the election system in the state of Florida. There's a common phrase in politics: "As Florida goes, so goes the nation." Ron DeSantis is thinking, "as governor of Florida, if I win the state of Florida, I'm going to be the next president of the United States."
If the tables were turned and we were talking about Gavin Newsom, the communist Governor of California, trying to change a state election law so that he could keep his seat as Governor and also run for President at the same exact time, people would be up in arms with outrage. So, why make an excuse for DeSantis?
It just so happens that President Donald Trump himself is a Floridian, ever since he changed his official residence from New York City to Mar a Lago in Palm Beach, Florida. In opposition to Governor DeSantis's abuse of power in his attempt to undermine and attack President Trump by urging the Republican state legislature to change "Resign to Run", I recently decided to draft a recommended resolution demanding the Florida legislature keep the "Resign To Run" law on the books. I brought copies of my recommended Resolution to the Republican Party of Florida quarterly meeting. [I presented my recommended resolution to Republican Executive Committees across the state, because they have the ability to pass their own resolutions encouraging policy priorities within the Florida legislature.](https://substack.com/redirect/7a0ae92f-d57d-4edf-a9cf-00c617706f8c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/ec55580f-6259-40fc-a17d-737b94f5bc17?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
It is clear as day that Governor DeSantis wants the state legislature to change this law to allow him to run for President while also remaining in the governor's mansion. This is sure to be one of the hot button issues in the current state legislative session.
Personally, I don't think Governor Ron DeSantis should have filed to run for re-election as Governor if he wanted to run for President immediately following his second inauguration. Many people all around the country, Trump supporters included, donated to Ron DeSantis's re-election campaign, believing that he was intending to serve another four years as Governor of Florida, when in reality, he is now going to turn around and use those campaign funds to file against President Donald Trump in 2024.
LOOMER UNLEASHED is a free, reader-supported publication. To receive new posts and support my independent journalism, please consider becoming a paid subscriber for a small fee of $7 per month!
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack..apdvx9P3vSQpcsVJL9Fl4u3xnUTgWyahkcEiBQLQyxM?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget-preamble&utm_content=107727821)
Some people are saying this sounds conspiratorial since Ron DeSantis hasn't officially filed to run in the GOP Presidential primary yet. That's because DeSantis needs the Republican controlled Florida legislature to change the "Resign to Run" law unless he wants to resign right now, because if he were to file for President today, as Florida law currently stands, he would literally have to resign his seat as Governor. But, if he waits until the legislative session ends in May, and the Florida legislature changes "Resign to Run" with the sole purpose of aiding DeSantis's 2024 Presidential run against President Trump (as members of the legislature have already confirmed they plan on doing), then DeSantis gets to have his cake and eat it, too.
The worst kept secret in the state of Florida is the fact that Ron DeSantis is indeed running for President. He is going to challenge President Donald Trump, who he owes his entire political career to, for the 2024 GOP nomination. You can expect Ron DeSantis to file at the end of May when the Florida state legislative session ends.
And if it's not at the end of May, then it will definitely be the beginning of June, because it couldn't be any more obvious that Ron DeSantis is running for President. In other words, anybody who supports changing Florida's "Resign to Run" law is in favor of Donald Trump not being the 2024 GOP nominee.
So, if you support President Donald Trump like I do, and you would like to see President Donald Trump win re-election again and become the President of the United States in 2024, then you need to [contact the Florida legislature](https://substack.com/redirect/c17aae15-c03f-4b67-be93-0e21773756b7?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), especially the Republicans, and tell them to NOT support changing Florida's "Resign to Run" law.
**WATCH HERE:[https://rumble.com/v2cjydu-the-worst-kept-secret-in-florida.html](https://substack.com/redirect/e776322b-a4bc-480b-8b37-47a52e1eb7c0?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**

WATCH HERE: Some of you, depending on where you live, may have never heard about the "Resign to Run" law. "Resign to Run" is a Florida law that requires any state official who qualifies for federal public office to resign from the state office he or she presently holds before jumping in the ring if the terms, or any part thereof, run concurrently with each other." Florida Statutes, Chapter 99.012 Whereas, Florida Statutes Chapter 99.012 (4)(a), reads," Any officer who qualifies for federal public office must resign from the office he or she presently holds if the terms, or any part thereof, run currently with each other." Ron DeSantis recently won re-election in the 2022 midterm election to serve a second, four year term. That means his second term as Governor is going to carry on until 2027, while the presidential election year is 2024. With the election taking place in November, that means the next President of the United States will be inaugurated in January of 2025. This is problematic because, one, it's clear that Governor Ron DeSantis deceived Florida voters into thinking that he truly wanted to serve a second term as Governor. And two, how is the Governor supposed to carry out his duties as Governor of Florida if, by chance, he somehow becomes the GOP nominee and makes it to the White House? How can one run a full time, national Presidential primary campaign and also be a full time Governor? The answer is simple, you can't do both, because doing so would require you to neglect one or the other. That is the dilemma that is created when elected officials run for higher officer, and that's the reason why the "Resign to Run" law was created. It was created so that politicians cannot have their cake and eat it too, so that if you are an elected state official, you have to resign from the office that you currently hold in order to run for higher office. However, Ron DeSantis thinks that he is above the law, which is strange, given that he has presented himself as a "law and order" candidate. | | ---|---|--- When you think of Governor Ron DeSantis and the fact that the first thing that comes to my mind is self-serving political corruption. name: Ruben Gallego
subject: Impulsive decisions are out of character for me
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Booker for Kentucky
body:
[ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/18905?t=1001&akid=3054%2E346206%2EP_kqW0 ][IMG]
Peter,

Impulsive, emotional decisions are out of character for me.

I am the guy who had a four-year plan to get into Harvard even though my
family was dirt poor.

So I thought long and hard about the decision to run for the United States
Senate.

I prepared for it long before the possibility of Senator Sinema’s party
switch.

I came to the conclusion that as a Marine, a Latino, and someone with a
record of standing up for working people, we can build a coalition that
can win a 2-way race, 3-way race, 27-way race... doesn’t matter.

The only open question was whether the grassroots support would be there.
And I thought it would be. So far, I’ve been right.

So I am asking:

[ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/18905?t=1002&akid=3054%2E346206%2EP_kqW0 ]Can you please use this link to split $5, $10 or whatever you can
afford between Charles Booker and my campaign? The amount isn’t as
important as the donation, because it all adds up when we’re all chipping
in. So please.

CHIP IN →

Thank you, and adiós,

Ruben

name: Deroy Murdock
subject: The greatest armed conflict in human history
body:
Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us.

This sponsored message from Deroy Murdock is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2z1d2n73lua2srbdlm1rn15samk8t8p6or10uce0g_rp22sh2s8i66pr0stj6eor4cdh2bs) Dear Fellow American, Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us. This fact means that we’re losing more and more living memory of the greatest armed conflict in human history, which makes the study of World War II even more important. To this end, Hillsdale College has produced an online course entitled “The Second World Wars.” Taught by historian Victor Davis Hanson, this course explores how the conflict’s diverse theaters, belligerents, and ways of fighting came eventually to define a single war. And it examines the key investments, strategies, and leaders that led the Allied powers to victory over the Axis. [](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2z5addcajbm3t16viqbpmflhph409e3n44v5ar0co_rp22sh2s8i66pr0stj6eor4cdh2bs) If you’d like to secure a DVD set before they’re all gone, you can get one shipped directly to your home for any gift of $100 or more to Hillsdale College. Here’s a secure link to reserve your copy of “**The Second World Wars** ” on DVD: **[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-the-second-world-wars](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zqtni6g27u2kb04kenipgfjkmrl4hrqrt71qbvfo_rp22sh2s8i66pr0stj6eor4cdh2bs)** Thank you for preserving liberty for future generations of Americans through education with Hillsdale College! Best regards, Kyle Murnen, ’09 Director of Online Learning Hillsdale College

name: Gabe Vasquez
subject: This district deserves our fair share
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY GABE VASQUEZ FOR CONGRESS
body:
| [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60121052/396087874/-972986530?refcode=fl_email_fr_20230313speech_gv_90da_xx_hdr&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzAxMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2MjZjMzlkYS1iYWMxLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=tMUXTYca6_kunFy7hAjQfSrPAdwqYi5sXp48oVUatYQ=)
---
Team, Last week, **I gave my first speech on the floor of the U.S. House, and I used it to shine a light on the ways in which Washington is leaving New Mexico’s 2nd District behind.** _22,735 veterans in New Mexico live in poor housing conditions._ _42% of NM-02 does not have access to high-speed internet._ _1 in 4 New Mexicans rely on SNAP benefits._ It’s clear that New Mexico doesn’t get its fair share of investments or attention in Washington, and there is a real disparity on the ground between this district and others. _Washington can no longer forget about communities like ours._ We need more investments in infrastructure such as rural broadband, economic development, and better housing for those who’ve served our country. That’s what I’m committed to do as your representative in Congress, but the far-right is chomping at the bit to take this seat back and undo all that progress. **[Help me continue to fight for NM-02 in Washington: pitch in $10 or whatever you can afford right now to refuel our grassroots campaign and keep our district moving forward.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60121053/396087875/-972986530?refcode=fl_email_fr_20230313speech_gv_90da_xx_l1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzAxMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2MjZjMzlkYS1iYWMxLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=tMUXTYca6_kunFy7hAjQfSrPAdwqYi5sXp48oVUatYQ=)** | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:

It’s an honor to fight for you and every New Mexican,
Gabe

clean_body: | = Team, Last week, I gave my first speech on the floor of the U.S. House, and I used it to shine a light on the ways in which Washington is leaving New Mexico’s 2nd District behind. 22,735 veterans in New Mexico live in poor housing conditions. 42% of NM-02 does not have access to high-speed internet. 1 in 4 New Mexicans rely on SNAP benefits. It’s clear that New Mexico doesn’t get its fair share of investments or attention in Washington, and there is a real disparity on the ground between this district and others. Washington can no longer forget about communities like ours. We need more investments in infrastructure such as rural broadband, economic development, and better housing for those who’ve served our country. That’s what I’m committed to do as your representative in Congress, but the far-right is chomping at the bit to take this seat back and undo all that progress. = | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = | = | = ---|---|--- = | = | = It’s an honor to fight for you and every New Mexican, Gabe | Gabe Vasquez is a first-generation American, former City Councilor, and conservation champion who flipped New Mexico’s 2nd Congressional District from red to blue in 2022 with the help of this people-powered movement. Now, he's taking his experience in office and passion for economic opportunities, the environment, and giving a voice to underserved communities in Congress to fight for the people of New Mexico. | = | PAID FOR BY GABE VASQUEZ FOR CONGRESS Gabe Vasquez for Congress Drawer L Mesilla, NM 88046 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please .

name: Your America
subject: Reserve your DVD box set
body:
C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life’s most important questions through vivid language that is delightful and captivating to read.

| | | This sponsored message from Your America News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c00381%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=Wx4FmSsWwrODpe0r61i3fg&sysid=1)
---
| | Dear friend, C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life’s most important questions through vivid language that is delightful and captivating to read.

His signature ability to communicate the truth about Christianity has inspired countless skeptics to become believers and even more believers to renew and deepen their faith--making him the greatest Christian apologist of the twentieth century.

That’s why we produced “[**C.S. Lewis on Christianity,**](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c00382%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=siQVpexlwEwK%2bXlYZJkG6A&sysid=1)” which you can now own on DVD.
---
| [](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c00383%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=YgXa4xooCsvKC1kK6umPtg&sysid=1)
---
| | In this course you will learn Lewis’s profound insights on the central topics of Christianity, including:
* good and evil,
* conversion and faith,
* prayer and the Bible,
* suffering and death,
* heaven and hell, and much more.

Dr. Ward is a Distinguished Visiting Professor at Hillsdale College and a member of the Faculty of Theology and Religion at the University of Oxford. He is the author of _Planet Narnia: The Seven Heavens in the Imagination of C.S. Lewis_ and _After Humanity: A Guide to C.S. Lewis’s The Abolition of Man_, and the co-editor of _The Cambridge Companion to C.S. Lewis_. He even spent three years living in Lewis’s Oxford home as the resident Warden of The Kilns!

This course is especially moving because it examines C.S. Lewis’s beautiful writings about faith and traces Lewis’s own journey from skeptic to believer. The combination provides an opportunity for us to grow in our knowledge and understanding of Christianity.

That’s why I hope you’ll join us in examining the eternal questions of Christianity with C.S. Lewis with [this beautiful new DVD box set](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c00384%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=NjDXJSaVYlRXc9I4vYuH4w&sysid=1).

Best regards,

Kyle Murnen, ’09
Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College
---
| |
---

Your America News _625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_ _[Unsubscribe](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/OptOut.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c920805%7c7274%7c7%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c0&wdmdk=FY1RCwMfNQulGQnmUZSnGA&sysid=1)_
[**unsubscribe**](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c00395%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=2MNnnsNcU9YzTFobIj5haA&sysid=1) | [manage data preferences](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c00396%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=m2057MH6WCix2RTBRqa%2few&sysid=1)

body:

| | | Amazingly, Republicans are STILL pushing [this horrible idea](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tae5934a3-9a52-4fbd-b24c-0c6a6c945226/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) from earlier this year:

_" McCarthy announced that he would be bringing a right-wing bill up for a vote that would abolish the IRS and all taxes - corporate taxes, capital gains, income, estate, gifts, you name it — and instead impose a 30% sales tax on every person in America._ _This is an absolutely preposterous idea that would heap hardship on America's working families, cripple the federal budget, and funnel enormous amounts of money into the pockets of the already obscenely rich oligarchs that pull the strings in the Republican Party. " _ Democrats are [pushing back](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tf499379f-9aaf-471c-a61d-188e56a5ddfe/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9), but extremist Republicans still are working to make this horrible proposal the law of the land.

[Add your name: Say NO to the Republican plan for a 30% sales tax >>](https://default.salsalabs.org/Taf6cdc88-fe80-482f-b2a6-d3da78dd9698/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

---
| | | Thank you, Left Action _P.S. - Wondering why you should sign a petition? _ _By signing a petition, you demonstrate to those in power that people care about an issue, and will vote/act accordingly. The more signatures a petition gets, the more seriously those leaders will take it. It’s a sign that they will be rewarded for doing the right thing, and face a hassle if they don’t. Will one signature make a difference? Almost certainly not. But could thousands tip the balance on a critical issue? For sure. It’s already happened many times. Political leaders routinely change positions when they get a lot of pushback from voters, and corporate leaders do as well, when there is pushback from consumers. So take action, get others on board, and help make a difference. _ _[P.P.S. - You are receiving this because you took one of our actions. | Peter,

With prices on the rise and the cost of goods and services skyrocketing, families are struggling to make ends meet. We know that this is an issue that affects all Americans.

Lori has always been a commonsense voice and knows the importance of bipartisan solutions that benefit all Americans. That's why she is committed to finding practical solutions to address inflation and help hardworking families get ahead.

She needs your support, Peter.

[_**Your contribution will help Lori fight for policies that will help mitigate the effects of inflation and help hard-working families get back on their feet. >>>**_](https://gobigmediainc.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a2447b89afe54066435f04744&id=3002dcda43&e=c87c5d8d97)

Team Lori

clean_body: Join her fight today. | | | | | | | Peter, With prices on the rise and the cost of goods and services skyrocketing, families are struggling to make ends meet. We know that this is an issue that affects all Americans. Lori has always been a commonsense voice and knows the importance of bipartisan solutions that benefit all Americans. That's why she is committed to finding practical solutions to address inflation and help hardworking families get ahead. She needs your support, Peter. | "CONTRIBUTE TODAY" | With your help, we can advocate for economic growth, support small businesses, and provide relief for struggling families. Every dollar counts, and your contribution will make a real difference in the fight against inflation. Thank you, Team Lori | "CONTRIBUTE" | | | | | | | Even as a Congresswoman, Lori’s most important title is mom. Please send your urgent donation today to fund our new America First organization to defend our supporters in the courts. ** Thank you, Kash Patel The Fight With Kash Foundation is a 501(c)(3) nonprofit. All donations are tax-deductible. ** Reclaiming American Freedom 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

subject: Extreme Republicans are doubling down on their strategy to flood voters with misinformation.

body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dasspac-2021-footer?refcode=emailheader&amount=25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dasspac-2021-footer?refcode=emailheader&amount=25]
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dasspac-march23?refcode=em_fr_031323_b1_Jena_30ac&amount=25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dasspac-march23?refcode=em_fr_031323_b1_Jena_30ac&amount=25]Hi there -
This is DASS Chair Jena Griswold, and I’m here with an alert: the Big Lie hasn’t gone away. In fact, it’s only getting worse.
Despite our historic wins last November, Republicans are doubling down on their strategy to flood voters with misinformation about the integrity of our elections:
→ In Florida last weekend, Donald Trump continued to spread deranged conspiracy theories about the 2020 election.
→ In Arizona, gubernatorial candidate Kari Lake still refuses to concede to Katie Hobbs, despite losing by over 17,000 votes.
→ And in Michigan, Kristina Karamo, the election denier who has yet to concede her 2022 loss for Secretary of State, will now chair the state GOP.
The Big Lie has grown into a dangerous movement that we must stop! [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dasspac-march23?refcode=em_fr_031323_b1_Jena_30ac&amount=25]
With countless Trump-endorsed extremists trying to take over running your elections, DASS is dedicated to fighting back - but we need your help!
We’re counting on your support, team. Can you rush a donation of $10 or more today so we can crush our weekly $7,000 fundraising goal and keep fighting back against the Big Lie? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dasspac-march23?refcode=em_fr_031323_b1_Jena_30ac&amount=25]

That’s why now, more than ever, we need committed Democrats like you, representing your community as an official member of this grassroots team.
**With the support of this grassroots movement, we can elect pro-abortion rights Democrats to state legislatures nationwide and stop Republicans’ anti-abortion tirade in its tracks. So, can we count you in?**

name: Dr. Frank Turek, CrossExamined.org
subject: Did Jesus rise from the dead?
body:
| | Please see a special message from our sponsor.
---
| | | | [](http://trk.secureandprosper.)
---
Friend, Can we really believe that Jesus rose from the dead? If the Resurrection of Jesus did not truly happen, then Christianity is false, as even the Apostle Paul admitted in 1 Cor. 15. But if the Resurrection _did_ occur, then the essentials of the Christians faith really are true. As we approach Easter, learn to understand the truth of the Resurrection - and serve as a loving witness to others, to friends and family, and even simply to yourself.
---
[](http://trk.secureandprosper.)
---
**CrossExamined, the non-profit Christian ministry I helped found 16 years ago, is sharing 'In Defense of the Resurrection,' a 30-day Easter devotional that presents the evidence for Jesus' Resurrection in a simple, easy to follow way.** [**Thanks to generous supporters of CrossExamined's ministry, we are offering a limited number of 'In Defense of the Resurrection'_at no cost_ to you. Please download your digital booklet of 'In Defense of the Resurrection' to begin using it right away.**](http://trk.secureandprosper.)
---
[Claim your 'In Defense of the Resurrection' devotional today](http://trk.secureandprosper._7CLs35ps4pv14jQ)
---
The fact that Jesus was crucified and three days later rose from his grave is a cornerstone of the Christian faith ... but it has been debated for nearly 2,000 years. Even in Scripture, Apostle Paul clearly states that without the Resurrection, Christianity cannot be true: _"Now, brothers and sisters, I want to remind you of the gospel I preached to you, which you received and on which you have taken your stand. By this gospel you are saved, if you hold firmly to the word I preached to you. Otherwise, you have believed in vain. For what I received I passed on to you as of first importance: that Christ died for our sins according to the Scriptures, that he was buried, that he was raised on the third day." -- 1 Corinthians 15_ **Every Christian can (and, I believe, should!) learn the truth of the Resurrection and understand the "case" to be made for it _truly_ happening nearly 2,000 years ago.** That's why CrossExamined has prepared this free 30-day devotional booklet -- 'In Defense of the Resurrection' -- to help you study the historic and Biblical evidence surrounding this miracle, with a short, informative, and interesting points to reflect on during the 30 days leading up to Easter Sunday. [**Please secure your copy of 'In Defense of the Resurrection' right now to begin your reading. There's no cost to you ... and much to be gained.**](http://trk.secureandprosper.-EfQ)
---
[Claim your 'In Defense of the Resurrection' devotional today](http://trk.secureandprosper.)
---
If Jesus rose from the dead, then the essentials of the Christian faith must be true, but you and I shouldn't simply accept that at face value. Given the importance of this historic event, it's critical that we review the evidence of Jesus' Resurrection and what He did for us. **The evidence presented in 'In Defense of the Resurrection' will help you strengthen - and even grow - your faith in Jesus.** Whether you read 'In Defense of the Resurrection' daily for 30 days, or choose to read it all in one sitting, each short daily message will prepare you to understand and make the case for the Resurrection of Christ. _And once you can make the case for the Resurrection of Jesus Christ, you can also make the case for Christianity._ If you're familiar with CrossExamined's wide range of apologetics material - seen by MILLIONS online each year -- you already know our works are easy and enjoyable to read. 'In Defense of the Resurrection' is unlike any Easter devotional you'll find, and will prepare you to become an effective witness for the Lord. [**This special Easter devotional will only be offered for a short time, so please make sure to claim your copy right away.**](http://trk.secureandprosper.) At CrossExamined, we boldly proclaim the evidence for Christianity and cross-examine the claims against the foundation of our faith - Jesus' Resurrection - as no other group does. We're on a mission to ensure that Christians not only love the Lord with their hearts but also with their minds... which is why we put together this 30-day guide about Jesus' Resurrection in advance of Easter. It's important that we _understand_ why we Christians hold our beliefs and are empowered to stand up to those who try and refute our faith... especially as we approach Easter. [**Click here to access your FREE copy of 'In Defense of the Resurrection' and learn for yourself the incredible evidence for Jesus' Resurrection - and, as a result, the Truth of Christianity.**](http://trk.secureandprosper._CAV1fha9tPaIf2W7AA) Thank you and God bless,
---
Dr. Frank TurekPresidentCrossExamined.org
---
[Claim your 'In Defense of the Resurrection' devotional today](http://trk.secureandprosper.-IfxaJg)
---
Secure & Prosper PO Box 455 Leesburg, VA 20178If you no longer wish to receive sponsored promotional emails from us [_click here_](http://trk.secureandprosper.com/uu/3/eyJhaSI6NTE5ODk2OTgsImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiMTM4ODM3MTYzNCIsInJxIjoiMDItYjIzMDcyLWVjZDc3YThjMmY0OTQyNmI5YTZhMzg2OWI3YTU4ZDgyIiwicGgiOm51bGwsIm0iOmZhbHNlfQ/eqj3YTNkXccVTupemCwd7g) to unsubscribe.

That's why CrossExamined has prepared this free 30-day devotional booklet -- 'In Defense of the Resurrection' -- to help you study the historic and Biblical evidence surrounding this miracle, with a short, informative, and interesting points to reflect on during the 30 days leading up to Easter Sunday. If Jesus rose from the dead, then the essentials of the Christian faith must be true, but you and I shouldn't simply accept that at face value. Given the importance of this historic event, it's critical that we review the evidence of Jesus' Resurrection and what He did for us. The evidence presented in 'In Defense of the Resurrection' will help you strengthen - and even grow - your faith in Jesus. Whether you read 'In Defense of the Resurrection' daily for 30 days, or choose to read it all in one sitting, each short daily message will prepare you to understand and make the case for the Resurrection of Christ. And once you can make the case for the Resurrection of Jesus Christ, you can also make the case for Christianity. If you're familiar with CrossExamined's wide range of apologetics material - seen by MILLIONS online each year -- you already know our works are easy and enjoyable to read. 'In Defense of the Resurrection' is unlike any Easter devotional you'll find, and will prepare you to become an effective witness for the Lord. At CrossExamined, we boldly proclaim the evidence for Christianity and cross-examine the claims against the foundation of our faith - Jesus' Resurrection - as no other group does. We're on a mission to ensure that Christians not only love the Lord with their hearts but also with their minds... which is why we put together this 30-day guide about Jesus' Resurrection in advance of Easter. It's important that we understand why we Christians hold our beliefs and are empowered to stand up to those who try and refute our faith... especially as we approach Easter. Thank you and God bless, Dr. Frank TurekPresidentCrossExamined.org Secure & Prosper PO Box 455 Leesburg, VA 20178If you no longer wish to receive sponsored promotional emails from us to unsubscribe.

Friend, The government and fake news media are lying to you! They called the January 6th protest a " deadly insurrection," but the video evidence doesn't back it up. A small number of people broke windows and attacked police officers, and they should be prosecuted. The majority of the protestors were peaceful. We need to help those January 6th defendants stand up against the Deep State. I 'm launching the Kash Foundation to offer legal help to America First defendants like the ones from the January 6th witch hunts. I led the Russiagate investigation for the House Committee and uncovered that the FBI was actively trying to sabotage President Trump. As the former head of counterterrorism and former senior aide to President Trump, I will do everything in my power to help out. Support the January 6th Defendants Goal: $33,000 Email: dpwillis67@gmail.com Donation: PENDING The January 6th Committee lied. They lied about how Brian Sicknick died. They lied about Rep. Barry Loudermilk taking rioters on a reconnaissance mission. They lied about Rep. Josh Hawley running away. They lied about Ray Epps. If they were "insurrectionists," then why were some of them being led around by police officers instead of being arrested? What else are they lying about? I know they don't want us to find any evidence that the FBI was provoking the protesters into rioting. We need to make sure all FBI involvement in Jan. 6 is released to the public. And they used innocent protestors to push their agenda. Now they need your help to set them free. I know all about this firsthand. I've seen how the Department of Justice and the government work. name: Our Revolution
subject: LIVE Call TONIGHT: New US Rep. Delia Ramirez, Chicago Teachers Union President Stacy Davis Gates, and more!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Our Revolution click here to unsubscribe
body:
[ stdin# ][IMG]

Join our LIVE National Organize-to-Win Call
[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8448?t=1011&akid=4115%2E5885482%2EDKOEPE ][IMG]

Don’t miss our [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8448?t=1012&akid=4115%2E5885482%2EDKOEPE ]LIVE National Organize-to-Win Call kicks off at 8:30 pm
ET/5:30 PT this Monday!

The first Latina from the Midwest to serve in Congress, US Rep. Delia
Ramirez (IL-3) will talk to us about how progressives are building power
to deliver for working people.

We’ll hear from Chicago Teachers Union President Stacy Davis Gates on the
opportunity to elect Brandon Johnson as a progressive mayor in the city
next month!

Then, Shawn Denney will talk about his candidacy for Mayor in Lawrence,
IN; and, Our Revolution Organizing Coordinator Anna-Marta Visky will give
an update on our work to end subminimum wages state by state.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8448?t=1013&akid=4115%2E5885482%2EDKOEPE ]RSVP

★ ★ ★

--------------------------------------------------------------------------

HEADLINES: US Rep. Delia Ramirez (IL-3) on Progressive Power | Chicago
Teachers Union President Stacey Davis Gates on Mayoral Runoff | Shawn
Denney for Mayor in Lawrence, IN | One Fair Wage Update | NEW! ‘Birdie
Sanders’ Sticker | & MORE!

★ ★ ★

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8448?t=1014&akid=4115%2E5885482%2EDKOEPE ][IMG]

Power is up for grabs in major cities across the country this year, and
we’re going big to build local power!

On Monday’s [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/340?t=1015&akid=4115%2E5885482%2EDKOEPE ]Organizing Call, we’ll dig into the big Chicago runoff race
between Brandon Johnson, a former public school teacher and union
organizer, and Paul Vallas, a public school privatizer who calls himself
“more of a Republican than a Democrat.”

In Tuesday’s election in St. Louis, where we hold a progressive majority,
nearly our entire slate advanced to the general election — including Mayor
Tashaura Jones, Board President Megan Green, and 9 of our 10 ward
candidates!

We’ve got more opportunities to build progressive power through upcoming
elections in Philly, Nashville, Dallas, NYC and more!

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8223?t=1016&akid=4115%2E5885482%2EDKOEPE ]JOIN OUR ELECT PROGRESSIVES TEAM

★ ★ ★

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8448?t=1017&akid=4115%2E5885482%2EDKOEPE ][IMG]

Every two weeks, we gather to organize directly with progressive leaders,
activists, and fellow workers. [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8448?t=1018&akid=4115%2E5885482%2EDKOEPE ]RSVP to participate in the Zoom directly
and make connections in the chat!

Thousands more tune-in LIVE on our [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8355?t=1019&akid=4115%2E5885482%2EDKOEPE ]Facebook and [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8356?t=1020&akid=4115%2E5885482%2EDKOEPE ]Twitter, and you
can find more of our video content by subscribing to our [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8357?t=1021&akid=4115%2E5885482%2EDKOEPE ]YouTube
channel.

Help us build Monday’s call by sharing out this [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8449?t=1022&akid=4115%2E5885482%2EDKOEPE ]link on Twitter or
sending this [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8448?t=1023&akid=4115%2E5885482%2EDKOEPE ]invite to your friends to join the interactive broadcast
with you!

★ ★ ★

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8448?t=1024&akid=4115%2E5885482%2EDKOEPE ][IMG]

★ ★ ★

NEW ‘BIRDIE SANDERS’ STICKER

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8450?t=1025&akid=4115%2E5885482%2EDKOEPE ][IMG]

This month marks the 7th anniversary of the famous bird-landing on
Bernie's podium — and we're celebrating with a new sticker depicting the
hope and joy that was lit in that moment.

Get your sticker with a one-time donation of $10 (just $5 for members!) or
sign-up for a monthly donation of just $5 or more.

This heartwarming moment in Bernie-history took place in 2016 in Portland,
OR, where a crowd of 28,000 erupted in thunderous applause.

“I think there's some symbolism here,” Bernie said. “This bird is really a
dove asking us for world peace — no more wars!”

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8451?t=1026&akid=4115%2E5885482%2EDKOEPE ]GET YOUR STICKER

★ ★ ★

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8448?t=1027&akid=4115%2E5885482%2EDKOEPE ][IMG]

This was a big week in our campaign with One Fair Wage, and we’ll have a
full report back on Monday’s [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8448?t=1028&akid=4115%2E5885482%2EDKOEPE ]Organizing Call from our events and our
work to end the subminimum wage in 13 states this year.

On Thursday, we joined US Reps. Ro Khanna, Debbie Dingell, Jan Schakowsky,
and other progressives for a press event calling out the National
Restaurant Association for using workers’ money to block higher wages.

Our Revolution organizers and activists were busy this week in IL, MD, NY,
and CT — rallying with workers and pressuring elected officials to pass
our bills!

You can help by telling your reps to reject dirty money from the ‘Other
NRA’ which has helped keep the federal minimum wage at $7.25 since 2009 —
and just $2.13 since 1991 for tipped workers!

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8247?t=1029&akid=4115%2E5885482%2EDKOEPE ]CALL YOUR REP!

★ ★ ★

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8448?t=1030&akid=4115%2E5885482%2EDKOEPE ][IMG]

Don’t forget to [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8448?t=1031&akid=4115%2E5885482%2EDKOEPE ]RSVP NOW for our interactive broadcast, which starts
at 8:30 pm ET/5:30 PT this Monday! From Chicago to DC, teachers to tipped
workers, we’ll cover a lot of ground on the issues closest to the
grassroots.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8448?t=1032&akid=4115%2E5885482%2EDKOEPE ]JOIN THE CALL

★ ★ ★

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8448?t=1033&akid=4115%2E5885482%2EDKOEPE ][IMG]

WHEN WE ORGANIZE, WE WIN!

★ ★ ★

--------------------------------------------------------------------------

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/9?t=1001&akid=4115%2E5885482%2EDKOEPE ]Facebook | [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/10?t=1002&akid=4115%2E5885482%2EDKOEPE ]Twitter | [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/11?t=1003&akid=4115%2E5885482%2EDKOEPE ]Instagram | [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/2355?t=1004&akid=4115%2E5885482%2EDKOEPE ]Youtube | [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/2356?t=1005&akid=4115%2E5885482%2EDKOEPE ]Website |
[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/signup/signup_2109/?t=1006&akid=4115%2E5885482%2EDKOEPE ]Sign Up

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/5923?c0=EM_NBI_OR_20230313_NL_MondayInvite_0_6MO_OurRevolution_NA_NA_MondayCall.jr7_3r&t=1007&akid=4115%2E5885482%2EDKOEPE ]Our membership swag

Our Revolution is the largest entirely grassroots funded progressive
group in America.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/5924?c0=EM_NBI_OR_20230313_NL_MondayInvite_0_6MO_OurRevolution_NA_NA_MondayCall.ScKmR2&t=1008&akid=4115%2E5885482%2EDKOEPE ]Help us defend democracy and take the fight directly to the
establishment by committing to a recurring donation of just $5 or more a
month!

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/5925?c0=EM_NBI_OR_20230313_NL_MondayInvite_0_6MO_OurRevolution_NA_NA_MondayCall.oJ8-hu&t=1009&akid=4115%2E5885482%2EDKOEPE ]GIVE MONTHLY

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/5926?c0=EM_NBI_OR_20230313_NL_MondayInvite_0_6MO_OurRevolution_NA_NA_MondayCall.nx6CrD&t=1010&akid=4115%2E5885482%2EDKOEPE ]GIVE ONCE

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.ourrevolution.com/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe-2/?akid=4115%2E5885482%2EDKOEPE

body:
A long email. But I promise it’s worth the read. | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60122723/396093974/17860314?refcode=ea.7687637c-c0c1-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ms=ea.7687637c-c0c1-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDMzMTAiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNzY4NzYzN2MtYzBjMS1lZDExLWE4ZTAtMDAyMjQ4MzJlODExIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=D5XxkkcvYG74fzQc_gihr8AioN6XTA6zzRhQH2hntXE=)

Hey, Peter.

Before I take a moment to re-introduce myself, I’ll be straight with you: [We're in a really tight spot with our mid-month deadline. My campaign needs to raise $10,000 in the next 83 hours to maintain its momentum against Governor Tate Reeves. So I'm kindly asking: Can I count on you to donate a few bucks?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60122731/396093981/-761526316?refcode=ea.7687637c-c0c1-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ms=ea.7687637c-c0c1-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDMzMTAiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNzY4NzYzN2MtYzBjMS1lZDExLWE4ZTAtMDAyMjQ4MzJlODExIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=D5XxkkcvYG74fzQc_gihr8AioN6XTA6zzRhQH2hntXE=) | **[RUSH A DONATION](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60122740/396093987/-761526316?refcode=ea.7687637c-c0c1-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ms=ea.7687637c-c0c1-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDMzMTAiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNzY4NzYzN2MtYzBjMS1lZDExLWE4ZTAtMDAyMjQ4MzJlODExIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=D5XxkkcvYG74fzQc_gihr8AioN6XTA6zzRhQH2hntXE=)**
---
**My name is Brandon Presley, and I’ve dedicated my entire life to public service and delivering results for the people of Mississippi.**

I was born and raised in Nettleton. I was elected mayor of my hometown at 23 years old. And now, I serve as the Public Service Commissioner.

My actions have always spoken louder than words.

I’ve brought high-speed internet all the way to some of the most remote and forgotten parts of our state. I helped save taxpayers over 6 billion dollars, put people back to work with the Hire Mississippi program, balanced the budget, and even cut taxes twice.

But you know what? _None of this would have been possible without my momma._

See, life was never easy growing up for this Mississippi kid. I grew up in a house where you could see the dirt through the floor, and there wasn’t a stove or refrigerator in sight.

My daddy was an alcoholic who never made it to recovery. And on the first day of third grade, he was murdered in cold blood.

My momma worked at the local garment factory before it shut down. She dug in and dug deep, raising three kids all by herself while instilling in me a deep value of hard work and perseverance.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60122746/396093998/-761526316?refcode=ea.7687637c-c0c1-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ms=ea.7687637c-c0c1-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDMzMTAiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNzY4NzYzN2MtYzBjMS1lZDExLWE4ZTAtMDAyMjQ4MzJlODExIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=D5XxkkcvYG74fzQc_gihr8AioN6XTA6zzRhQH2hntXE=)
_Brandon, as a child, with his mother._
And it’s why I’ve devoted every waking moment to helping our communities. I’ve taken on the big utility companies, corporate lobbyists, and anybody who’s tried to screw over everyday Mississippians.

Now, I am ready to send Governor Tate Reeves packing and move Mississippi forward. Tate Reeves had his chance to serve the good folks of our state, but he’s spent more time enriching his wealthy pals and turning Mississippi into a hotbed of corruption than helping the people who voted him in.

We can build a Mississippi where we fight corruption, not embrace it. Where we cut taxes. Lower the cost of healthcare. And create good-paying jobs. But I can’t do this alone.

[I could really use your help to hit our mid-month fundraising goal and take us one step closer to defeating Governor Tate Reeves. Can I count on your donation before the deadline?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60122751/396094004/-761526316?refcode=ea.7687637c-c0c1-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ms=ea.7687637c-c0c1-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDMzMTAiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNzY4NzYzN2MtYzBjMS1lZDExLWE4ZTAtMDAyMjQ4MzJlODExIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=D5XxkkcvYG74fzQc_gihr8AioN6XTA6zzRhQH2hntXE=)

This offer ends today

**YOUR REPUBLICAN MEMBERSHIP HAS BEEN SUSPENDED**

---

Friend,

subject: What you need to know before Tuesday’s rehearing…

body:
Explaining Harper v. Hall.
|
---

Friend -- the team here at All On The Line wanted to send you a primer on _Harper v. Hall_ , the redistricting case in front of the NC Supreme Court this week.
Our team has been in the weeds on this case for a while now -- our affiliate organization, the National Redistricting Foundation, is supporting the voters who originally brought the successful anti-gerrymandering challenge and are now protecting North Carolina voters’ right to a fair congressional map.
[**Extreme North Carolina Republicans are attempting to replace fair maps with gerrymandered ones even as the state supreme court ruled just three months ago on the unconstitutional maps.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/60140435/396131393/-1533261029?refcode=20230313_AOTL_F_BeforeTues_RedLite&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjQyMDJjZjAyLWUyYzEtZWQxMS1hOGUwLTAwMjI0ODMyZTgxMSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=oaqmomTiArW4G7n8yeLfe283fRu6e0PWYtTC4GkaHOg=)
[Support our fight to end gerrymandering](https://click.everyaction.com/k/60140436/396131395/-1533261029?refcode=20230313_AOTL_F_BeforeTues_RedLite&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjQyMDJjZjAyLWUyYzEtZWQxMS1hOGUwLTAwMjI0ODMyZTgxMSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=oaqmomTiArW4G7n8yeLfe283fRu6e0PWYtTC4GkaHOg=)
---
* * *
On March 14, the North Carolina Supreme Court will be rehearing significant portions of the landmark case,_Harper v. Hall_ , that has made the maps in the North Carolina fair. If the court overturns recent precedent and allows the General Assembly to gerrymander with impunity, they will completely undermine the ability of voters of both parties to have an equal opportunity to elect their preferred candidates.
**Neither the law nor the facts have changed. But the decision could impact communities of interest across North Carolina and undo landmark legal precedent.**
---
North Carolina’s extreme Republicans believe that a change in judicial officers grants them permission to simply request a change in how the state’s laws are interpreted. [**Help All On The Line push back against anti-democratic attempts like the one in North Carolina and rush a donation of $23, $35, or more today.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/60140437/396131396/-1533261029?refcode=20230313_AOTL_F_BeforeTues_RedLite&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjQyMDJjZjAyLWUyYzEtZWQxMS1hOGUwLTAwMjI0ODMyZTgxMSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=oaqmomTiArW4G7n8yeLfe283fRu6e0PWYtTC4GkaHOg=)

[DONATE $250](https://click.everyaction.com/k/60140442/396131403/-1533261029?express_lane=true&amount=250&refcode=20230313_AOTL_F_BeforeTues_RedLite&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjQyMDJjZjAyLWUyYzEtZWQxMS1hOGUwLTAwMjI0ODMyZTgxMSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=oaqmomTiArW4G7n8yeLfe283fRu6e0PWYtTC4GkaHOg=) | [Another Amount](https://click.everyaction.com/k/60140443/396131404/-1533261029?refcode=20230313_AOTL_F_BeforeTues_RedLite&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjQyMDJjZjAyLWUyYzEtZWQxMS1hOGUwLTAwMjI0ODMyZTgxMSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=oaqmomTiArW4G7n8yeLfe283fRu6e0PWYtTC4GkaHOg=)
**Voters in North Carolina deserve fair representation, and they were promised that when the NC Supreme Court struck down the state’s gerrymandered maps twice last year. The court should keep that promise.**
[**If you agree, support our fight to protect voters in North Carolina and across the country today.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/60140444/396131405/-1533261029?refcode=20230313_AOTL_F_BeforeTues_RedLite&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjQyMDJjZjAyLWUyYzEtZWQxMS1hOGUwLTAwMjI0ODMyZTgxMSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=oaqmomTiArW4G7n8yeLfe283fRu6e0PWYtTC4GkaHOg=)
Our team will keep you updated as things unfold.
\-- Olivia Mendoza

| Major General Scott G. West, U.S. Army (retired)

| Dear Friend,
I am honored to receive the endorsement of Major General Scott G. West, 34 years U.S. Army (retired), of Appomattox County in Virginia Senate District 10. General West spent time in the 82nd Airborne Division, and served in Alaska, Germany, Iraq, and Afghanistan. He continues service to others by helping veterans and is a member of American Legion Post 104 and Veterans of Foreign Wars Post 9855.
---
| | |
---|---
|
"I am proud to endorse Delegate John McGuire for Virginia State Senate District 10. As Father, Navy SEAL, and business owner, John is the strong leader we need in the General Assembly. John is pro-life, pro-2A, and has a solid conservative voting record. Please join me in my support of John and bring your family and friends to serve as a delegate for him at the Convention May 6 at Buckingham County High School.

-Major General Scott G. West US Army (retired)

Paid for and Authorized by Friends of John McGuire

name: Kash Patel
subject: What else are they lying about?
body:
I know they don’t want us to find any evidence that the FBI was provoking the protesters into rioting. We need to make sure all FBI involvement in Jan. 6 is released to the public.

Friend,

The government and fake news media are lying to you!

They called the January 6th protest a _“deadly insurrection,”_ but the video evidence doesn’t back it up.

A small number of people broke windows and attacked police officers, and they should be prosecuted. The majority of the protestors were peaceful.

We need to help those January 6th defendants stand up against the Deep State.

**I’m launching the _Kash Foundation_ to offer legal help to America First defendants like the ones from the January 6th witch hunts.** I led the Russiagate investigation for the House Committee and uncovered that the FBI was actively trying to sabotage President Trump. As the former head of counterterrorism and former senior aide to President Trump, I will do everything in my power to help out.

Team, it’s only been a few months, but we’ve already had enough of Speaker Kevin McCarthy’s chaotic leadership.

❌ The House has passed not one, but TWO anti-abortion bills that would restrict reproductive freedom nationwide.

❌ QAnoner Marjorie Taylor Greene holds more influence than ever before, and even serves on the Homeland Security Committee (yes, really).

❌ George Santos continues to make a mockery of our Congress.

...the list goes on.

**But we have good news: The NDRC’s fair maps movement could be key to helping Hakeem Jeffries become the next House speaker![_Will you donate now to support our work?_](https://click.everyaction.com/k/60124257/396099007/-1795600110?amount=30&refcode=EM_RTI_20230313_FR_3G_redlight922_527&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjNmNjE5NDk1LWMyYzEtZWQxMS1hOGUwLTAwMjI0ODMyZTgxMSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=wvqYz7UqBmhkjlK4AoFqloK98HvC8orWWARbA9LqYO0=)**

**Contrary to popular belief, the fight over redistricting is far from over – _in fact, up to 19 districts could shift by the next election._** Since the _Cook Political Report_ is calling the race for House control a toss-up, it’s no exaggeration to say that fair maps could be a deciding factor between Speaker Kevin McCarthy and Speaker Hakeem Jeffries.

In the coming months, we fully expect MAGA Republicans to use every anti-democratic tactic they can think of – from gerrymandering to voter suppression – to tip the scales in their favor. **But remember what Attorney General Eric Holder has said, “Wherever Democrats can fairly compete, they can win.”**
[**_By supporting the NDRC’s ongoing work, you can help ensure Democrats have a fair shot at taking back the House, making Hakeem Jeffries the next speaker, and passing fair maps at the state level too. Will you pitch in now to join the fight?_**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/60124264/396099014/-1795600110?amount=30&refcode=EM_RTI_20230313_FR_3G_redlight922_527&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjNmNjE5NDk1LWMyYzEtZWQxMS1hOGUwLTAwMjI0ODMyZTgxMSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=wvqYz7UqBmhkjlK4AoFqloK98HvC8orWWARbA9LqYO0=)

clean_body: here’s how it can happen | | = Team, it’s only been a few months, but we’ve already had enough of Speaker Kevin McCarthy’s chaotic leadership. ❌ The House has passed not one, but TWO anti-abortion bills that would restrict reproductive freedom nationwide. ❌ QAnoner Marjorie Taylor Greene holds more influence than ever before, and even serves on the Homeland Security Committee (yes, really). ❌ George Santos continues to make a mockery of our Congress. ...the list goes on. But we have good news: The NDRC’s fair maps movement could be key to helping Hakeem Jeffries become the next House speaker If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = | = = | = = | = Contrary to popular belief, the fight over redistricting is far from over – in fact, up to 19 districts could shift by the next election. Since the Cook Political Report is calling the race for House control a toss-up, it’s no exaggeration to say that fair maps could be a deciding factor between Speaker Kevin McCarthy and Speaker Hakeem Jeffries. In the coming months, we fully expect MAGA Republicans to use every anti-democratic tactic they can think of – from gerrymandering to voter suppression – to tip the scales in their favor. But remember what Attorney General Eric Holder has said, “Wherever Democrats can fairly compete, they can win.” = – The NDRC Team = = Since 2017, the NDRC has executed a comprehensive redistricting strategy that shifts the redistricting power, creating fair districts where Democrats can compete. Our victories have been made possible by our strong community of grassroots supporters. = If you want to receive periodic updates from the NDRC on our fight for fair maps, text MAPS to 36787. Text HELP for help, STOP to end. Msg & Data rates may apply. We know we send a lot of emails, but we think it's important to keep you updated with the latest information on Republican gerrymandering and voter suppression and how we're fighting back -- regardless of whether you choose to donate. = to make a donation. Every dollar you give will go toward our fight to end gerrymandering and voter suppression. | | Paid for by the National Democratic Redistricting Committee, Kelly Burton, President. | | | | | ---|---|---|---|--- National Democratic Redistricting Committee 1015 18th Street NW, Suite 1000 Washington, DC 20036 United States if you'd like to receive fewer emails from the NDRC.

name: Mark Warner
subject: Save lives, ban assault weapons now.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Mark Warner
body:
Enough is enough

|
---

[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60124396/396099651/1995090618?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhN2IwNjM0Ny1jM2MxLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Vy2LYPKuTrAiup_FZt69s_MTuL3hr8mxc-Mu4cZvxn0=&emci=cd0efd51-cdbe-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=a7b06347-c3c1-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=4568237)

| | Derek, Too many communities around our country have been torn apart by relentless gun violence. And Congress, in what has become a sad pattern of dysfunction, has failed to adequately respond. The best way to honor the lives we’ve lost to gun violence is with action. We need to pass comprehensive gun violence solutions, and I’m ready to get it done. During the State of the Union, President Biden called for an assault weapons ban. I know this is a crucial step in addressing the gun violence epidemic in our nation. That’s why my Senate colleagues and I introduced legislation – _The Assault Weapons Ban of 2023_ – that would ban the sale, transfer, manufacture, and import of military-style assault weapons and high-capacity magazines. I refuse to accept deadly mass shootings as the new normal. It’s past time to demand that Congress take action and pass _The Assault Weapons Ban of 2023_. **[_Add your name to join me in calling on Congress to pass our assault weapons ban and take a critical step forward in our fight to make our communities safer._](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60124397/396099652/-776936227?refcode=mw_em_230313_1&ms=mw_em_230313_1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=Manassas&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhN2IwNjM0Ny1jM2MxLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Vy2LYPKuTrAiup_FZt69s_MTuL3hr8mxc-Mu4cZvxn0=&emci=cd0efd51-cdbe-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=a7b06347-c3c1-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=4568237)** Last year, we passed a historic gun reform bill – the _Bipartisan Safer Communities Act_. It was an excellent start to tackling the gun violence epidemic, and one that proved that progress is possible, but it’s not the end of the road. We need to keep passing more legislation to address this crisis, and frankly, that means an assault weapons ban. Gun violence is the leading cause of death for American kids. Not illness, not car accidents – guns. Our children and our communities deserve to be safe from gun violence, and Congress must step up to get these guns off our streets. **[_Sign on now to tell Congress to pass _The Assault Weapons Ban of 2023_. _](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60124398/396099653/-776936227?refcode=mw_em_230313_1&ms=mw_em_230313_1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=Manassas&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhN2IwNjM0Ny1jM2MxLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Vy2LYPKuTrAiup_FZt69s_MTuL3hr8mxc-Mu4cZvxn0=&emci=cd0efd51-cdbe-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=a7b06347-c3c1-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=4568237)** Thanks, Mark Warner ** ** ****[ADD YOUR NAME](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60124399/396099654/-776936227?refcode=mw_em_230313_1&ms=mw_em_230313_1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=Manassas&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhN2IwNjM0Ny1jM2MxLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Vy2LYPKuTrAiup_FZt69s_MTuL3hr8mxc-Mu4cZvxn0=&emci=cd0efd51-cdbe-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=a7b06347-c3c1-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=4568237)****

* * *

**Kevin McCarthy and Tucker Carlson's Dangerous Alliance**
A few weeks ago, _Axios_ revealed that House Speaker Kevin McCarthy granted Fox News host Tucker Carlson and his producers exclusive and unfettered access to 41,000 hours of internal security footage from the Capitol on January 6th, 2021.
**It was an absolutely shocking and horrifying development. Last week, Tucker Carlson began to cherry-pick this footage in an effort to convince his Fox News viewers that the January 6th insurrection was merely a “peaceful protest.”**
In “support” of his claim, he aired carefully selected, brief snippets of footage showing insurrectionists who — after violently and illegally entering the Capitol — were walking around the Capitol. Of course, the fact that there were some moments without violence does not negate the many instances of horrific violence that left 150 officers injured.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60124510/396099938/160930933?refcode=AU_DSG_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20230313_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDA4NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyZjdkYjFmNi1jM2MxLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XXB_WFaSMWabnb-ST-gQOngAF5X0NfNj-NnqNaa4oGQ=)
Kevin McCarthy claims that he released the footage so that “each person can come up with their own conclusion” about the January 6th insurrection. But perhaps he should remind himself [about what he said in the days following the attack](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60124511/396099939/615585843?refcode=AU_DSG_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20230313_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDA4NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyZjdkYjFmNi1jM2MxLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XXB_WFaSMWabnb-ST-gQOngAF5X0NfNj-NnqNaa4oGQ=&emci=fd910170-bac1-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=2f7db1f6-c3c1-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=13556823), when he detailed how “un-American” rioters “scaled walls,” “brought ropes,” and “overtook the place.”
We’re all familiar with what the MAGA base is capable of. And it’s for that reason that the most concerning element of this story is the security risks that come with right-wing zealots having access to this footage.
The January 6th Committee went to extraordinary lengths to ensure that the footage they showed the American people didn’t compromise any sensitive information, such as methods that insurrectionists used to access the Capitol and how members of Congress escaped. Access to the footage was highly guarded.
Kevin McCarthy, the leader of the insurrection-denying, hard-right Republican Party, has turned over the security of the Capitol to January 6-denier Tucker Carlson. They are together a grave threat to our democracy.

* * *

Peter, I know that these stories are deeply frightening, and my leadership holding the MAGA Republican Party accountable is all the more important as they become more desperate to rewrite history. But my work in Washington has already led to Fox News attacks on my family and me, and I expect that to continue.
I want you to know that I am even more committed to defending our democracy from extreme Republicans, and I am grateful to all of you for standing by my side.
**[Every contribution made by folks like you toward my campaign helps us shore up the resources we need to continue fighting for our democracy and our values in Congress. I’d be honored to have your support today.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60124512/396099940/160930933?refcode=AU_DSG_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20230313_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDA4NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyZjdkYjFmNi1jM2MxLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XXB_WFaSMWabnb-ST-gQOngAF5X0NfNj-NnqNaa4oGQ=)**
