Peter, I know that these stories are deeply frightening, and my leadership holding the MAGA Republican Party accountable is all the more important as they become more desperate to rewrite history. But my work in Washington has already led to Fox News attacks on my family and me, and I expect that to continue. I want you to know that I am even more committed to defending our democracy from extreme Republicans, and I am grateful to all of you for standing by my side. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = = | = = | = = Thank you, Dan Dan Goldman for New York PO BOX 3306 New York, NY 10008 United States | mailto:info@dangoldmanforny.com | Paid for by Dan Goldman for New York

name: Giffords PAC
subject: An important request for you

body:
Our first quarterly fundraising deadline of the year is approaching quickly
#

Hi there, we’re reaching out today with an important request.
At the end of this month, we’ll be facing our first quarterly fundraising deadline of the year, and we’re hoping we can count on your support.
If you already know you want to contribute to help us reach our goals, you can use the link below:
[**https://go.giffords.org/go/March-Goal**](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-mar23.q3bw9s&refcode=em230313-1-15&t=1&akid=4396%2E3935704%2EAekv52)
We know we ask a lot of you, but the truth is, we wouldn’t ask if it weren’t so important.
The only way we can stand up to the gun lobby is if we have a strong showing during our crucial fundraising deadlines. Although the gun lobby has seen a decrease in membership, they still have **_millions**_ of dollars that they use to push their radical, guns everywhere agenda.
We need supporters like you who are ready to fight for communities free from gun violence to step up today. Can we count on you?
[**Please, join the thousands of others who have made an online contribution to Giffords PAC by chipping in $3 today.**](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-mar23.q3bw9s&refcode=em230313-1-15&t=3&akid=4396%2E3935704%2EAekv52)
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:_

****
Thank you so much. We always appreciate your support, and it’s especially helpful to us ahead of our crucial quarterly fundraising deadlines.
Sincerely,
The team at Giffords

Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. www.Giffords.org

Giffords PAC was started to support elected officials who step up to fight the gun violence epidemic. Thank you for standing with Gabby and the Giffords team.

50 years ago, my mother escaped Cuba and Fidel Castro’s socialist regime with just the clothes on her back. By the grace of God, she overcame unimaginable odds to become an American. Because of her courage, I went to school, became a prosecutor, served in the Virginia House of Delegates, and made history by becoming Virginia’s first Latino-American Attorney General. **Now, the radical socialist ideas my mother escaped in Cuba are uprooting our laws and freedoms, but I will never stop fighting to protect the American Dream.**
---
[**FIGHT FOR THE AMERICAN DREAM**](http://links.jasonforvirginia.com/u/click?_t=b7c680598d5648c3aaffcf8cea32abf4&_m=2b0f1cbc80b74d58853932801d84d88c&_e=SsNDVoGwk11CztqpFDgRnA2i4qzKZLOdlAQkmHp5VH1zU_7fH5Vwf8Fhu0MBPzjUH5ud2_Xtro56Vj00D1jry7HXNSaYwH3s8MZ9NRXGwWYmGnBHji4fYK3HY88E8MYslFZIOmiAzakBH7oHFV9Q1hcORLa5ykzZyasck8E9xNu9o4t4d87XuxBtzl9My0_AV9xukDRxk9TYtHE77iVEYwgT8I3YLRKQ7VNSX3tqjGT4a-NGllfwH2-WJBiC998k5xTokbFuHPnKJbagkb29lcm60raQXu-Txn4hFzmvGIsTAZmAMG-DM3lmPgt6eETryQvKts6OPe6xP1g3mFpPqDiSTkFNEVbeRMr3xj2vQ75GRpx7Dc1FG4wa8QgtzlWq)

Friend it's more important than ever that we rein in the scale of our federal government. The Left has shown us just how easy it can be to turn our justice system against us, which is why Kat used her time at CPAC to highlight the injustices coming out of the DOJ.
It's more important than ever that we hold Biden accountable for weaponizing the federal government. He's used his agenda to crack down on dissent, and Kat refuses to stand by as he attacks everyday Americans for sharing their opinions!
While Kat continues to fight back against his power-grabbing policies, [she's counting on you to support her in this fight!](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0016vIodMHoW4kTdu24FsxUidyiRfWKSSEiR5SH3vY1rhWfgN2FD28h6jlV2RIwBBOgss0sF_hjIXf8pmXhuLMXPERMYNGTu0wSqn9SVPysU1KjoALWeCK5dVMJJCpeiSrKOq7wEiRBCdk-7x24cW9WchE8jZDYVChJir8Alq4HtVSrap4InywG49CerRxzOJRebJoPZ3_kYuc=&c=32dYqHFaWcLQrjSPnOE_fsMtcBLKtO59iZLZA-nLxeE4AYAe-gb-zA==&ch=2AYal8V9W-EAy9V4qFLMDnvUN6OMSHY_U_0S9af3mlhOBhH6PJ_JlA==)

name: Bill Pascrell
subject: Republicans are lying. They want to strip Social Security and Medicare.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pascrell for Congress, Inc
body:
Their proposals are dangerous. | | | Hi team, Republicans feigned outrage at the State of the Union when President Biden accused them of conspiring to gut Social Security and Medicare ... but that's exactly what they say they want to do. **_I won't let them, though._** For years, Republicans have wanted to cut vital programs like Social Security and Medicare. Now, McCarthy is literally holding the debt ceiling hostage to try to gut these programs, which millions of Americans rely on to make ends meet each month. Why? Because many Republicans wrongly consider these programs an entitlement. In reality, we've all chipped into these programs through taxes and we cannot pull the rug out from elderly Americans on fixed incomes. **This is why our majority matters, team. This won't even be up for discussion if we retake our House majority, which Republicans are holding onto by a thread.** If we defeat them at the ballot box, we can defeat their dangerous agenda to cut and destroy programs like Social Security and Medicare. [**_That's why I'm asking you to split a contribution to my campaign and the DCCC, the organization responsible for winning back our majority._** [**_I’m about to ask you for $15. But first, let me explain why donations from our Team Pelosi Members are so important to me personally. name: Rand Paul
subject: Taking the fight to corrupt teachers unions
body:
Socialists are teaching your children to hate America.

[](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=48e9c283c89047e9afa9de12ad82fea3&_e=Lf3hGrdCQZGmNscm5yvXb1gSOTqfWYwJQXSUFHmXzzjT-mId35ous7QxbvaxzT2mM2cgWBsrbzxnf-oBv0lDrpIE25lydaS_u8vBK77NfxRn_7hiKt6WX9mpBYhsv6G_JOaxC4QXdMNZjqQGs2P7i3tZZRN8o6lUOZYskSQjrrw7DHaHt7EM8vls74sJmOPXd4oZ5NPFeRnZKNu06jUqcF25OKXlvxY9k3aM9b0JrBT4sQjJ2laTwBhgsW9AJj4vMjDEyazWLsjMjY-8SIyv3jemNIC6at1Inu2kFKOWQ8Y%3D)
Friend,

Socialists are teaching your children to hate America.

They have taken over classrooms and indoctrinated hundreds of thousands of students with Critical Race Theory. They would rather focus lessons on pronouns and gender identity than teach trade skills, science, or basic math.

_It's no wonder our kids have developed the highest levels of anxiety and depression in the world._

I'd like to introduce you to an organization that is leading the fight to take back our school boards from the radical Left and protect our children, **Parents Union of America (PUOA).**

I just talked with Jessi Melton, President of PUOA, and told her that I would reach out to my supporters and help raise $15,000 this week to fund their efforts.

[_**Friend, can I count on you to share my support for PUOA? Click here to donate $10, $25, $50, or any amount today >>>**_](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=48e9c283c89047e9afa9de12ad82fea3&_e=Lf3hGrdCQZGmNscm5yvXb1gSOTqfWYwJQXSUFHmXzzjT-mId35ous7QxbvaxzT2mM2cgWBsrbzxnf-oBv0lDrpIE25lydaS_u8vBK77NfxRn_7hiKt6WX9mpBYhsv6G_JOaxC4QXdMNZjqQGs2P7i5t2Sxes6JhijsAMgWH1PwrDYSgh3fIkySOP5hjOpTPX7iko9EpmVBNwWPrHBGKiy8LPTQ32KPM_oiBJfsrdUNxaeWXyD-oISL83CinPok8kU2ygKXGzJkjh9IlECwpg2sPCG7OMEqmWwImS325jAjk%3D)

I want to share a message from PUOA:

_**" We stand as a counter-offensive **__**against the powerful, agenda-driven Teachers' Union**_ _**, which has systematically sought to destroy wholesome American values and indoctrinate our children."**_

_Parents Union of America is the ANTI teachers-union_.

Their mission is to target the most populous school districts and remove the incompetent school board members put in place by the Anti-American, corrupt Teachers' Union.

**I, for one, am sick and tired of socialists indoctrinating our children. And the corrupt Teacher Unions are to blame.**

We can't allow the same people who turn a blind eye to inappropriate textbook material and socialist indoctrination to remain in charge of American schools.

clean_body: Socialists are teaching your children to hate America. Friend, Socialists are teaching your children to hate America. They have taken over classrooms and indoctrinated hundreds of thousands of students with Critical Race Theory. They would rather focus lessons on pronouns and gender identity than teach trade skills, science, or basic math. It's no wonder our kids have developed the highest levels of anxiety and depression in the world. I'd like to introduce you to an organization that is leading the fight to take back our school boards from the radical Left and protect our children, Parents Union of America (PUOA). I just talked with Jessi Melton, President of PUOA, and told her that I would reach out to my supporters and help raise $15,000 this week to fund their efforts. I want to share a message from PUOA: " We stand as a counter-offensive against the powerful, agenda-driven Teachers' Union , which has systematically sought to destroy wholesome American values and indoctrinate our children." Parents Union of America is the ANTI teachers-union. Their mission is to target the most populous school districts and remove the incompetent school board members put in place by the Anti-American, corrupt Teachers' Union. I, for one, am sick and tired of socialists indoctrinating our children. And the corrupt Teacher Unions are to blame. We can't allow the same people who turn a blind eye to inappropriate textbook material and socialist indoctrination to remain in charge of American schools. PUOA does more than fight to remove corrupt school board members. They work to fill school boards with America-First candidates and parents. ## **UPDATE: An outside spending group supporting Andy's opponent just spent $930k on TV and radio ads**
Peter,

name: Whip Jazz Lewis
subject: Jazz with Jazz: March Newsletter
body:
Team,

It might still be chilly outside, but work in Annapolis is heating up. We are excited for a few big wins already this session with the House passage of a few of our bills including the Hear Our Voices Act, expanding Title IX notice in primary and secondary education, and HB 65 a bill that will allow library workers statewide to collectively bargain.

With nearly a month left in this legislative session, we are hard at work moving our legislative priorities through the House before the March 20 crossover deadline.

As we sprint towards the end of the session, we are so thankful for your guidance, support, and voice on our team.

In solidarity,

Jazz

Advocating for Team Maryland for the FBI Headquarters

Last week our Maryland elected officials made their case to relocate the FBI Headquarters to Prince George’s County. For nearly a decade, the Government Services Administration (GSA) has been searching for a new site for the agency since it has outgrown their aging Washington, DC headquarters.

After years of delays, GSA has narrowed their search to two locations in Prince George’s County, Greenbelt and Landover, and Springville, VA. I am proud to stand with my colleagues on the state and federal levels to support efforts to relocate the FBI to our community.

Living just a mile from the proposed Landover site, if GSA selects this site it would be a critical keystone in revitalizing the Blue Line corridor creating job opportunities throughout our community’s economy.

Women's History Month

As we celebrate Women’s History Month, we recognize not only our history and incredible women that changed our country but also ensure that we continue our progress to ensure equal pay, access to health care, and paid time off.

With the US Supreme Court overturning Roe vs. Wade last year, there is little more critical than protecting a woman’s right to abortion and reproductive health care.

This week the House moved forward a proposal that would enshrine the right to abortion and other reproductive health care in the Maryland Constitution. While this is a big step forward for reproductive health care, this legislation still has a few hurdles to jump including a vote in the Senate and then approval by both chambers with a super majority before heading to the ballot in the 2024 election cycle giving the people an opportunity to vote on the amendment.

As a proven progressive leader and champion of issues ranging from criminal justice reform to healthcare access and economic equity, Jazz has represented the 24th Legislative District in Maryland’s House of Delegates since 2017. He also serves as Chair of the Maryland House Democratic Caucus. A lifelong Prince Georgian, Jazz lives in Glenarden with his wife and son.

by authority Friends of Jazz Lewis, Chris Taitt, Treasurer
Friends of Jazz Lewis - State Account
P.O. Box 341854
Bethesda, MD 20827
United States
If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/hz01xPWa8U6TZN4BL8L0dg2?unsubscribedata=szVPkO%2FJ8EY%2FXaGfIc683bUjHZEqstKPnodOioO9JcqezCDkvVf0kQn%2FfWvF81OdMS5n0Ijl00dTmvb92atR%2FnGzL%2BxjMSgXdd5GvX5sUcrLmbRgqRq9eR7SiQiOFyFh0IGg3RFutQPVzHhdG4oBDTtM%2FpZtzBalcwz2Kl94yw1hOhHUZQriJe3LU7SrCMeGlXA50K5RUhYS%2BjhxCRVDTJGRj2%2FHwHwB9KI8dLK8gg669pTB9FXGwjWFKvpwBXjmDIPg6rOzTq7y5Q28u0dpqp9Eb%2BNgNch2O7q5mdoYFi2SKGnWEiY1AhQEKyWKrWTYCR5wg%2BLLy3NGeMaRZDaCpkZ765foAiTa26GgVT1WmUB%2FhhGAMktReF46pNQCe1l1ephi5pOtzDM0WX4l8qKZ0XRXASZfJLqabAo%2FCAzUrHBewTlJjZRccI%2FN8d%2BaOdOQ .

I am proud to stand with my colleagues on the state and federal levels to support efforts to relocate the FBI to our community. Living just a mile from the proposed Landover site, if GSA selects this site it would be a critical keystone in revitalizing the Blue Line corridor creating job opportunities throughout our community’s economy. Women's History Month As we celebrate Women’s History Month, we recognize not only our history and incredible women that changed our country but also ensure that we continue our progress to ensure equal pay, access to health care, and paid time off. With the US Supreme Court overturning Roe vs. Wade last year, there is little more critical than protecting a woman’s right to abortion and reproductive health care. This week the House moved forward a proposal that would enshrine the right to abortion and other reproductive health care in the Maryland Constitution. While this is a big step forward for reproductive health care, this legislation still has a few hurdles to jump including a vote in the Senate and then approval by both chambers with a super majority before heading to the ballot in the 2024 election cycle giving the people an opportunity to vote on the amendment. As a proven progressive leader and champion of issues ranging from criminal justice reform to healthcare access and economic equity, Jazz has represented the 24th Legislative District in Maryland’s House of Delegates since 2017. He also serves as Chair of the Maryland House Democratic Caucus. A lifelong Prince Georgian, Jazz lives in Glenarden with his wife and son. by authority Friends of Jazz Lewis, Chris Taitt, Treasurer Friends of Jazz Lewis - State Account P.O. Box 341854 Bethesda, MD 20827 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: .

| | Peter, Matt Gaetz here - I just stepped off the stage at [CPAC](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62429697:JhfVZfGNF:m:1:3365131770:B859E755D161040CEAC7B95225D11F45:r) and wanted to relay my message to our entire movement.

Unlike many in the Swamp, _**I am not a human vessel for lobbyist cash.**_ I am a vindicated Florida Man who will NEVER be afraid to stand up to the D.C. Cartel on the American people's behalf!

That's precisely what I did during the Speaker vote along with 20 brave America-First Patriots. **The concessions we earned broke the Washington status quo to make sure horrible omnibus legislation, bloated bureaucrat salaries like Dr. Fauci 's, and other Swamp nightmares NEVER happen ever again in this country!**

name: Cliff Schecter, Blue Amp Action
subject: The conservative candidate for the highest court in Wisconsin, opposes abortion care and fair election laws. He could set precedents that may go to the Supreme Court, or determine a presidential election. We have until the election in April to help Judge Protasiewicz win this election, and be a voice of reason on the bench.
body:
Urgent State Supreme Court race
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | | _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/Ta9714792-2a03-4b83-b0db-d40c0a590f15/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

|

| |
---
| | | | | Peter, **_Internal polling by l_**** _iberal Judge Janet Protasiewicz shows she's leading dangerous Trump supporter, Dan Kelly, to determine whether the Wisconsin Supreme Court will make abortion illegal in all cases for millions of women, and will have a chance to steal the state's electoral votes for Trump or another Republican in 2024's presidential election._** **_Meanwhile, a flood of dark money is paying for ads against Judge Protasiewicz, and we need to help her at a time when most voters aren’t going to be watching a state election like this._** [**_Will you join us in giving $5, $10, $25 or whatever you can to ensure we win the seat and prevent a Kelly disaster for our democracy?_**](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tdb72633b-d33a-4d9a-930e-8de5cbc20d7c/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) _We can't get overconfident. _**_To remind you what's at stake, we remind you of the biography of MAGA Republican, Trump pal and scary lunatic, Kelly:_** [](https://default.salsalabs.org/T9eef3ec0-e39e-4a20-888d-63eb16ce23b1/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) **_Abortion illegal in all cases. Gay Marriage gone. Social Security & Medicaid eliminated. Presidential electoral votes stolen from Joe Biden and handed to Trump. With national and WI Supreme Courts hijacked by these nuts, this is a frighteningly realistic future. _** **_But, we can put a stop to a big part of their sick plan RIGHT NOW._**
---
|
---
| | | | | | [**DONATE NOW**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T7fdfbb34-3f74-4bc1-b8b6-346648134e05/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| **_Protasiewicz is ahead in this race right now. But GOP SuperPACs, Kochs & corporations are dumping in millions, and if they bomb WI with enough dirty money, it'll be nearly impossible for Protasiewicz to effectively respond._** [**_We ABSOLUTELY must make sure she can._** **_So will you join us in giving $5, $10, $25 or whatever you can to ensure we win the seat and prevent a Kelly disaster for our democracy?_**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T434b17f9-cf2e-417a-8f92-3a8116499975/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) _Thank you,_ Cliff

| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T7c8ac810-3eb2-4066-991d-6b06ac4fbc71/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

Peter, We are rounding the corner and headed towards spring in Indiana. Spring is a fresh start. It’s a chance for rebirth and opportunity. And at the Indiana Democratic Party, we’re working to make the most of this spring and set ourselves up for future success. But we can’t do that unless we have your support. [**Help us start the season off right by making a donation to the Indiana Democratic Party and help us invest in electing the right candidates to represent our local communities this year.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60132789/396110130/1643342139?refcode=230313-FR&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhODdlYzNjNC1jY2MxLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=uqkeyAdzEDFXoS0UWwr9RrfKF5qeLZBVrn2MT6jWgK4=) We want to elect local leaders who care about protecting your family and your future. SCHOOL BOARD RACE SPECIAL EDITION

Last night, our Editor-in-Chief Mark Vargas interviewed several more school board candidates on "Mark My Words" on AM 560 The Answer. It was a packed studio!

These are shaping up to be some of the most important races, and no one else is covering them!

Watch these highlights and learn more about these candidates, who are investing more than just their time, talent, and treasure - they are being attacked by the radical left that is being funded by Gov. Pritzker!

name: Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
subject: Our "radical" platform
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
body:
We sure do get a lot of free promotion from Fox.
# [](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/143?refcode=em20230313-3998-header&t=1&akid=3998%2E2526796%2Etrhjt5)
From day one of our campaign, Fox News has made it their mission to tear down our agenda — but in the process, we sure do get a lot of free promotion!
[](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20230313.xJdiZW&refcode=em20230313-3998-P_FND_EOQ_OPP&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=3998%2E2526796%2Etrhjt5)
These policies — from taxing the rich, a Green New Deal, banning assault rifles, etc. — would _finally_ address some of the systemic problems we face from gun violence to the climate crisis.

name: Rosen, Jacky
subject: re: Walgreens (unacceptable)
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rosen for Nevada
body:
| | |
---
Friend – it's Jacky Rosen. **I just sent a letter to the Walgreens CEO condemning the company's decision to stop selling mifepristone –** **an FDA-approved medication used for abortion and treating miscarriages. Here's why:**
Medication abortion is the most common abortion method in our country. It's safe. It's effective. And it's been widely used for the past 20 years.
And yet, _Walgreens made the decision to not sell mifepristone_ , which will affect access to reproductive care across the country. It's an outrageous decision based entirely on pressure from anti-choice politicians – not science.
**That's why I put together a rapid-response petition to send a loud and clear message that the majority of Americans won't stand for the GOP's draconian attacks on our reproductive freedom. I'm looking for 10,000 people to add their voices with mine before midnight, but your signature is missing, friend.**
**[_Please, will you add your name right now to my rapid-response petition to stand up to the GOP's attacks on abortion access? There is simply too much at stake to stay silent in this fight._](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60142968/396140683/-117416970?email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100&code=jtk2431-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkYmYyNGJlMi1lZGMxLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0uOpl0-XEOlfT26DgqrTPNv9hFXZbItf9FRcHrMI4JE=&emci=dd24b0b5-cfc1-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=dbf24be2-edc1-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=3800590)**

name: Elizabeth Warren
subject: I wish I had been wrong
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warren Democrats
body:
I warned that deregulating banks would have dangerous consequences. | | | [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60143113/396141487/-1964596891?ms=em-header&refcode=EMZ12D_OPE_E_20230313_V1S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDgvMS84NzkzMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ZjllZjcxNi1lZmMxLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=E7IPazS1x_NqJ7vTIxHdLyyBxoXKNW6QB5BCzHcon-I=&emci=72d298aa-e2c1-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=4f9ef716-efc1-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=9027908)
---
I wish I’d been wrong. Five years ago, I warned that deregulating banks would have dangerous consequences. And in the past few days, we’ve seen those consequences of a deregulated system unfold with the failures of Silicon Valley Bank and Signature Bank. In other words the banks are reaping what they sowed. Let’s back up a little, and talk about how we got here: After Wall Street crashed our economy and destroyed millions of livelihoods in the 2008 financial crisis, Congress passed the Dodd-Frank Act to strengthen protections for consumers and make sure that history wouldn’t repeat itself. Wall Street executives and their lobbyists weren’t happy with it (no surprise), and they’ve been trying to chip away at it ever since. In 2018, high-powered bank executives were calling on Congress to weaken Dodd-Frank so their banks could slip out of those stronger oversight rules. One of those executives? Greg Becker. The CEO of Silicon Valley Bank (SVB). I raised the alarm and fought hard against these changes, but the banks won that battle. Donald Trump signed a bill into law that rolled back key parts of Dodd-Frank. Regulators, including Fed Chair Jerome Powell, took the situation from bad to worse by letting financial institutions load up on more and more risk with less and less oversight. The collapses of SVB and Signature Bank are direct results of a toxic mix of risky management and weak supervision.
* SVB relied on a concentrated group of tech companies with big deposits. With such high concentration in a single sector of the economy, any weakness in that sector could undermine the bank’s stability.
* Instead of managing that risk, SVB funneled their clients’ deposits into long-term bonds, making it hard for the bank to respond quickly to changing circumstances. This model was great for short-term profits, which shot up by nearly 40 percent over the last three years — but now we know its cost.
* When things were looking especially bad last week, more of SVB's customers withdrew their deposits — causing a mad dash and, ultimately, a collapse that left many businesses alarmed that they wouldn’t be able to pay their bills and employees (but as the collapse unfolded, SVB executives rushed to pay out congratulatory bonuses).

If Congress and the Federal Reserve hadn’t rolled back parts of Dodd-Frank, these banks would have been subject to stronger requirements to withstand financial shocks. And they would have been required to conduct regular stress tests to expose their vulnerabilities. But here we are. And last night, regulators announced that all vaporized deposits would be repaid in full. Even for billion-dollar companies, crypto investors, and the very venture capital firms that triggered the SVB bank run in the first place. (I can’t help but point out that it’s no wonder the American people are skeptical of a system that holds millions of struggling student loan borrowers in limbo but steps in overnight to ensure that billion-dollar crypto firms won’t lose a dime in deposits.) Washington must act quickly to prevent another crisis. Here’s what I’m calling for:
1. ******Reverse the dangerous bank deregulation of the Trump era.**** **Congress must repeal the 2018 law right away. And bank regulators must ensure stronger oversight, taking a careful look under the hood at our financial institutions to see where other dangers might be lurking.
2. ******Reform deposit insurance.**** **Large companies with billions in unsecured deposits should never again expect, or receive, free support from the government. Regulators should act so businesses affected by bank failures like these are fully covered when they’re trying to make payroll and do other ordinary financial transactions. And the financial institutions that pose the greatest risk should pay for it.
3. ******Deter this risky behavior by making sure it’s not rewarded.**** **Executives at SVB and Signature — who made millions of dollars — need to be held accountable. That includes clawing back their bonuses. And it also means investigating whether they engaged in insider trading or any other unlawful activity.

This was completely avoidable. I’ll keep advocating strong banking regulations — just like I have for years — and I will work to keep banks like SVB from doing even more damage. And I’m grateful that you’re in this movement alongside me. You make it possible to keep up the fight. Thanks for being a part of this, Elizabeth | **Elizabeth Warren is leading the charge to hold Big Banks accountable and pass strong regulations that protect consumers and our economy. If you’re able, please chip in to support this critical work.**

clean_body: I warned that deregulating banks would have dangerous consequences. | | | I wish I’d been wrong. Five years ago, I warned that deregulating banks would have dangerous consequences. And in the past few days, we’ve seen those consequences of a deregulated system unfold with the failures of Silicon Valley Bank and Signature Bank. In other words the banks are reaping what they sowed. Let’s back up a little, and talk about how we got here: After Wall Street crashed our economy and destroyed millions of livelihoods in the 2008 financial crisis, Congress passed the Dodd-Frank Act to strengthen protections for consumers and make sure that history wouldn’t repeat itself. Wall Street executives and their lobbyists weren’t happy with it (no surprise), and they’ve been trying to chip away at it ever since. In 2018, high-powered bank executives were calling on Congress to weaken Dodd-Frank so their banks could slip out of those stronger oversight rules. One of those executives? Greg Becker. The CEO of Silicon Valley Bank (SVB). I raised the alarm and fought hard against these changes, but the banks won that battle. Donald Trump signed a bill into law that rolled back key parts of Dodd-Frank. Regulators, including Fed Chair Jerome Powell, took the situation from bad to worse by letting financial institutions load up on more and more risk with less and less oversight. The collapses of SVB and Signature Bank are direct results of a toxic mix of risky management and weak supervision. SVB relied on a concentrated group of tech companies with big deposits. With such high concentration in a single sector of the economy, any weakness in that sector could undermine the bank’s stability. Instead of managing that risk, SVB funneled their clients’ deposits into long-term bonds, making it hard for the bank to respond quickly to changing circumstances. This model was great for short-term profits, which shot up by nearly 40 percent over the last three years — but now we know its cost. When things were looking especially bad last week, more of SVB's customers withdrew their deposits — causing a mad dash and, ultimately, a collapse that left many businesses alarmed that they wouldn’t be able to pay their bills and employees (but as the collapse unfolded, SVB executives rushed to pay out congratulatory bonuses). If Congress and the Federal Reserve hadn’t rolled back parts of Dodd-Frank, these banks would have been subject to stronger requirements to withstand financial shocks. And they would have been required to conduct regular stress tests to expose their vulnerabilities. But here we are. And last night, regulators announced that all vaporized deposits would be repaid in full. Even for billion-dollar companies, crypto investors, and the very venture capital firms that triggered the SVB bank run in the first place. (I can’t help but point out that it’s no wonder the American people are skeptical of a system that holds millions of struggling student loan borrowers in limbo but steps in overnight to ensure that billion-dollar crypto firms won’t lose a dime in deposits.) Washington must act quickly to prevent another crisis. Here’s what I’m calling for: 1. **Reverse the dangerous bank deregulation of the Trump era. Congress must repeal the 2018 law right away. And bank regulators must ensure stronger oversight, taking a careful look under the hood at our financial institutions to see where other dangers might be lurking. 2. ****Reform deposit insurance. Large companies with billions in unsecured deposits should never again expect, or receive, free support from the government. Regulators should act so businesses affected by bank failures like these are fully covered when they’re trying to make payroll and do other ordinary financial transactions. And the financial institutions that pose the greatest risk should pay for it. 3. ****Deter this risky behavior by making sure it’s not rewarded. Executives at SVB and Signature — who made millions of dollars — need to be held accountable. That includes clawing back their bonuses. And it also means investigating whether they engaged in insider trading or any other unlawful activity. This was completely avoidable. I’ll keep advocating strong banking regulations — just like I have for years — and I will work to keep banks like SVB from doing even more damage. And I’m grateful that you’re in this movement alongside me. You make it possible to keep up the fight. Thanks for being a part of this, Elizabeth | Elizabeth Warren is leading the charge to hold Big Banks accountable and pass strong regulations that protect consumers and our economy. | | |

Friend, I want to tell you a little bit about why fighting for American families in the U.S. Senate is so important to me. **[_My work is made possible by this grassroots team so, if you’re able, I hope you split a contribution of any amount between myself and Kirsten Gillibrand to help me keep going._](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60143273/396141798/-1044259811?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk3991-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkYzZmN2Y0YS1lZmMxLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=paeEPEr29Xfk1mz0kkC9XoJ7ouw_aXv3ABbpKSAO-6c=)**
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60143274/396141799/-1044259811?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk3991-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkYzZmN2Y0YS1lZmMxLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=paeEPEr29Xfk1mz0kkC9XoJ7ouw_aXv3ABbpKSAO-6c=)
Every day, I’m reminded of the fact that I stand on the shoulders of those before me. I am the daughter of a newspaperman and a teacher and the granddaughter of an iron ore miner who saved his money in a coffee can in the basement to send my dad to college. No one expected me to run for elected office -- and not many people expected me to win either.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60143275/396141800/-1044259811?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk3991-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkYzZmN2Y0YS1lZmMxLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=paeEPEr29Xfk1mz0kkC9XoJ7ouw_aXv3ABbpKSAO-6c=)
**But thanks to supporters like you, our grassroots movement beat the odds, and I became the first woman elected to the U.S. Senate from Minnesota.___That’s the American dream in action._**

Every day since then I’ve been fighting for progress. And I want you to know:

**I will never stop fighting to build a nation that works for working families.**
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60143276/396141801/-1044259811?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk3991-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkYzZmN2Y0YS1lZmMxLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=paeEPEr29Xfk1mz0kkC9XoJ7ouw_aXv3ABbpKSAO-6c=)
**[_But I can’t do it alone, friend. That's why I'm so thankful to have grassroots supporters like you by my side. If you can, I’m asking you to split a quick donation between me and Kirsten Gillibrand today to help me continue this fight._](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60143277/396141802/-1044259811?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk3991-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkYzZmN2Y0YS1lZmMxLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=paeEPEr29Xfk1mz0kkC9XoJ7ouw_aXv3ABbpKSAO-6c=)**

body:

**BREAKING: "Republicans release top targets of Democratic-held House seats in 2024"**

**[Chip in to help Kim fight back>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60136407/396112533/-1430019318?refcode=em23_230313_nrcc_fnd_gq_act___wa08ea_ettx&utm_campaign=em23_230313_nrcc_fnd_gq_act___wa08ea_ettx&utm_medium=email&refcode2=f824b91e-d0c1-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTExMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmODI0YjkxZS1kMGMxLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=pAmT1nGa52_ujXdOWteYbbOfiC80-sX0UdO68o7hLwk=)** | [DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60136408/396112534/-1430019318?refcode=em23_230313_nrcc_fnd_gq_act___wa08ea_ettx&utm_campaign=em23_230313_nrcc_fnd_gq_act___wa08ea_ettx&utm_medium=email&refcode2=f824b91e-d0c1-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTExMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmODI0YjkxZS1kMGMxLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=pAmT1nGa52_ujXdOWteYbbOfiC80-sX0UdO68o7hLwk=)
---

Peter,

The National Republican Congressional Committee (NRCC) just released their list of pick up opportunities in 2024, **and Kim's seat in Washington's 8th District was named a top target.**

Republicans know WA-08 is a true purple district, so they believe that defeating Kim is one of their best chances at expanding their narrow House majority. Kim already has a Republican opponent in the race and it's only a matter of time before the attacks start.

body:
| Team,

Last week, our campaign was added to the Democrats’ Frontline program — a list of Democratic incumbents running in the most competitive races in 2024.

**Now, we just got breaking news that I wanted you to hear first: National Republicans added our campaign to their top target list going into 2024. That means we can expect misleading Republican attacks against our campaign to begin any day now.**

**[That’s why I need to personally ask you to help us hit our $10,000 rapid response goal before Friday by rushing $20 right away!](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60136786/396114288/-1334289778?amount=20&contactdata=iH44gmM+QTEcHJZk5YpwhlZqJFFZ1m1boEh48sc8dt72MQZ5jHLHlluXUjR5wvZG44cQAEsIGi+At5VjL6DOUUL99RiyvT8d9Zp+CmK7Z+AXtfiA8/rcxpvI0/EiUP5DjRHfAL+rOKEKl59hq5Ndng==&source=EM_NBI_SD_20230313_FR_1.1_0_1MO_candidate_NA_NA_goptarget&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NTc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyOTU2ZmFiZi1kMWMxLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=AH17fRxtcrg6QOL-qKDdOK1CrUoOiv7xzd-J3dzi6zw=)**

In 2022, we faced a massive wave of misleading attack ads from dark money groups, but our incredible grassroots supporters stepped up and made sure we won our competitive race.

We can do it again next year, but we’ll need your support to win. Taking back control of the House starts right here in KS-03.

[ House Speaker Kevin McCarthy has pledged to release tens of thousands of hours of US Capitol surveillance footage from January 6, 2021. body:
Sign up to testify AGAINST this BAD BILL by 3PM TOMORROW!

http://wsrp.org
Ballots Are Out, Vote By November 2nd!

https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=WeGlgXqOx-Y

With ballots out, now is the perfect time to get out there and volunteer on a conservative campaign. Every door you knock on in these local races matter a lot and the results of this election year will be used as a bellwether for the 2022 midterms.

We are also hosting another WSRP Statewide Day Of Action on Saturday, October 30th! Bring a friend or neighbor to volunteer for a few hours to help local conservatives win in November! Sign up here to join our Statewide Day Of Action! (https://form.jotform.com/212737084845058)
State Sen. Gildon On Vaccine Mandates
https://soundcloud.com/user-450836972/wagop-report-state-sen-chris-gildon-on-vaccine-mandates-and-democrat-anti-policing-laws
State Senator Chris Gildon (R - Puyallup) joins the podcast this week to discuss vaccine mandates, anti-policing laws, the Long-Term Care Tax, and how he got his start in politics. WAGOP is now on Apple Podcasts and Spotify, follow us and never miss an episode! Listen here. (https://soundcloud.com/user-450836972/wagop-report-state-sen-chris-gildon-on-vaccine-mandates-and-democrat-anti-policing-laws)
Republican Leaders Fight Inslee's Mandate
Thanks to our Republican leaders in the State House and Senate for fighting back and offering a strong rebuke of Inslee's harmful vaccine mandate. Below is an excerpt of their most recent statement to the press:

“We are already experiencing higher prices and empty shelves partially as a result of COVID's shutdowns and workforce shortages. Today's deadline, with its unnecessarily hardline consequences, will only make that worse when hundreds, if not thousands, lose their jobs and are denied unemployment benefits. It also threatens public safety by reducing our police forces at a time when crime is already rising. People feel unsafe. They are afraid of what criminals will do when there are even fewer law enforcement officers to respond. And they are worried about people's chances of survival if there aren't enough first responders to help in an emergency. The governor underestimates the potential impact of his actions.

“Coercion, intimidation, threats and public shaming are not tactics a leader should be using against the people. The governor's obvious disdain for those who are choosing to lose their jobs rather than compromise their right to make their own medical decisions is unhelpful. He is dividing the public – segregating us and turning people against each other. Yesterday, even unvaccinated health-care workers were heroes. Today, they become villains in the governor's narrative."

Read the full statement. (https://jtwilcox.houserepublicans.wa.gov/2021/10/18/republican-leaders-todays-vaccine-deadline-threatens-critical-services-public-safety/?fbclid=IwAR3WxI9H29hbbmfbZhdkDS9QjqdVd2TIRCdjNjUkUlLdeThtbUjK_WBWJuw)
Smiley Campaign Shows Grassroots Support In Latest Fundraising Quarter
Tiffany Smiley is fighting hard to retire Patty Murray and her latest fundraising numbers show not only has Tiffany raised more than $1.6 million but she also has unequivocal grassroots support, with over 10,000 donors from Washington State. Flipping a U.S. Senate seat is hard work but Tiffany has shown in the only 5 months since starting her campaign, that she is a force to be reckoned with. Learn more about how Tiffany stands on the issues here (https://www.smileyforwashington.com/issues) .
Contact:
Steve Johnson
Communications Director
Washington State Republican Party

name: Lucas Kunce
subject: Patriotism over profits
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Lucas Kunce for Missouri
body:
In the Marines, I fought AGAINST the banks. In his career as a corrupt politician, Josh Hawley has fought FOR them.
#
Hey Peter — you want to know the difference between me and Josh Hawley?
In the U.S. Marine Corps, I fought AGAINST the banks. In his career as a corrupt politician, Hawley has fought FOR them. **These are the options Missouri voters have for their U.S. Senate seat in 2024:**
[](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/29003?refcode=em20230313-2858&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=2858%2E614464%2ENZCHEa)
**_[Chip in now to elect Lucas Kunce to the U.S. Senate »](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/29003?refcode=em20230313-2858&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=2858%2E614464%2ENZCHEa)_**
**Banks shouldn’t write the rules on banking — and when I’m in the U.S. Senate, I’ll fight to make sure they never do again.**
That’s why I’m calling for a ban on all public officials from big bank lobbying for life AND on big bank officials from holding any federal job. It’s why I’m fighting to outlaw bank PACs and end Citizens United. And it’s why I’ll work to bar any top bank executive who contributed to the collapse of a large bank from ever again leading another American financial institution.
We need leaders who will put patriotism over profits — for the sake of our workers, our economy, and our national security — and I’m running to replace Josh Hawley in the U.S. Senate to do exactly that. So Peter:
**[Will you add your first donation of any amount to my campaign today so we can get this message in front of voters and defeat Josh Hawley in 2024? I’m building a grassroots movement, without a cent from corporate PACs or federal lobbyists, so you know I mean it when I say any amount makes a big impact.](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/29003?refcode=em20230313-2858&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&akid=2858%2E614464%2ENZCHEa)**

[Contribute $10](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/29004?refcode=em20230313-2858&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=10&t=4&akid=2858%2E614464%2ENZCHEa) [Contribute $25](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/29004?refcode=em20230313-2858&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=25&t=5&akid=2858%2E614464%2ENZCHEa) [Contribute $30](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/29004?refcode=em20230313-2858&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=30&t=6&akid=2858%2E614464%2ENZCHEa) [Contribute $50](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/29004?refcode=em20230313-2858&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=50&t=7&akid=2858%2E614464%2ENZCHEa) [Contribute $100](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/29004?refcode=em20230313-2858&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=100&t=8&akid=2858%2E614464%2ENZCHEa) [Contribute $250](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/29004?refcode=em20230313-2858&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=250&t=9&akid=2858%2E614464%2ENZCHEa) [Give another amount](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/29003?refcode=em20230313-2858&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=10&akid=2858%2E614464%2ENZCHEa)

Thank you,
Lucas Kunce

name: Lisa Blunt Rochester
subject: blisters & sore muscles
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Lisa Blunt Rochester for CongressLisa Blunt Rochester for Congress
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lbr-em-mar2023?refcode=EM_FR_20230313_ballet_logo [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lbr-em-mar2023?refcode=EM_FR_20230313_ballet_logo] https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lbr-em-mar2023?refcode=EM_FR_20230313_ballet_logo [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lbr-em-mar2023?refcode=EM_FR_20230313_ballet_logo]Hi there,
Ballet has always been a significant part of my story.
My parents enrolled me in lessons when I was young, and I stuck with it into high school.
I quickly learned that beneath the beauty of dance there is struggle. Blisters. Sore Muscles. Slippers that don’t fit quite right.
It took me until I was a little older to see that those invisible struggles beneath the surface don’t just happen in ballet. For my family, it was part of everyday life – but I never would’ve known.
When I was born, my Dad was still in college and we lived with my grandparents. When I was a little older, my Dad got our own apartment and then we moved into our first house in a public housing complex.
I have a closely-knit extended family and thanks to them, I never wanted for anything. They made sure I had access to opportunity, like starting my ballet classes after we moved out of public housing.
I’ve since hung up my slippers but I carry the lessons ballet taught me everywhere I go.
Many hard-working families just like the one I grew up in are struggling below the surface, even if we can’t always see it.
I’m fighting for them – for you – every day, but I need your support to keep going. If you’re able, could you please donate $10 or more to my campaign? I’m laser-focused on ensuring that more families have access to every opportunity possible and the more folks who chip in to this email, the more time I can devote to that fight. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lbr-em-mar2023?refcode=EM_FR_20230313_ballet]
I hope that you are able to help.
Thank you so much,
Lisa
Congresswoman Lisa Blunt Rochester is a Democrat representing the First State, Delaware. She served as the National Co-Chair of the Biden-Harris campaign and Co-Chair of the DCCC ‘Red to Blue’ program. Lisa is running for reelection to continue fighting for our health care, leading the charge toward environmental justice, and advocating for working families like hers.
DONATE MONTHLY [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lbr-em-mar2023?refcode=EM_FR_20230313_ballet_bio&refcode2=biobox&recurring=1]
Paid for by Lisa Blunt Rochester for CongressLisa Blunt Rochester for Congress
PO BOX 9767
Wilmington, DE 19810
United States

name: Vernon Robinson
subject: What you accomplished
body:
|
Peter \-- I know you don't like getting four or five emails a day that insult your intelligence. We don't do that and never will. I want to give you an overview of where we are going and where we've been. In the 2018 cycle, we ran hard hitting ads to help elect Josh Hawley in Missouri and Marsha Blackburn in Tennessee. Our ads helped Hawley get double digit black support, twice what the GOP nominee got six years earlier. We also moved Blackburn from 7% to 14% black voter support. While our ads for John James did not help elect him that year, our ads then and in 2020 helped him get elected to Congress last year. In 2020, we bought radio ads in nine states and over 20 media markets and put two million "Keep Black America Great" booklets on the street to help President Trump get the highest black voter support since Nixon in 1960. When I found out that their were no political ads running on Creole language radio in south Florida, we hit Biden hard with radio ads to the Haitian community there. We actually forced Biden to campaign in Little Haiti the last week of the campaign. When the smoke cleared, Trump increased his support 44% in the Haitian precincts in North Miami Dade. In 2021, our National PAC Chair, Winsome Sears, resigned to run for Lt Governor of Virginia. With your help, we ran hard hitting ads in Roanoke, Richmond and Norfolk, contributed to her campaign and sponsored a stock car in the Martinsville 300. These efforts propelled her to a narrow victory. Last year, we helped elect J.D. Vance to the Senate from Ohio, Ted Budd to the Senate from North Carolina and Jen Kiggans to the House from Virginia. Going forward we just finished the latest black engagement booklet to reach black voters. The booklet unveils Biden's racist past and present complete with quotations. The other section compares and contrasts the successful Trump policies with the disaster for black folk and the entire county that is Joe Biden. We will shortly reach out to donors to get them to ask GOP candidates, the party and allies like guns and life why they don't ask black voters for their votes. If we could convince candidates particularly in swing states to use the much lower candidate ad prices to get messages to black voters, then I can retire and enjoy my grandchildren. Finally, we plan to ask donors if they will support ads to elect Republicans to Governor in Kentucky and Louisiana. We hope to also start ads in North Carolina to define Democrat Josh Stein and support Mark Robinson for Governor of North Carolina. We could not do any of this without your past support. And we can't move forward without your support. | [](https://www.blackamericansmaga.org/donate?e=305294bd7e656b520643df50a255d78c&utm_source=draftew&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=annaul_udpate&n=1 "Please donate Today") [Please donate Today](https://www.blackamericansmaga.org/donate?e=305294bd7e656b520643df50a255d78c&utm_source=draftew&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=annaul_udpate&n=1)
---
`Remember you can give an unlimited amount as either an American citizen or corporation.`
Thank you for stepping up before and thank you in advance for helping do the hard work of freedom with your donation today.
Vernon Robinson, Co-Founder Black Americans Making America First (formally known as Black Americans to re-elect the President)
[](https://www.blackamericansmaga.org/donate?e=305294bd7e656b520643df50a255d78c&utm_source=draftew&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=annaul_udpate&n=2 "Please donate Now") [Please donate Now](https://www.blackamericansmaga.org/donate?e=305294bd7e656b520643df50a255d78c&utm_source=draftew&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=annaul_udpate&n=2)
---

You can also keep up with Info on [Twitter](https://www.blackamericansmaga.org/r?u=7Sn_jlQ3J2wHxMyMtp8UNDpPQRhqGoZSeHX-iakFGkQ&e=305294bd7e656b520643df50a255d78c&utm_source=draftew&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=annaul_udpate&n=24) or [Facebook](https://www.blackamericansmaga.org/r?u=27Ax0UmWOX2J8J_QwK9Z6kEGnkq42GV-WhR7AOlkvj59YzS2j4d7aoid2-MEtq0n&e=305294bd7e656b520643df50a255d78c&utm_source=draftew&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=annaul_udpate&n=25). -=-=-

name: Team Lashrecse
subject: Just 100 days to go!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Lashrecse Aird
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/airdemail2023?refcode=em_fr_3.9.2023_LA_all&amount=25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/airdemail2023?refcode=em_fr_3.9.2023_LA_all&amount=25]
Hi friend,
We're just 100 days out from our June Primary Election -- and we have our work cut out for us!
Want to help? Donate now >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/airdemail2023?refcode=em_fr_3.13.2023_LA_all&amount=25]
We're fighting every day to ensure the issues that matter most to Virginia families stay at the forefront of this election. Together we can build a stronger economy that works for all of us, ensure access to reproductive freedom, and hold MAGA extremists in our State Capitol accountable.
That's why Lashrecse is running to be your next State Senator, friend -- because that work needs to be done.
But to win this nomination, we must ensure our campaign has the funding to meet our goals and effectively communicate Lashrecse's vision to our district.
So, friend, as we mark the last 100 days until this primary and approach our upcoming end-of-quarter deadline, we're hoping we can count on you to get us over the finish line. We have big plans, and we know that our grassroots campaign can deliver -- but only if we all work together. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/airdemail2023?refcode=em_fr_3.13.2023_LA_all&amount=25]
Donate Now [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/airdemail2023?refcode=em_fr_3.13.2023_LA_all&amount=25]
Thank you again for having our backs,
-Team Lashrecse

name: Patrick Morrisey
subject: Excuse me while I rant…
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM MORRISEY
body:
This email is about Joe Biden | | |
---
Fellow Conservative,
---
I was just thinking about the willful ignorance of our commander-in-chief.

As news of young people dying of fentanyl overdoses becomes more and more common, conservative fighters like myself are becoming increasingly enraged on behalf of the American families mourning these senseless losses.

For two damn years, this President and his babysitters have been **ignoring** the crisis at our Southern Border — a crisis, mind you, that they caused!

And while they sit in their ivory towers looking down their noses at the American people, our communities are suffering the consequences of Joe Biden’s willful ignorance.

Let’s make one thing clear: If Joe Biden actually gave a damn, and wanted to solve this problem he could — and quite easily.

But instead, Joe Biden, Kamala Harris and the Democratic Party at-large have chosen to put their rose-colored blinders on and look the other way.

I’m sick of it! Not to be grim, but the harsh reality of this situation is that the blood of America’s youth is on Joe Biden’s hands.

Look, I don’t want to take up much more of your time, but I just had to get this off my chest.

And I know that you are just as pissed off about this as I am. But my promise to you is that I won’t let my emotions about this situation get in the way of my fight to take meaningful action.

Joe Biden may be able to ignore the crisis he has caused and live with it on his conscience. But I can’t. I am going to do everything in my power to secure that border. And though I fully expect the Radical Left to stand in my way at every turn, I’m not going to give in.

Unfortunately, not everyone in the Republican Party is of the same mindset. Others are all too comfortable with pointing the finger to place blame, but doing nothing to fix the problem either.

That is not me, Fellow Conservative.

If it is the last thing I do, I am going to make sure that Joe Biden and his administration answer for the destruction that they have caused.

[_**As of right now, our nation is bent, but not broken. There is still hope and time to recover. But only if we come together and DEMAND better from this failure-in-chief.**_](http://links.teammorrisey.com/u/click?_t=b0356ef447a34444a1b227ba5b6fa8b2&_m=677abcd3b5604b2e8ec8772ef9b2ae9e&_e=cdPrHlhfCoj9eE7tpnNnNqYgcbiUAC65-Ls2SBoB1UNROceQ2NAeBaMrb0hbulUMq9ChYOv_Gvm_a2F8aDyLO3wlDplEp2HZ3QhL_j7K7NYLZRuZSqWUZW-kuuEel6wc5XVpXtIk3OJNTvHpvD2HfZE1v3M77PpP27HLDJWl8dKBPu1UlGZZW3DLMVGDwdAd_XA3sI_Ik-4MaE6ayIjhpC6W1h0kNF7Wcy3Af_of-7wBMZ7Xx3MgYdYWiuR1vetvH37whiu2ZCeveppxQloTZdl_tUBQBAVreyVfW_z_dcDE5ZvQkw9SzBhP2N9qsY-RpYT7QO-XxjHOoDNBiJAszr9Rlplef4C74A0-UBaHRJLfjGKnlm8n9uHjKKtlHivuUrsVEUqS-9vpdI1n6odyTRqaGGkpgb9tjqblftwCoIA%3D)

clean_body: This email is about Joe Biden | | | Fellow Conservative, I was just thinking about the willful ignorance of our commander-in-chief. As news of young people dying of fentanyl overdoses becomes more and more common, conservative fighters like myself are becoming increasingly enraged on behalf of the American families mourning these senseless losses. For two damn years, this President and his babysitters have been ignoring the crisis at our Southern Border — a crisis, mind you, that they caused! And while they sit in their ivory towers looking down their noses at the American people, our communities are suffering the consequences of Joe Biden’s willful ignorance. Let’s make one thing clear: If Joe Biden actually gave a damn, and wanted to solve this problem he could — and quite easily. But instead, Joe Biden, Kamala Harris and the Democratic Party at-large have chosen to put their rose-colored blinders on and look the other way. I’m sick of it! Not to be grim, but the harsh reality of this situation is that the blood of America’s youth is on Joe Biden’s hands. Look, I don’t want to take up much more of your time, but I just had to get this off my chest. And I know that you are just as pissed off about this as I am. But my promise to you is that I won’t let my emotions about this situation get in the way of my fight to take meaningful action. Joe Biden may be able to ignore the crisis he has caused and live with it on his conscience. But I can’t. I am going to do everything in my power to secure that border. And though I fully expect the Radical Left to stand in my way at every turn, I’m not going to give in. Unfortunately, not everyone in the Republican Party is of the same mindset. Others are all too comfortable with pointing the finger to place blame, but doing nothing to fix the problem either. That is not me, Fellow Conservative. If it is the last thing I do, I am going to make sure that Joe Biden and his administration answer for the destruction that they have caused. Thank you for your time. If you are willing to join the cause, you can step up below. Have a nice evening, Patrick Morrisey Attorney General of West Virginia | | | | PAID FOR BY TEAM MORRISEY a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit of Morrisey for Attorney General, Morrisey for West Virginia, Inc., Blue and Gold Fund, and West Virginia Republican Party, Inc. c/o Red Curve Solutions 138 Conant Street, 2nd Floor Beverly, MA 01915.

clean_body: Keep the momentum going | Can you chip in below to keep the momentum going? House Conservatives are on the frontlines in the struggle to preserve our values and defend our nation from the disastrous policies of the Biden Administration and their (America-hating) Socialist allies. You can fight back here: RSC Chairman Kevin Hern is the tip of the spear in the battle to preserve our God-given liberties from the Biden administration and the deranged liberals in Congress, Supporting Chairman Hern and House Conservatives is the best way to Let's be clear: failing to hit this fundraising goal would be a failure and capitulation to the Left. We cannot let that happen. We must show them we are a force to be reckoned with and will not back down in our fight for freedom and conservative values. ⇣ ⇣ ⇣ ⇣ Together, we can keep the momentum going and ensure our message is heard loud and clear. Time is running out. Please, don't wait. Thank you for your continued support. name: Adam Schiff
subject: It’s all thanks to you, Derek.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY SCHIFF FOR SENATE
body:
[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/62?t=1001&akid=1941%2E5257348%2Ek5Xh1b ]Adam Schiff for Senate

Derek — it’s thanks to you I can do this important work.

Serving as an impeachment manager against Donald Trump. Leading the House
Intelligence Committee. Shining a bright light on the corruption of
Republican leadership in Congress.

That’s all thanks to you.

Ever since I launched my campaign to become California’s next U.S.
Senator, you’ve stood by me. You’ve donated. You’ve attended our events.
You’ve shared your honest feedback. You’ve read our many (many) emails.
You’ve been a part of it all, and I can’t do it without you.

There’s something you should know, Derek: Right now, a lot of my
colleagues are on the phone all day asking their big-money donors to cut
checks to keep their campaigns afloat.

But thanks to your support, I can focus on what’s most important —
attending important hearings, talking with constituents, and meeting with
voters across our great state.

Thanks to you, I can put all of my energy toward protecting our democracy
and making our economy work for everyone. And that fight is just
beginning.

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1561?c0=mar2023_abs_em.dt2mVY&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_MMG_AC_20230313_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1004&akid=1941%2E5257348%2Ek5Xh1b ]We have less than 72 hours until our final mid-month deadline of the
quarter, and I’m counting on your support to reach our ambitious
fundraising goal. Chip in $3 today so I can continue delivering for
everyday Californians.

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your
donation will go through immediately:

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1072?c0=mar2023_abs_em.DC74Jc&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_MMG_AC_20230313_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1005&akid=1941%2E5257348%2Ek5Xh1b ]EXPRESS DONATE $3

With you part of the team, I know we can overcome anything Republicans

— Adam

name: Speaker Kevin McCarthy
subject: I come to you with bad news
disclaimer_text: Paid for by McCarthy for Congress
body:
| |
---
| | | I come to you with bad news.

The FEC has increased its maximum contribution limit by 14%!

The Left's ability to outraise and outspend us is nothing short of astonishing but now, Democrat billionaires and millionaires can have 14% more of an impact on our elections!

**Let me be clear, this puts Republicans in a DEVASTATING position. **

I have spent YEARS fighting against Democrats and I can tell you from experience, that after a certain point, there is no overcoming a cash disadvantage.

Our ability to fight against corrupt Democrats, stand against the Biden Administration's socialist agenda, and fight for your priorities in Congress hangs in the balance.

That's why I'm setting an immediate fundraising goal by midnight tonight. **[If every person reading this message gives whatever they can give, we can even the odds:](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62428714:J8CttfGNo:m:1:3331421248:308267B2106049A9655967FF9C57E80C:r "If every person reading this message gives $14 or whatever they can give, we can even the odds:")**

Without every patriot reading this, without YOU, please believe me when I say it will be game over.

name: Kirsten Gillibrand
subject: Walgreens' decision
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Gillibrand for Senate
body:
| | |
---
Friend, Walgreens, the second-largest pharmacy chain in this country, has made the dangerous decision to stop selling mifepristone — a pill that doctors prescribe for abortions and treating miscarriages — in 21 states where Republican attorneys general have threatened legal action. **This safe, reliable, FDA-approved medication will no longer be available in any Walgreens stores in nearly half the country.**
Walgreens' decision makes it harder for millions of Americans to access the legal, safe medications they need. And it marks a dangerous step toward limiting our reproductive freedoms nationwide.
You see, Walgreens didn't make this decision based on concerns from doctors or guidance from the FDA. **Instead, they chose to listen to the extremist politicians who are trying to ban abortions and destroy reproductive rights across the whole country.** This isn't about medicine or science or patients' health. It's about politics and an extremist agenda, plain and simple.
The people in charge at Walgreens have caved to the pressure from leaders on the far right. Now, it's time to mount a pressure campaign of our own. **I'm calling on 15,000 grassroots Democrats to stand with me in this fight by raising your voices to restore reproductive freedoms. [Please, will you add your name before midnight tonight to show the GOP that we won't let them win this fight?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60145532/396152450/-1077177147?email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=43614&ask=10&amounts=5,25,50,100&code=jtk3997-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlZjJlNjlkOS1mYmMxLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ETeFNOiBmp6D6K1ShlSBsUJADHTywGCP_kqfQlL1Wdo=&emci=bb2f6527-d5c1-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=ef2e69d9-fbc1-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=7659029)**
| | [SIGN ON NOW](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60145536/396152451/-1077177147?email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=43614&ask=10&amounts=5,25,50,100&code=jtk3997-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlZjJlNjlkOS1mYmMxLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ETeFNOiBmp6D6K1ShlSBsUJADHTywGCP_kqfQlL1Wdo=&emci=bb2f6527-d5c1-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=ef2e69d9-fbc1-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=7659029)

Kirsten

clean_body: | | | Friend, Walgreens, the second-largest pharmacy chain in this country, has made the dangerous decision to stop selling mifepristone — a pill that doctors prescribe for abortions and treating miscarriages — in 21 states where Republican attorneys general have threatened legal action. This safe, reliable, FDA-approved medication will no longer be available in any Walgreens stores in nearly half the country. Walgreens' decision makes it harder for millions of Americans to access the legal, safe medications they need. And it marks a dangerous step toward limiting our reproductive freedoms nationwide. You see, Walgreens didn't make this decision based on concerns from doctors or guidance from the FDA. Instead, they chose to listen to the extremist politicians who are trying to ban abortions and destroy reproductive rights across the whole country. This isn't about medicine or science or patients' health. It's about politics and an extremist agenda, plain and simple. The people in charge at Walgreens have caved to the pressure from leaders on the far right. Now, it's time to mount a pressure campaign of our own. I'm calling on 15,000 grassroots Democrats to stand with me in this fight by raising your voices to restore reproductive freedoms. | | Thank you for standing with me in this fight. name: Rashida Tlaib
subject: Democrats could truly be the party of the working class
body:
Most U.S. residents live paycheck to paycheck, and nearly half don’t have enough cash to cover a $400 emergency expense.
#
Peter,
We need Democrats to do more to truly be the party of the working class.
Most U.S. residents live paycheck to paycheck, and nearly half don’t have enough cash to cover a $400 emergency expense. Growing up in Detroit as the daughter of immigrants, I’ve lived this myself, and I’ve seen this firsthand as a community activist working closely with my neighbors. **But too many of my Democratic colleagues in Congress don’t understand this lived reality and don’t act with the urgency that our communities need.**
For example, back in 2021, Congress passed a temporarily expanded Child Tax Credit, providing between $250-$300 per month per child for families with young children. **This cut child poverty by 40%.** But corporate Democrats and Republicans let that expire last year.
So I introduced the _End Child Poverty Act_ , which would replace the Child Tax Credit and cover every child in the United States, including the lowest-wealth families who are traditionally left out of the tax credit system—because, ironically, they earn too little. It would cut child poverty by 70% by providing families with a universal benefit of nearly $400 per month per child, from children’s birth until their 19th birthday.
**Poverty is due to policy choices. With more Democratic support for bold anti-poverty policies, we can help working class communities thrive.**
**[Join me and Justice Democrats by signing the petition to demand that Democrats in Congress and the Biden administration do more to end poverty.](https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/131040?t=1&akid=27966%2E1203867%2E1qBoNP)**
**[Sign Now](https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/131040?t=2&akid=27966%2E1203867%2E1qBoNP)**
When the federal government gave people occasional one-time payments during the pandemic, it had a huge impact in people's lives. But the one-time payments were not enough.
To address our country’s economic crisis, we must urgently pass legislation that puts money directly back into people's pockets on a monthly basis.
I’ve introduced multiple bills to do just that, including the _Building Our Opportunities to Survive and Thrive (BOOST) Act_. If passed, the bill would provide people with recurring, monthly cash payments of up to $250 per month for individuals (if they earn under $50,000 in a year) and up to $500 per month for married couples (if they make under $100,000 in a year).
This would uplift almost half of all people living in poverty, including people who do not make enough to file taxes and who are too often left out of tax-credit-related government assistance.
In addition to transformative anti-poverty policies like this, we need federal action to eliminate debt—from education debt to medical debt to utility debt and more.
We live in the wealthiest nation in the world. We can pay for these changes by making the rich and corporations pay their fair share, by re-allocating money in the federal budget (i.e. from the Pentagon), and through my team’s innovative plan to #MintTheCoin.
It’s time for Democrats to live our values.
**[Sign the petition if you agree: We need massive Democratic support for bold, meaningful bills that invest directly in working class communities and meet the scale of our problems now.](https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/131040?t=3&akid=27966%2E1203867%2E1qBoNP)**
**[Sign Now](https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/131040?t=4&akid=27966%2E1203867%2E1qBoNP)**
Thank you for taking action. I’m grateful to Justice Democrats for continuing to push Democrats to do better.
In solidarity,
Rashida Tlaib

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/justicedemocrats?refcode=em20230313-27966-footer&t=5&refcode2=27966_1203867_1qBoNP&akid=27966%2E1203867%2E1qBoNP)**

name: Conservative Priorities Briefing
subject: Here’s how you know which elections are the most important
body:
Why is the far-left spending $9 million on an off-year state judicial primary election? | | | [](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=6131c69d8fa44e4d8d8356b6f15ceff3&_e=_y-Ay6OIS9nmTuYTXJoSUadtOz3IXGv5r2xa2pOiCvac3n5K9L0Uq45KVdmw9UXGweSKZJ6kQ9Y6GCdt86Y7rpMRdl1Q3qPS_1OvU-jzqP7k7YOY0Y7jZOHKQUEbfI2OIQSv_e66NWoeyJVM5yFbePO9IkahFZDGr1MCZLzOzErw_UhS_jT2smvA-ZkEaqMqtt_yTnwko3ArmY5dqo2p900jktPDn1sulURfpuSONLHf3P2ZaEUq6ut4hmDpcGURXd7yVaYmUmmQoctpI9MJv-iWzF8DrouDWa9yMqRRCfWCKcgaXP4uzrMuCRTQElIqLPAXCeAhUs6SZzDSbeP3IwAsi70gN8dNuKPj1G9wKoY%3D)
---
Peter, **Want to know a fool-proof way to determine which elections have the highest stakes?_Follow the money._** The races with the biggest impact on our country's future have the biggest price tags as activist groups duke it out for critical wins. **So, Peter — when you see national groups spending $9 million dollars on a single state supreme court PRIMARY race, PAY ATTENTION!** And that primary spending was only the beginning...
---
[](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=6131c69d8fa44e4d8d8356b6f15ceff3&_e=_y-Ay6OIS9nmTuYTXJoSUadtOz3IXGv5r2xa2pOiCvac3n5K9L0Uq45KVdmw9UXGweSKZJ6kQ9Y6GCdt86Y7rpMRdl1Q3qPS_1OvU-jzqP7k7YOY0Y7jZOHKQUEbfI2OIQSv_e66NWoeyJVM5yFbePO9IkahFZDGr1MCZLzOzErw_UhS_jT2smvA-ZkEaqMqtt_yTnwko3ArmY5dqo2p93WtDAqG_LzpHAjvmoL6JWtqISy3uOHdO98X3VId_DNAHJQY0Ha3Vk_rk8hKgyld5GOWBoaz3aqrKDLL_17z0Z1h_6ry8OpX7n81pZoD28nTiXZpVLNX79_NR8JyS9XaXaxD9OHwq-fh1ijZJCegfkU%3D)
---
The primary I'm talking about just happened in Wisconsin — in fact, our group, **Fair Courts America** , was one of those spenders. And let me tell you: we're grateful for every dime we've spent so far because this is the most important race in America right now. Here's why: _The winner of the general election will get a seat on the court for 10 years, and they will tilt the balance of Wisconsin’s divided court._ We supported **solid conservative Daniel Kelly**. A seasoned former member of the Wisconsin Supreme Court, he has advanced to the general election. But so has the far-left's favored candidate: **radical leftist Janet Protasiewicz**. Not only does Janet have a horrifying record of letting violent criminals walk free, she's got a LENGTHY record of statements promising to use her seat on the court to push a liberal agenda, including:
* Promoting abortion through judicial activism
* Rejecting the state's congressional maps as "rigged" toward Republicans
* _And maybe even ruling in favor of Joe Biden in a contested 2024 Wisconsin presidential election. _

---
[**DEFEND WI FOR 2024**](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=6131c69d8fa44e4d8d8356b6f15ceff3&_e=_y-Ay6OIS9nmTuYTXJoSUadtOz3IXGv5r2xa2pOiCvac3n5K9L0Uq45KVdmw9UXGweSKZJ6kQ9Y6GCdt86Y7rpMRdl1Q3qPS_1OvU-jzqP7k7YOY0Y7jZOHKQUEbfI2OIQSv_e66NWoeyJVM5yFbePO9IkahFZDGr1MCZLzOzErw_UhS_jT2smvA-ZkEaqMqtt_yTnwko3ArmY5dqo2p9yuiq0LOnplpLOwAWQTcFcc8bsbFDKq099P5zAOIH3wCIzrBz9o9BgDTSmOIjOIPGML0H3AAEeGY09g_OE28YJEiRJ5nbIJKb1PFHG6lqqXrQb3zODJ5IYVpYMbzPqVRtUl0Y1UPPHum8XQgr2braxQ%3D)
---
**Now do you see why the far-left is pouring every dime they can get their hands on into this race?** Wisconsin is counting on grassroots conservatives like you to help fight back against the influx of big liberal cash in their state. We're doing everything we can at Fair Courts America, but we need your help. That’s why I’m reaching out to conservatives like you who see the big picture, and can see why this race is so important. Will you stand with us today?
[_**Fight back in Wisconsin.
