clean_body: Why is the far-left spending $9 million on an off-year state judicial primary election? | | | Peter, Want to know a fool-proof way to determine which elections have the highest stakes?Follow the money. The races with the biggest impact on our country's future have the biggest price tags as activist groups duke it out for critical wins. So, Peter — when you see national groups spending $9 million dollars on a single state supreme court PRIMARY race, PAY ATTENTION! And that primary spending was only the beginning... The primary I'm talking about just happened in Wisconsin — in fact, our group, Fair Courts America , was one of those spenders. And let me tell you: we're grateful for every dime we've spent so far because this is the most important race in America right now. Here's why: The winner of the general election will get a seat on the court for 10 years, and they will tilt the balance of Wisconsin’s divided court. We supported solid conservative Daniel Kelly. A seasoned former member of the Wisconsin Supreme Court, he has advanced to the general election. But so has the far-left's favored candidate: radical leftist Janet Protasiewicz. Not only does Janet have a horrifying record of letting violent criminals walk free, she's got a LENGTHY record of statements promising to use her seat on the court to push a liberal agenda, including: Promoting abortion through judicial activism Rejecting the state's congressional maps as "rigged" toward Republicans And maybe even ruling in favor of Joe Biden in a contested 2024 Wisconsin presidential election. Now do you see why the far-left is pouring every dime they can get their hands on into this race? Wisconsin is counting on grassroots conservatives like you to help fight back against the influx of big liberal cash in their state. We're doing everything we can at Fair Courts America, but we need your help. That’s why I’m reaching out to conservatives like you who see the big picture, and can see why this race is so important. Will you stand with us today? ** Thank you, Andrew WynneExecutive Director Fair Courts America | | | | | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com | | |

clean_body: This isn’t new territory for us, and I know with your support we’ll mount another winning campaign. | = | | | Republicans release top targets of Democratic-held House seats in 2024 | = Peter, I wanted to reach out personally with an important campaign update. FIRST - National Republican groups poured tens of thousands of dollars into attack ads aired in VA-07. THEN - VA-07 was officially named a ‘frontline’ district in the 2024 election – signaling how close our race is shaping up to be and how critical winning it is to regaining the House majority. NOW - The NRCC has named my district one of its top targets for next cycle. All this means outside money will soon flood our district, and we have to do everything we can to respond. = | | | = | = | = | = | = This isn’t new territory for us, and I know with your support we’ll mount another winning campaign. Winning close races is what we do best, and your support is central to that success. = | = Thank you, sincerely, Abigail * | | = Paid for by Spanberger for Congress Spanberger for Congress P.O. Box 3112 Fredericksburg , VA 22402 United States | | | ---|---|--- Abigail Spanberger is a proud Democrat, former CIA officer, and representative for Virginia's 7th Congressional District. She believes in leadership that flows from our shared American values of integrity, responsibility, and decency, and she wants to work to move this country forward together. I will never stop fighting for fair labor laws and ending the exploitation of migrants and migrant children.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60140037/396129658/-2000835355?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85ODI2MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3N2RhYzVhMC1lMGMxLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=pmG6IX6OM4hjVjElgClzCNYQNC3VoJgPlRtJz3c78_k=&emci=455dbf92-b6c1-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=77dac5a0-e0c1-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=6681226)

Peter,

This is unacceptable and goes against our values as a nation.

I grew up in a working-class family and have dedicated my entire life to fighting for labor rights and doing right by my community. Supporting labor unions, strengthening equal pay laws, and fighting for immigration reform have been central to my work.

It is alarming to see the mass exploitation of migrant children go unchallenged, and I strongly urge the Department of Labor to launch an immediate investigation.

Ensuring our children's safety and healthy development should be our main priority. I will never stop fighting for fair labor laws and ending the exploitation of migrants and migrant children. [_**Will you join me in showing there is a groundswell of support to end unethical child labor practices?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60140038/396129659/-2000835355?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85ODI2MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3N2RhYzVhMC1lMGMxLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=pmG6IX6OM4hjVjElgClzCNYQNC3VoJgPlRtJz3c78_k=&emci=455dbf92-b6c1-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=77dac5a0-e0c1-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=6681226)

body:
I want to make sure you saw this: We were just named to the Democratic Congressional Campaign Committee’s 2024 Frontline program. This not only confirms that our race will be one of the most competitive in the entire country, but it means that OH-13 is an absolute must-win seat in order to take back the House Majority.
Peter, I want to make sure you saw this:**We were just named to the Democratic Congressional Campaign Committee’s 2024 Frontline program.**

This not only confirms that our race will be one of the most competitive in the entire country, but it means that _OH-13 is an absolute must-win seat in order to take back the House Majority._

Look, it was the dedication and grassroots support of people like you that fueled our historic victory last November. Hard-working folks across Northeast Ohio chipped in what and when they could because they, too, believed in the future of our home state.

[**Peter, to win a Frontline race like ours, it’s going to require that same level of dedication, support, and belief that a better future is possible. I know we have what it takes to win another ultra-competitive election, but only if this team is by my side. Please, can I count on you to pitch in to our Frontline campaign?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60140116/396130079/-1745762055?refcode=em_fr_2023.03.13_b1_es_all-nd&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NTEyNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkYTYxNTMyZS1lMWMxLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Z3OBK98roSwuXxwwpPImtBx0pbsQfTV4QyRQehH_8s0=)

Emilia

On Friday, March 10, 2023 **Suzan DelBene, DCCC Chair** wrote:

Peter, it’s DCCC Chair Congresswoman Suzan DelBene.

**I wanted you to be the first to know that I just added Emilia Sykes to the DCCC’s list of 2024 Frontline Members** – a list of incredible incumbent Democrats whose victories are essential to taking back the House Majority next November.

I’ve seen Emilia’s leadership firsthand, so trust me when I say we need her voice in Congress, fighting everyday for the hard working families across Northeast Ohio. But with Emilia serving one of the most competitive districts in the country, keeping her in Congress is going to require the full strength of this grassroots team.

[**That’s why I’m personally asking: Will you join me and pitch in $10 to help keep Emilia Sykes in Congress and take back the Democratic Majority?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60140119/396130082/-1745762055?refcode=em_fr_2023.03.13_b1_es_all-nd&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NTEyNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkYTYxNTMyZS1lMWMxLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Z3OBK98roSwuXxwwpPImtBx0pbsQfTV4QyRQehH_8s0=)

**I won’t sugarcoat it: The stakes of taking back the House have never been higher.**

Kevin McCarthy and his MAGA Republican allies have wasted no time in using their Majority to play political games, entertain partisan infighting, and target our most fundamental freedoms. They’ve made it clear that our healthcare, reproductive freedoms, and democracy itself are on the chopping block.

Peter, the stakes of this election are too high to sit on the sidelines. To build on our progress and deliver for the American people, __we have to take back the Speaker’s Gavel.__

**But to do so, we’ll have to protect each and every one of our Frontline Members, starting with Emilia.** I know Emiia has what it takes to deliver another resounding victory for OH-13, but only if this grassroots team comes together in a big way.

I’ve seen Emilia’s leadership firsthand, so trust me when I say we need her voice in Congress, fighting everyday for the hard working families across Northeast Ohio. But with Emilia serving one of the most competitive districts in the country, keeping her in Congress is going to require the full strength of this grassroots team. = | = I won’t sugarcoat it: The stakes of taking back the House have never been higher. subject: I’m running again to defeat Lauren Boebert
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Democratic Party of Georgia
body:
|
---

[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60140216/396130386/227139380?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3ZDMzZGE5NS1lMWMxLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=px8KTb6WpitOCFpqAtgqFuEN-OARFg4ubDezaPrKEb4=&emci=cf9a1613-a5c1-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=7d33da95-e1c1-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=43566853)

| | Peter,

**I am officially running again against Lauren Boebert!**

In 2022, we came just 546 votes short of kicking Boebert out of Congress. It was the closest race in the __entire__ country. **Now, I’m running again to finish the job, but I need you with me from day one:**

[**_Please, will you split a donation between the Democratic Party of Georgia and my campaign to become a Founding Donor to my 2024 campaign to defeat Boebert?_**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60140217/396130387/729998634?refcode=20230313.2_AF_3Z_ND&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3ZDMzZGE5NS1lMWMxLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=px8KTb6WpitOCFpqAtgqFuEN-OARFg4ubDezaPrKEb4=)

No one believed we could pull it off in 2022. All of the pundits said Colorado’s 3rd congressional district was a “Safe Republican” seat. The national Democrats _and_ the national Republicans wrote us off.

But we proved them all wrong.

With Lauren Boebert now on notice, this campaign is going to get even nastier. Her Super PACs and supporters are already spinning lie after lie against me on TV. **I’m counting on you to be able to correct the record and hold Boebert accountable.**

[**_No amount is too small: Click here now to split a donation between my campaign and the Democratic Party of Georgia. It’s important that we have as strong of an early showing as possible._**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60140218/396130388/729998634?refcode=20230313.2_AF_3Z_ND&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3ZDMzZGE5NS1lMWMxLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=px8KTb6WpitOCFpqAtgqFuEN-OARFg4ubDezaPrKEb4=)

I never could have done it last time without supporters and donors like you. I am eternally grateful to have you alongside me again.

With gratitude -
Adam

clean_body: Biden is weaponizing the federal government against America’s parents | Peter, Joe Biden and the Left have been framing innocent Americans like you as the problem just for being concerned parents. The insanity stops now... Parent activists praise Jim Jordan's school board subpoenas Source: Washington Examiner With our new conservative House majority, Jim Jordan and I are fighting back to stop the government’s attack on American families who are concerned about their children’s education. Parents who dissent against the lunacy of the Biden Administration and the radical Left are not enemies of our country – they are the backbone of it. But now the same people whowant to label YOU as the enemy for standing up for your children are targeting me for fighting against their immoral and insane agenda. Thank you, Scott Fitzgerald Congressman (WI-05) Paid for by Scott Fitzgerald for Congress Po Box 5048 Elm Grove, WI 53122

Friend -- I am excited to announce my new role as Executive Director, and to lead the All On The Line team into the next phase of our grassroots movement. As A.G. Holder said on Friday:
* * *
_We started this movement years ago because American voters deserved fair maps representing our diverse communities—and we needed a coordinated strategy to make that happen. Our strategy worked, but the threat to fair maps continues...._
* * *
[**And so must our work.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/60145997/396173779/2009655800?refcode=20230313_AOTL_F_MarinaNews_RedLite&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjQxZTEyZDhjLTAzYzItZWQxMS1hOGUwLTAwMjI0ODMyZTgxMSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=CVUH0vhEF1b--dOxhWAFXn8tNP3LrkRvJPMBRxA7_bA=)
In 2017, I joined this organization as Director of Litigation and Policy. Since then, we have trailblazed the fair maps movement forward in and outside the courts with support from folks like you who are willing to shatter barriers and build a more just America.

Together, our work during the 2021-2022 redistricting cycle led to the fairest U.S. congressional map in 40 years and more fair state legislative maps than in the preceding decade. But we no longer see this fight through the lens of 10 ten-year cycles. This is a constant battle that we must take on day after day.
Active redistricting lawsuits against congressional maps in 14 states could affect as many as 29 seats, making redistricting a significant factor ahead of the 2024 elections. In multiple states, including Texas, North Carolina, and Ohio, congressional and state legislative districts are also anticipated to be redrawn this year.
We are actively organizing using our multifaceted approach as we anticipate decisions in the rehearing for _Harper v. Hall_ and upcoming local elections in states like Wisconsin. **[But to keep up this momentum in 2023 and beyond, we need your help, friend.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/60146005/396173787/2009655800?refcode=20230313_AOTL_F_MarinaNews_RedLite&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjQxZTEyZDhjLTAzYzItZWQxMS1hOGUwLTAwMjI0ODMyZTgxMSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=CVUH0vhEF1b--dOxhWAFXn8tNP3LrkRvJPMBRxA7_bA=)**

[Make a donation to All On The Line](https://click.everyaction.com/k/60146006/396173788/2009655800?refcode=20230313_AOTL_F_MarinaNews_RedLite&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjQxZTEyZDhjLTAzYzItZWQxMS1hOGUwLTAwMjI0ODMyZTgxMSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=CVUH0vhEF1b--dOxhWAFXn8tNP3LrkRvJPMBRxA7_bA=)

I am thankful for all your support.
Onward,
Marina Jenkins
Executive Director

A small number of people broke windows and attacked police officers, and they should be prosecuted. The majority of the protestors were peaceful.

We need to help those January 6th defendants stand up against the Deep State.

That crisis has migrated North...| | | [](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=e89833f9ac814a1c8fc4dadc23b70cb2&_e=JIBEUWLAbQ-Qwm_6qMSqP4WwZYyTwRqI-LZyUDapkFkazuMeXE5jtgftrRO6oG125869XLtULUL5FJ7vbRFv5T2RAUB7PMh0ORMr5OA8gkFLDQEo0tf3myS0A7cenA0O_O_HqOj1SBlNFNHgAIdGuBDQuAK1T3IBMryqaMBnd0POJ0vq8-NtITgLQz_fzCMHbZbNr80IKPVrfX1ziJG07njkbs6ClH4jwLSc8pQrtBNytQzxox713Q6ggTwVgTpcFIa47IhIP0kpRKCprqFH6g%3D%3D)

Peter, I’m Claudia Tenney, a congresswoman representing parts of Western and Upstate New York.
President Biden's open-border radicalism has caused a **_SURGE_** of illegal immigrants to our southern border. **NOW** , that crisis has migrated North and is overwhelming our Northern border.****[**I recently went on**** _Newsmax_****to highlight the situation up here.**](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=e89833f9ac814a1c8fc4dadc23b70cb2&_e=JIBEUWLAbQ-Qwm_6qMSqP4WwZYyTwRqI-LZyUDapkFkazuMeXE5jtgftrRO6oG125869XLtULUL5FJ7vbRFv5T2RAUB7PMh0ORMr5OA8gkFLDQEo0tf3myS0A7cenA0Oh5-3iTgAr5CzD1g0gnZ16FvHmap0BnX1CzA1sRF4y_f5wrqynJtKM1rtO5h7fGmUz4x2WVAlhHhhgRMbIK1HeIBhonkPraFPQp4ApTKmUxBNyZ3UjU7N_Cvuvnir492ZWi3G2gi8dqMu4nHJN4zWrw%3D%3D)

**Here’s what’s unfolding up here:**
* Illegal border crossings have increased by _**846%**_
* Drug smuggling has increased by _**596%**_
* Last year, there were **109,535** border encounters, an almost _**15x increase**._
* Border Patrol staffing has not increased since _**2009**_

To make matters worse, the Northern Border is the _longest international border in the world_ , stretching over 5,525 miles with 115 ports of entry. That's why I've joined the Northern Border Security Caucus — it's long past time we secure our borders! name: Eric Stern, John Fetterman for U.S. Senate
subject: Reaching out to Derek on behalf of Team Fetterman
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
I hope you can see why this is so important.
#
Hey Derek, it's Eric, John Fetterman’s Senior Advisor.
I know you don’t hear from me often, but as I looked over our fundraising this quarter, I knew I had to reach out.
So let me get right to the point: **[Is there anything at all I can say to get you to make your very first donation to our campaign today? Our next FEC end-of-quarter deadline (March 31st) is coming up fast, and we could use a major boost.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20230313-1?refcode=em20230313-1-8287&refcode2=8287_434096_E5KAe8&akid=8287%2E434096%2EE5KAe8)**
Let me start by saying that...
✅ Online fundraising is the main way we support John’s work. A steady stream of small-dollar gifts means that John can spend less time worrying about money, and more time focused on legislating for working people.
✅ At the end of every quarter, we have to publish our fundraising report. It’s really important to be able to show our grassroots team is as strong as ever.
✅ Lots of your fellow supporters are reading this email, too. So even though chipping in $3 or $5 doesn’t feel like much, you’ll be joined by folks all across PA — and together, you’ll make a big impact.
**[Okay, now that I’ve said all that, I have to ask one more time: Can I get you to chip in your very first donation today? We have a big FEC deadline on March 31st.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20230313-1?refcode=em20230313-1-8287&refcode2=8287_434096_E5KAe8&akid=8287%2E434096%2EE5KAe8)**
**[Donate Now »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20230313-1?amount=5&refcode=em20230313-8287&refcode2=8287_434096_E5KAe8&akid=8287%2E434096%2EE5KAe8)**
If you can’t give at all, I get it. Not everyone has extra money to donate to political campaigns. But if you are in a position to give, **[we’d be extremely grateful!](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20230313-1?refcode=em20230313-1-8287&refcode2=8287_434096_E5KAe8&akid=8287%2E434096%2EE5KAe8)** 💛
Thank you for your time,
Eric
Eric Stern
Senior Advisor, Team Fetterman

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-emails?refcode=em20230313-8287-footer&t=1&refcode2=8287_434096_E5KAe8&akid=8287%2E434096%2EE5KAe8)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/JohnFettermanPA/) | [](https://twitter.com/johnfetterman) | [](https://www.instagram.com/johnfetterman/)
Email us: info@johnfetterman.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Fetterman for PA, PO Box 6061, Pittsburgh PA 15211.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.johnfetterman.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.johnfetterman.com/sign/personal_info/?t=2&akid=8287%2E434096%2EE5KAe8)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.johnfetterman.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=3&akid=8287%2E434096%2EE5KAe8)

Paid for by Fetterman for PA.

name: Team Jayapal
subject: The math doesn't add up.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
The Top 1% Have Taken $50 Trillion >From the Bottom 90%.
#
Peter,
[](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/40494?t=1&akid=2267%2E420207%2EYLvaNY)Three years ago, the United States entered the COVID-19 pandemic with several of its own pre-existing conditions — an eroding public health infrastructure, employer-based health insurance, and scarce essential medical supplies resulting in the chaotic and spotty pandemic response we saw in 2020.
Now, three years later, we are just continuing to see the consequences of the pandemic and its cruel, uneven impact on people across the country. The $50 trillion dollar elephant in the room that's not getting enough attention is how COVID-19 worsened extreme income inequality.
Income inequality isn't anything new. But it didn't have to be this way. **_We didn't have to cut taxes for billionaires. We didn't have to deregulate, we didn't have to allow CEOs to manipulate share prices through stock buybacks._**
[**Rather than help those who needed it most,_we_ chose to put the top 1 percent ahead of the bottom 90 percent. This is unacceptable. If you agree, will you pitch in to stand with us and our progressive movement to fight for the bottom 90 percent?**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/40495?refcode=em20230313-2267&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=2267%2E420207%2EYLvaNY)
**[Pitch In $3](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/40495?refcode=em20230313-2267&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&akid=2267%2E420207%2EYLvaNY)**
With this income inequality growing at a rate of $2.5 trillion annually, had this money gone to working families and communities, it would have enabled the majority of Americans to enter 2020 more healthy, financially secure and prepared.
**We have the choice to fix this.** By providing quality healthcare, childcare, advancing worker's rights, and standing up for working class communities, taxing the wealthiest and corporations, we have the ability to start to bridge the $50 trillion dollar income inequality gap and chart a clear path to ensure that this crisis doesn't continue to harm our health and safety.
I know there will be several challenges ahead of us. Republicans have shown us time and time again where there interests lie, and it's not with the American people. However, we will continue to advance our progressive agenda that works for all — with or without Republicans.
[**Will you stand with our progressive coalition and chip in today to advance our bold agenda forward?**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/40495?refcode=em20230313-2267&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=22&akid=2267%2E420207%2EYLvaNY)
**[Chip In $3](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/40495?refcode=em20230313-2267&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=23&akid=2267%2E420207%2EYLvaNY)**
**We're in this together,** and thankful to have your support.
In solidarity,
Team Jayapal

**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-footer?refcode=em20230313-2267-footer&t=24&refcode2=2267_420207_YLvaNY&akid=2267%2E420207%2EYLvaNY)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/pramila.jayapal) | [](https://twitter.com/pramilajayapal) | [](https://www.instagram.com/pramilajayapal/)
Email us: info@pramilaforcongress.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, and small-dollar contributions sustain our movement for transformative change. To contribute by check, please address to Pramila for Congress, PO Box 21912, Seattle, WA 98111.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/did-your-info-change/?t=25&akid=2267%2E420207%2EYLvaNY)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=26&akid=2267%2E420207%2EYLvaNY)

Paid for by Pramila for Congress

name: Katherine Clark
subject: Building the future that our daughters deserve
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CARAVEO FOR CONGRESS
body:
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60141694/396135933/-490439140?amount=8&refcode=em_fr_2023.03.13_b1_kc_all&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjUwOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiMTlmN2YyZS1lN2MxLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=C1fdmzTx6Uoc81Fj-X0Hpoe5qiOC00cFV55nLj6hdmU=) Happy Women’s History Month, Peter!

My name is Katherine Clark, and I proudly serve Massachusetts’ 5th district in Congress. I am also in House leadership serving as the Democratic Whip.

When I first came to Congress in 2013, there weren’t many women serving alongside me. Multiple times, I was stopped and mistaken for someone’s spouse, and I had a hard time even getting into the Chamber.

Thankfully, walking through the halls of Congress in 2023 is much different. **There are more women serving in Congress than ever before — 94 women in the House Democratic Caucus alone!**

I’ve been adamant about helping elect more women to Congress, because the truth is that for generations, we’ve failed to address the persistent challenges faced by women, especially by women of color.

**And with MAGA extremists in the House majority threatening to take us back even further, the stakes of our work couldn’t be higher.**

**[That’s why I’m writing to you today, Peter. We need strong women in Congress, and I’m asking you to support that effort by splitting a contribution between my campaign and Yadira Caraveo to elect more women into office.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60141695/396135934/673652853?amount=8&refcode=em_fr_2023.03.13_b1_kc_all&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjUwOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiMTlmN2YyZS1lN2MxLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=C1fdmzTx6Uoc81Fj-X0Hpoe5qiOC00cFV55nLj6hdmU=)** | _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_

Effective leadership isn’t about individual ambition. It’s about our collective good.

Lifting up others is a core value of mine — I strongly believe that when we elect more women to positions of power, we _all_ do better.

**Together, Yadira and I will continue the fight for gender equity and women’s rights, and with your support, elect even more candidates who are committed to building the kind of country and future that our daughters deserve.**

**[So please, if you can afford to, split a contribution today between my campaign and Yadira Caraveo and help us fulfill the country’s promise of equality and opportunity for all.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60141702/396135941/673652853?amount=8&refcode=em_fr_2023.03.13_b1_kc_all&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjUwOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiMTlmN2YyZS1lN2MxLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=C1fdmzTx6Uoc81Fj-X0Hpoe5qiOC00cFV55nLj6hdmU=)**

Thank you for your support, Peter! I hope you take some time this month to reflect on our achievements, celebrate the women in your life, and recommit to building a stronger, more inclusive America.

All my best,

— Katherine

Representative Katherine Clark
Massachusetts 5th Congressional District
Democratic Whip

name: Tammy Baldwin
subject: Can I share something?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TAMMY BALDWIN FOR SENATE
body:
[ https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/67?t=1001&akid=42%2E35263%2Ejfkqtu ]TAMMY BALDWIN FOR SENATE

Can I share something with you, Peter?

When I first ran for Congress in 1997, no one thought I could win —
especially when an extremely popular challenger jumped into the race.

I remember huddling with one of my staffers at the time, and she said,
“Well Tammy, maybe you want to rethink what you’re doing because it’s
going to be tough.”

I looked her right in the eye and asked, “Do you think I should wait my
turn?”

The next thing I said was this: I believe that women have to run —
especially when it’s hard — and not wait for our turn. We can’t wait until
we get a tap on our shoulder or we’ll never get anywhere.

I ended up winning that race and became the very first woman elected to
the House of Representatives from Wisconsin. It wouldn’t be the last time
this team would make history.

When I ran for U.S. Senate in 2012, folks like you fought alongside me —
even as some others wrote us off. You helped me become the first woman
elected to the chamber from our state and the first openly gay Senator in
our nation’s history.

I understood that this extraordinary opportunity needed to be used to make
a difference in people's lives, and I’ve fought to do that every single
day since.

The reason I’m telling you all of this is because I want you to know that
I ran for office not to make history, but to make a difference. And folks
like you supported me because you wanted to make a difference, too.

Together, I know we will continue to fight for affordable health care, for
living wages, to protect reproductive health care access, and for everyone
who has been written off, counted out, or left behind. Now, I'm asking you
to keep going.

[ http://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/694?t=1004&akid=42%2E35263%2Ejfkqtu ]Will you double down on your commitment to the movement that will
continue to fight for what’s right? With my Senate seat up for re-election
next year, I would appreciate your contribution.

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your
donation will go through immediately:

[ https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/695?t=1005&akid=42%2E35263%2Ejfkqtu ]CHIP IN $3 NOW

[ https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/696?t=1006&akid=42%2E35263%2Ejfkqtu ]CHIP IN $10 NOW

[ https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/697?t=1007&akid=42%2E35263%2Ejfkqtu ]CHIP IN $25 NOW

[ https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/698?t=1008&akid=42%2E35263%2Ejfkqtu ]CHIP IN $50 NOW

[ https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/699?t=1009&akid=42%2E35263%2Ejfkqtu ]CHIP IN $100 NOW

[ https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/700?t=1010&akid=42%2E35263%2Ejfkqtu ]ANOTHER AMOUNT

Your support has made all the difference time and time
again, Peter, and I
can’t thank you enough for that.

I’m so glad to have you on this historic team.

— Tammy

P.O. BOX 696 MADISON, WI 53701

[ https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/67?t=1002&akid=42%2E35263%2Ejfkqtu ]www.tammybaldwin.com | [ mailto:INFO@tammybaldwin.com ]INFO@TAMMYBALDWIN.COM | [ https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/68?t=1003&akid=42%2E35263%2Ejfkqtu ]Privacy Policy

name: Replace Sinema
subject: 🚨🚨🚨Sinema’s role in the Silicon Valley Bank crash 🚨🚨🚨
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Change for Arizona 2024 PAC
body:
Sinema previously voted to rollback oversight on big banks. | |
---
Peter – This past weekend the Silicon Valley Bank collapsed, sending investors’ into a panic. The crash occurred in part to a plunge in the value of bonds acquired during boom times, when the bank had a lot of customer deposits coming in and needed somewhere to park the cash. However, US banks were sitting on $620 billion in unrealized losses at the end of 2022–as the Federal Reserve hikes rates to fight inflation, the bonds declined in value. After the market crashed in 2008 there were several pieces of legislation put into place to **avoid another crisis and give more oversight into the wrongdoing and systemic risks posed by big banks.** Unsurprisingly given her endless work to make billionaires richer, **Sinema has VOTED REPEATEDLY to make it more difficult to regulate banks and other financial institutions.** In 2017 and 2018, she was part of the group of lawmakers who voted to undermine Dodd-Frank, and to rollback safeguards put in place after the crisis to keep the Federal Reserve vigilant against instability. **[Help us let Arizona know why we need to replace her in 2024 by running our new ad **Sinema’s Wall Street ties always have been, and always will be, more of a priority than what’s best for Arizona.**

Not only did Sinema vote to rollback regulations on big banks, she voted for legislation that would make policing them **_DRAMATICALLY_** more difficult, including central elements of bank supervision like stress tests. **Sinema also supported legislation that would reduce the capital big banks must hold to protect the financial system. Good, more for her!**
Time and again Sinema has voted to protect big banks, Wall Street, private equity, saving them BILLIONS in the process. Sinema can claim independence all she wants–but we all know who she’s beholden to, and it’s not the people who put her in office.
Sinema could jeopardize a Democrats’ chances of winning in Arizona and our Senate majority, all while she rakes in Wall Street donations. **[We have to let everyone in Arizona know what’s at stake, make a contribution to help us get the word out now >>](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zJ5XI6YHChR2bS-m44B_fcsBErxRWM1hKhxetxNSiCoTsiocUg1JsO3jGlUDMhD07IdTDcnK1BQ8hsxdwbWlT24USxPHvSKfDvisO_98wvr1A52rgGFFl4zieCUa91ywHgz6z9DmqlvQ_EWIJ-rCa52vRCrYLFcfZcPOm-L3AP9rVzqTairewPWxH1_wu4A5K4LE6OXpwFa_uZCjMQJvhiGA2-xkxtEXMNCFv-1IV2YGDWWeAJNpk4tIfsQHseMwJ2X54ThBE597i18eodLZxanwJFzGhoe_gD0hvO9_p1E1R5plCqId6QKSAgNmZnvVVI6fCeAvwIYULouXVkmqGcXLeH6BBldgaa7NKvMYUIDWN-D019TKfLkDxdWncq_JD3Nj-LpIB7t32AR1Pm5YMfheDJdR5MhjuzqtBZdNH-oA/3ug/wf1dWAB6QIqmQ4ZVuby67A/h7/rytOou0W-6h1NCfSetwDL8wfFJNSZn_LYZz7IVLduSw)**

clean_body: Sinema previously voted to rollback oversight on big banks. | | Peter – This past weekend the Silicon Valley Bank collapsed, sending investors’ into a panic. The crash occurred in part to a plunge in the value of bonds acquired during boom times, when the bank had a lot of customer deposits coming in and needed somewhere to park the cash. However, US banks were sitting on $620 billion in unrealized losses at the end of 2022–as the Federal Reserve hikes rates to fight inflation, the bonds declined in value. After the market crashed in 2008 there were several pieces of legislation put into place to avoid another crisis and give more oversight into the wrongdoing and systemic risks posed by big banks. Unsurprisingly given her endless work to make billionaires richer, Sinema has VOTED REPEATEDLY to make it more difficult to regulate banks and other financial institutions. In 2017 and 2018, she was part of the group of lawmakers who voted to undermine Dodd-Frank, and to rollback safeguards put in place after the crisis to keep the Federal Reserve vigilant against instability. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your secure donation will go through immediately: | | | | | | | | | | Sinema’s Wall Street ties always have been, and always will be, more of a priority than what’s best for Arizona. Sinema also supported legislation that would reduce the capital big banks must hold to protect the financial system. Good, more for her! name: Katie Porter
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Katie Porter for Senate
body:
# [](https://act.katieporter.com/go/14558?t=1&akid=19317%2E3422442%2EMvxqnX)
Derek,
If you are a long-time Porter Supporter (thank you!), then you’ve probably heard me say that Congress is about as popular as a cockroach. Well, that is literally true. Just take a look at this headline:
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20230313-1?amount=5&refcode=EMAF13_1_COC_20230313_V1_F&refcode2=19317_3422442_MvxqnX&akid=19317%2E3422442%2EMvxqnX)
This isn’t a new feeling, either—that headline is actually from 2013! But I know those feelings still hold true today. I hear it from my constituents during town halls, from Porter Supporters across the country, and from my own family when they question me about rising egg prices and unchecked corporate greed.
**I’m running for the U.S. Senate to be a warrior for the families who are being left behind by the bought-and-paid-for politicians whose campaigns are funded by corporate PACs and federal lobbyists.[If you’re ready to send a single working mom (who has never taken a dime from corporate PACs!) to the Senate, please chip in $5 today.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20230313-1?amount=5&refcode=EMAF13_1_COC_20230313_V1_F&refcode2=19317_3422442_MvxqnX&akid=19317%2E3422442%2EMvxqnX)**
**[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20230313-1?amount=5&refcode=EMAF13_1_COC_20230313_V1_F&refcode2=19317_3422442_MvxqnX&akid=19317%2E3422442%2EMvxqnX)**
I can’t blame anyone for not trusting Congress. Just look at George Santos—who lied to get elected and can’t seem to stop lying. Or at the extremist Republicans whose demands kept Congress without a Speaker for a week.
I work for the people who don’t have millions of dollars to buy a vote in Congress. Folks who have to sit down at the kitchen table and budget out their meals, childcare, and medical costs, like I do with my kids. Folks who chip in $3 or $10 at a time towards campaigns like ours, because they believe in our mission and vision for a better future.
So today, I’m asking: **[Can you help send me to the U.S. Senate by making a donation of whatever you can afford today?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20230313-1?amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&refcode=EMAF13_1_COC_20230313_V1_F&refcode2=19317_3422442_MvxqnX&akid=19317%2E3422442%2EMvxqnX)**
Thanks for your support,
Katie

Katie is running for the U.S. Senate because Californians deserve a warrior fighting for them in Washington. Our campaign is people-powered, we don’t take a dime from corporate PACs, federal lobbyists, or executives from Big Oil or Big Pharma. **[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-footer?refcode=EMAF13_1_COC_20230313_V1_F&t=2&refcode2=19317_3422442_MvxqnX&akid=19317%2E3422442%2EMvxqnX)**

name: Elissa Slotkin
subject: FEC deadlines, explained
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Elissa Slotkin for Michigan
body:
Team,

We’re right around the corner from our first big Federal Election Commission deadline: At the end of this month, we’ll have our first ‘end-of-quarter’ deadline of this U.S. Senate campaign.

Let me quickly explain what this actually means.

Each year, candidates running for federal office face four quarterly deadlines. After these deadlines pass, so in this case on March 31st, we are legally required to report how much money we’ve raised, and from how many individual contributions.

These quarterly deadlines are treated by political folks as a strength test of a new campaign: lots of early support from a large number of individual supporters? Your campaign appears on track. Not meeting internal goals and only raising from a few folks? Not a great start.

But for a campaign like mine, this deadline is particularly important: I’m not taking any money from corporate PACs to fund this campaign.
It’s a pledge I made in my very first campaign for elected office in 2018, and it’s one I’ve stuck to. That’s because I never wanted anyone to wonder if I voted a certain way because of donations a corporate PAC made.

That’s why I’m working hard to ensure the FEC report we file on March 31st shows the strength of our grassroots supporters. And that strength comes from people like you donating to emails like these.

So please, will you consider making a contribution to my Senate campaign today?

CONTRIBUTE: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ebs-em-mar23?refcode=em230313-1-ngp-7500

THANK YOU for your support – I couldn’t do this without you!

- Elissa

name: Tim Burchett
subject: Coming to you from the southern border❗
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Burchett for Congress** [Unsubscribe](http://links
body:
| | | |
---
| | [](http://links.burchettforcongress.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=b02a0e0aed3e4412bffa3acaae3e36a2&_e=lSTNN0Vg18qVgRrXubwmy4ffwoHEHtyyFf1uPOGEEexIiIZ5eWWS0mJUgmSAUxRd_nlMs-DnxUCiKExENGncG67wqwHCKzyRbYeQe42kxdSUAng5xj7d0FyeHQYOygOACNk3uvVHa7cjlC_bm2MiMSoqIv39J_wrULiD39ITiy2EM03h_lEG9go1slkx0M18UdmBWRT5SkD5wC4T3vVLGw8PL8zub983j5ULhNpHlwkGTtBvY4d7Kz5dsnki9meZtKN3vQediuipb1p3gqsweI6kNsqe-t1HHaF35iKRb45DNcvkL99Zstgwkvn9QCWYwY2atkajP8faUnETU0iMhA%3D%3D)
---
| | |
---
| | Friend, The situation at our southern border is a full-fledged crisis. How do I know? I’m watching it play out right in front of me. I decided to come down here for a visit, and let me tell you, it’s an eye-opening experience...
---
[](http://links.burchettforcongress.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=b02a0e0aed3e4412bffa3acaae3e36a2&_e=lSTNN0Vg18qVgRrXubwmy4ffwoHEHtyyFf1uPOGEEexIiIZ5eWWS0mJUgmSAUxRd_nlMs-DnxUCiKExENGncG67wqwHCKzyRbYeQe42kxdSUAng5xj7d0FyeHQYOygOACNk3uvVHa7cjlC_bm2MiMSoqIv39J_wrULiD39ITiy2EM03h_lEG9go1slkx0M18mxGqJ2Gw5Ew3u5UoKWCKMEYNO6kbXl7jKgFApZWFMc_BnBEqg6feJrrO5N8hee7hEG0b2xQlhWVMbvIuYbKZVDjTzHkTNqZKdUOH7V4JK1r9B5ltYzpK2VYeE1faqDSFggFADYRnwC7XfBh7VHgwSA%3D%3D)
---
Cartels are bringing small children across the border (for God knows what), and our agents are missing critical resources they need to do their jobs. They are outgunned, outmanned, and even outdroned. Yes, you read that correctly. Smugglers are using drones to spy on OUR agents, exploiting their weaknesses and finding new ways to overwhelm them. [**We can’t continue to allow this madness to unfold right before our eyes.**](http://links.burchettforcongress.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=b02a0e0aed3e4412bffa3acaae3e36a2&_e=lSTNN0Vg18qVgRrXubwmy4ffwoHEHtyyFf1uPOGEEexIiIZ5eWWS0mJUgmSAUxRd_nlMs-DnxUCiKExENGncG67wqwHCKzyRbYeQe42kxdSUAng5xj7d0FyeHQYOygOACNk3uvVHa7cjlC_bm2MiMSoqIv39J_wrULiD39ITiy2EM03h_lEG9go1slkx0M18-dPG1bYCdXJiFy792FT15_TV2eCjhStFc6b3CrlM9I7UASR98rQs2w_eq1NQVPFiecKv29o0cpIuwjdrxu8tFv2Ah6gxhs0sZ0jIzDdlj4UDubfm1SJOpCwzrVldw7TUP4BHTugRbQ8e2P_suv_iVQ%3D%3D) Last Congress, Democrats didn’t hold a single hearing on the crisis at the border. name: Rand Paul
subject: Taking the fight to corrupt teachers unions
body:
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62428894:6u94XfGsN:m:1:3331421248:26B62B4E394718F82474C3E142A549E1:r)
Peter,

Socialists are teaching your children to hate America.

They have taken over classrooms and indoctrinated hundreds of thousands of students with Critical Race Theory. They would rather focus lessons on pronouns and gender identity than teach trade skills, science, or basic math.

_It's no wonder our kids have developed the highest levels of anxiety and depression in the world._

I'd like to introduce you to an organization that is leading the fight to take back our school boards from the radical Left and protect our children, **Parents Union of America (PUOA).**

I just talked with Jessi Melton, President of PUOA, and told her that I would reach out to my supporters and help raise $15,000 this week to fund their efforts.

[_**Can I count on you to share my support for PUOA? Click here to donate any amount today >>>**_](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62428894:6u94XfGsN:m:1:3331421248:26B62B4E394718F82474C3E142A549E1:r)

I want to share a message from PUOA:

_**" We stand as a counter-offensive **__**against the powerful, agenda-driven Teachers' Union**_ _**, which has systematically sought to destroy wholesome American values and indoctrinate our children. "**_

_Parents Union of America is the ANTI teachers-union_.

Their mission is to target the most populous school districts and remove the incompetent school board members put in place by the Anti-American, corrupt Teachers' Union.

**I, for one, am sick and tired of socialists indoctrinating our children. And the corrupt Teacher Unions are to blame.**

We can't allow the same people who turn a blind eye to inappropriate textbook material and socialist indoctrination to remain in charge of American schools.

[_**Will you join the fight to save America 's schools from the corrupt Teacher's Union? Please send your urgent donation NOW >>> **_](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62428894:6u94XfGsN:m:1:3331421248:26B62B4E394718F82474C3E142A549E1:r)

PUOA does more than fight to remove corrupt school board members. They work to fill school boards with America-First candidates and parents.

They plan to replace corrupt school board members with America-First candidates. They recruit and train conservative candidates and raise money to get them elected. These candidates MUST display the ability and willingness to fight for conservative values by going on the offensive.

**Parents Union of America refuses to stay on the defensive when our children are involved. **

I know this is a lot to ask, but can you help me keep my promise to raise $15,000 this week for Parents Union of America?

** Click below to send your gift.**
[_**Donate $25**_](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62428895:6u94XfGsN:m:1:3331421248:26B62B4E394718F82474C3E142A549E1:r)
[_**Donate $50**_](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62428896:6u94XfGsN:m:1:3331421248:26B62B4E394718F82474C3E142A549E1:r)
[_**Donate $100**_](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62428897:6u94XfGsN:m:1:3331421248:26B62B4E394718F82474C3E142A549E1:r)
[_**Donate $250**_](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62428898:6u94XfGsN:m:1:3331421248:26B62B4E394718F82474C3E142A549E1:r)
[_**Donate $500**_](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62428899:6u94XfGsN:m:1:3331421248:26B62B4E394718F82474C3E142A549E1:r)
[_**Donate $1,000**_](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62428900:6u94XfGsN:m:1:3331421248:26B62B4E394718F82474C3E142A549E1:r)
[_**Donate $2,500**_](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62428901:6u94XfGsN:m:1:3331421248:26B62B4E394718F82474C3E142A549E1:r)
[_**Donate Any Amount**_](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62428894:6u94XfGsN:m:1:3331421248:26B62B4E394718F82474C3E142A549E1:r)

Thank you,

Senator Rand Paul

| | Fellow Conservative, The 2001 Authorization for the Use of Military Force was _originally_ intended to go after those who attacked America on September 11th. But for the last **_TWO DECADES_ ,** presidents utilized the resolution to justify military operations in more than 20 countries and against groups that did NOT exist before 9/11. When the bill came to a vote, guess what the results were... **_One vote (me) to end the never-ending wars and 20 votes for continuing to write check after check to fund these wars._** _[**Chip in now to stand with me and tell the Democrats – and Neocons – we’re tired of their never-ending wars. **](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=1162527b084643bbac9a9e6585fc5e5d&_e=RMz9YmITTLEq8Zl2PcEm-XSPmmU3rVWdqH7oWfUmfLoteX2McmcHjrM8vvS4aLcD9k25HltpY9CvOM0a2J0KxRtSvBfBJe70MB-5DCZfckKaN2E7j-5J7atjhzdE2MvjjCngda31BRq7kACb7azHuT7D_UyV7DCG2pciuG2zWy7Prp73oXzHQhR83LNQHY98ORV25dZUXBmhKXChfVOqghn58zR_RWhfsQQN2U5onRQGNFvSwUa6bDsG4BAqEH8c5AcXSK4ZsaqhQEUpqSPy4POLZ0vc9Yo5jPIoaEc6v7Mry_bHZwBje8V0nf4bOAe5gyYGp1z4M27lSNu1ohKsgQ%3D%3D)_

clean_body: The 2001 Authorization for the Use of Military Force was originally intended to go after those who attacked America on September 11th. | | | | | | Fellow Conservative, The 2001 Authorization for the Use of Military Force was originally intended to go after those who attacked America on September 11th. But for the last TWO DECADES , presidents utilized the resolution to justify military operations in more than 20 countries and against groups that did NOT exist before 9/11. When the bill came to a vote, guess what the results were... One vote (me) to end the never-ending wars and 20 votes for continuing to write check after check to fund these wars. | | | | We can’t afford to continue sending our sons and daughters into harm’s way simply because Democrats and the Neocons enjoy supporting the military-industrial complex. It’s time to end this madness once and for all. subject: Our mission is simple, but we need you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by United Rural Democrats](https://click
body:
You're one of the first to see this, Peter. | | | Hi Peter – We wanted you to be one of the first people to see our mission for 2023. **_United Rural Democrats 2023 Mission_** ✅ Build rural coalitions that persist.
✅ Educate, empower, and activate rural voters.
✅ More dialogues between DC insiders and small towns.
✅ Invest in rural America so we regain our majority.

subject: What do you want to see from our emails?

#
---
Peter, We are so grateful for your support of Tina throughout her campaign and during her first two months as Governor. Everything we have accomplished so far, and everything we are yet to achieve, is all thanks to this team. We want to ensure we keep in touch during Tina’s first year in office, and we believe our emails are the best way to do that. It’s important to us, though, that we take into account what YOU want to see from these emails we send. [_**That’s why we’re asking you to take just a few minutes to fill out our brief email preferences survey. name: State Dems HQ
subject: We need local Democrats to come forward to help with these critical elections
body:
There is no doubt that state Democrats have been having a historic year with special elections – but we can’t rest on our laurels | | |
---
| | We’re riding high on a ten-win special election streak, but we still have a lot ahead in the coming months. Here’s where we stand in the states: → In a few short weeks, we are facing a crucial special election in the Virginia Senate, where state Democrats currently hold a razor-thin majority! Any loss could give the GOP a gripping advantage. → And in New Hampshire, we’re gearing up for a special election that could help close the gap between the nearly-tied chamber. → Finally, Trump’s election-denying crony Daniel Kelly is _officially on the ballot_ for Wisconsin’s pivotal Supreme Court race that will have an important impact on abortion access and elections in the state. [With just a few short weeks before we face some of these challenges, we need all hands on deck. clean_body: There is no doubt that state Democrats have been having a historic year with special elections – but we can’t rest on our laurels | | | | | We’re riding high on a ten-win special election streak, but we still have a lot ahead in the coming months. Here’s where we stand in the states: → In a few short weeks, we are facing a crucial special election in the Virginia Senate, where state Democrats currently hold a razor-thin majority! Any loss could give the GOP a gripping advantage. → And in New Hampshire, we’re gearing up for a special election that could help close the gap between the nearly-tied chamber. → Finally, Trump’s election-denying crony Daniel Kelly is officially on the ballot for Wisconsin’s pivotal Supreme Court race that will have an important impact on abortion access and elections in the state. | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately. | | | | | The truth is: If every Democrat from your state stepped up and donated $7 right now, we would be able to do so much more for state Democrats! But that won’t happen, so we are asking you now: Let’s go win more special elections! name: CaucusRoom
subject: It's a Kangaroo Court!
body:
Bank failure upsets the stock market. No images? [Click here](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-e-qktyhul-trhiujldw-e/) [](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-qktyhul-trhiujldw-r/)
## **Happy Monday! **
[](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-qktyhul-trhiujldw-y/) [Schedule a CaucusRoom Live demo today!](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-qktyhul-trhiujldw-j/) **Bank Failure Upsets Stock Market** **[The sudden collapse of Silicon Valley Bank has sent financial markets into a frenzy](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-qktyhul-trhiujldw-t/), **as experts warn it may not be a 'one off' and brace for the next domino to fall. **Learn from China** U.S. Department of Energy Secretary Jennifer Granholm**[claimed that Americans can "learn from what China is doing" in combating climate change](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-qktyhul-trhiujldw-i/).** **14 Different Nations** Tucson Sector Border Patrol officials report capturing a large migrant group who crossed the border in Arizona.**[The group of 235 migrants were made up of citizens from 14 different nations and included children](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-qktyhul-trhiujldw-d/).** **Kangaroo Court** January 6th committee chair **[admitted the panel never actually analyzed the crucial footage from inside the capitol](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-qktyhul-trhiujldw-h/)**. **Third Party Option?** A political party has won ballot access in three states, [**aiming to offer voters a viable third-party option for president in 2024**](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-qktyhul-trhiujldw-k/). **They Hate America** MSNBC editor Zeeshan Aleem [**recently condemned "Top Gun: Maverick" as the "most insidious movie" at the Oscars" because it shows the U.S. military as a "beacon of virtue."**](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-qktyhul-trhiujldw-u/)

**Let****'s[ have a good laugh](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-qktyhul-trhiujldw-o/)!**
* **[New rule](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-qktyhul-trhiujldw-x/)** for the Senate
* Those **[dog mixes](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-qktyhul-trhiujldw-m/)** are tricky.
* **[Twins](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-qktyhul-trhiujldw-c/)**.
* **[So Rich](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-qktyhul-trhiujldw-q/)**!

[](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-qktyhul-trhiujldw-a/)[](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-qktyhul-trhiujldw-f/)[](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-qktyhul-trhiujldw-z/) [](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-qktyhul-trhiujldw-v/) | CaucusRoom, LLC
800 Washington Ave Ste C
Golden, CO 80401 You are receiving this email because you are a valued member of CaucusRoom [Preferences](https://caucusroom.updatemyprofile.com/i-qktyhul-6F882DBF-trhiujldw-s) | [Unsubscribe](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-u-qktyhul-trhiujldw-g/)

name: Ret. Navy SEALs Zinke, Van Orden, and Crane
subject: (3) New Messages

body:
We have messages from three Navy SEALs who are serving the American people in Congress:

|
---
| | [Unsubscribe](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_s=294dfa74804540ea9221c8aebae69dec&_t=X2CNXgSAzanfAmPYNcz5LaG3eAKT5QWkisEI6WzNHqePHcigrBn9DELI1Fpbyf5EiSTx_F7eDYdUFHIEJFsVVjFL1f4HxJ5jAy6t28ZNrNg%3D) | [Mark as Junk](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_s=294dfa74804540ea9221c8aebae69dec&_t=X2CNXgSAzanfAmPYNcz5LaG3eAKT5QWkisEI6WzNHqePHcigrBn9DELI1Fpbyf5EiSTx_F7eDYdUFHIEJFsVVjFL1f4HxJ5jAy6t28ZNrNg%3D)

| **Fellow Conservative, we have messages from three Navy SEALs who are serving the American people in Congress:**
"I was first elected to the House in 2014, and then I served as Secretary of the Interior in 2017, promoting energy independence and land conservation. I'm back in the House, but this time, I have some fellow SEALs to help me shake things up. My last race was separated by 3%, and I need resources to hold onto this seat."

**- Ryan Zinke**

"I grew up on food stamps, but my mom taught me how to pull myself up by the bootstraps. I enlisted in the Navy and became a Navy SEAL, retiring as a senior chief. The first time I ran for the House, I lost, but my mom didn't raise a quitter, so once again, I pulled myself up by the bootstraps and won in 2022. It's the first time it's flipped blue in over 25 years, and I'm going to need all the help I can get to keep it red."

**- Derrick Van Orden**

"I've been on five war-time deployments, defending our way of life against some of the worst odds. I'm also a small business owner, so I know the burden that Joe Biden's economic policies have put on America's mom and pop shops across the country. I'm from Arizona where fewer and fewer Republicans are able to win each year, and I need your help to secure a win for conservatives next time around."

**- Eli Crane**
**[These Navy SEALs are in races that will cost serious money, so we are pleading with you to split a donation between these three strong conservatives who bravely served our country and are serving our country again in the U.S. House of Representatives:](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=294dfa74804540ea9221c8aebae69dec&_e=WzpOMmvZSXmu_DWBZhhl81WToi9-h6X5PWadF7UM5qUyulQsPWt3qLZ_fAlGCJiT16lVTNvh3-5U-gGe2l71QNGJmTxGxy4yt3cXdkhiBAh6d3TgRnF9Sacq2oD_oCkwGa6uANEmJXuzoKyVFwzgSb51nLUSfHnuW2RLAB4DAz7-jX3eYIr9zE9WnGk1iilgudGsRuXMyriTR7b9xm1ASt_J-RzQ1QvAg_uZb7BMNFhuHIQT7pXbyJRoxIXxQBm2DfgEEo7NHScJ_8PyytccUpx35oCfSiXJv7fbSJ_2zaKnyUYuZG6yexYcrSvnlRC-MoYm9Gn0I2amXKHzyAleBm3ofmDIC40HP8L4_RV3vvUpUo7Emqqz6lE5twtP4vzkQGulI8ppyGJG6KKvps9vJw%3D%3D "These Navy SEALs are in races that will cost serious money, so we are pleading with you to split a donation between these three strong conservatives who bravely served our country and are serving our country again in the U.S. House of Representatives:")**

YOUR MISSION: Help me lead the fight against the Radical Left and their Democrat allies. | "ACCEPT DERRICK’S MISSION" This mission is critical to getting our country back on track. "I’m counting on brave patriots like you to step up and join me in this fight."** | | | USE OF DERRICK VAN ORDEN'S MILITARY RANK, JOB TITLES AND PHOTOGRAPHS IN UNIFORM DOES NOT IMPLY ENDORSEMENT BY THE DEPARTMENT OF THE NAVY OR THE DEPARTMENT OF DEFENSE. | Paid for by Van Orden for Congress PO Box 565 Prairie du Chien, WI 53821

_POLITICO_ called this race _"the most important election nobody’s ever heard of,"_ **and it matters for anyone who wants to protect abortion rights and stop far-right extremists from overturning our elections.**

Judge Janet Protasiewicz became the official Democratic Nominee for a 10-year team on the WI Supreme Court tied 3-3 between conservatives and progressives. **Wisconsin's Supreme Court barely accepted the results of the 2020 election, and if Judge Janet's opponent were on the bench, they would've undemocratically handed this swing state to Donald Trump.**

**We don’t need to tell you that in 2024, Republicans could try the same bogus claims of election fraud all across the country to get a fair election overturned.**

[**_Peter, we can’t let Dan Kelly, Judge Janet’s MAGA extremist opponent, be the one to decide the 2024 presidential election. name: LCV Rapid Response
subject: Biden APPROVES devastating Willow oil drilling project. Here's what happens next:
body:
Help us reach 5,000 comments to overcome corporate polluters.? Tell the EPA:
PROTECT COMMUNITIES FROM CHEMICAL DISASTERS
The EPA is now seeking public input on a new rule to require industrial facilities to disclose the hazardous chemical risks posed by their operations, take stronger actions to prevent accidents, and move quickly should an accident occur.

Corporate polluters have already killed this rule once, when Trump decided to allow these dangerous facilities to operate in secrecy. We cannot allow them to succeed again.

GOAL: 5,000 actions
TAKE ACTION https://links.messages.lcv. ? ?
? Peter ? a critical new rule from Biden's EPA would finally require dangerous industrial facilities to disclose any hazardous chemicals they contain ? and take steps to prevent and mitigate harmful accidents.

This rule will especially protect people living closest to these facilities, which are overwhelmingly low-wealth communities and communities of color, as well as workers. Decades of environmental racism ensured these hazardous facilities were located in the neighborhoods with the least resources to fight back, meaning these frontline communities are disproportionately exposed to chemical accidents and harmful pollutants that have jeopardized their health.

Here's the problem: powerful interests, like the oil and gas industry and the chemical industry, are demanding the EPA once again abandon these important protections. Unless our movement speaks up right now, we may miss out on this opportunity to advance environmental justice and worker safety, and create healthier communities and workplaces.

Please TAKE ACTION right now to protect communities from chemical hazards. To beat the chemical industry, we need to urgently deliver 5,000 comments supporting the EPA's proposed rule. https://links.messages.lcv.org/els/v2/-LXrB9~3q8T3/YnBKOTBpUmMzbEljSVJGWityb3U2VkN6aGZLUmlGczlpa3B3Q3pQSWEzQ2VNMVVXbVVpbmpKakVDWHVSVHZsREtpcWE1Z2p1engvdGxCbkhQc21yanJ1eGpNcHpNYkJsWlJXTmg4THdvKzQ9S0/OEZlSzR0MjAzMzRQU1MzQ1F0OHJ5Z3BqSXNWT1F4Znl4ZEptRzdjNE1SMzNxMVpreEUvd0xORHBPenp0dW1MeWtqZ3FHVEZLNjZoK3I2WFBlcncwSURVc1kvTklTR0E4MkpZZkxjL1JMc289S0

We've already seen the dangers these facilities can pose. In 2013, an explosion of ammonium nitrate fertilizer killed 15 people and destroyed a school, nursing home, and many homes in the city of West, Texas. The Obama administration began a painstaking process to prevent similar disasters, culminating in enhanced protections for minimizing and managing chemical risks.

But after an aggressive campaign from the chemical industry and other corporate polluters, the Trump administration abandoned the rule, choosing to prioritize corporate profits over the health of vulnerable communities and workers.

Under President Biden, the EPA can now reverse this dangerous decision and finally help protect people, especially environmental justice communities, from hazardous pollution and chemical disasters.

Don't let corporate polluters undermine critical environment protections. TAKE ACTION now to help us deliver 5,000 comments supporting environmental justice and corporate accountability. https://links.messages.lcv.org/els/v2/k_

Thank you for taking action to protect people and workers from environmental disasters.

Sincerely,

Madeleine Foote
Deputy Legislative Director
League of Conservation Voters ? ? ? ? ? This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If this isn't the best email address at which to reach you, update your contact information https://www.pages08.net/leagueofconservationvoters/forms/ContactInformation?spMailingID=9287806&spUserID=NjA3MDU0MTAzNTc3S0&spJobID=MTcwMDM1MzQ4MAS2&spReportId=MTcwMDM1MzQ4MAS2. Click here to unsubscribe https://www.pages08.net/leagueofconservationvoters/forms/Unsubscribe?spMailingID=9287806&spUserID=NjA3MDU0MTAzNTc3S0&spJobID=MTcwMDM1MzQ4MAS2&spReportId=MTcwMDM1MzQ4MAS2 from our supporter list. Send us any comments, criticisms, or feedback here mailto:feedback@lcv.org?subject=, or just reply to this email! Thanks for your support.

740 15th St NW, 7th Floor
Washington, DC 20005
202-785-8683 https://links.messages.lcv.org/els/v2/bxyvTq-Rm4fV/YnBKOTBpUmMzbEljSVJGWityb3U2VkN6aGZLUmlGczlpa3B3Q3pQSWEzQ2VNMVVXbVVpbmpKakVDWHVSVHZsREtpcWE1Z2p1engvdGxCbkhQc21yanJ1eGpNcHpNYkJsWlJXTmg4THdvKzQ9S0/OEZlSzR0MjAzMzRQU1MzQ1F0OHJ5Z3BqSXNWT1F4Znl4ZEptRzdjNE1SMzNxMVpreEUvd0xORHBPenp0dW1MeWtqZ3FHVEZLNjZoK3I2WFBlcncwSURVc1kvTklTR0E4MkpZZkxjL1JMc289S0 ? ? ? ? https://links.messages.lcv.org/els/v2/Ap9dcY7ZmqTa/YnBKOTBpUmMzbEljSVJGWityb3U2VkN6aGZLUmlGczlpa3B3Q3pQSWEzQ2VNMVVXbVVpbmpKakVDWHVSVHZsREtpcWE1Z2p1engvdGxCbkhQc21yanJ1eGpNcHpNYkJsWlJXTmg4THdvKzQ9S0/

Don't let corporate polluters undermine critical environment protections. TAKE ACTION now to help us deliver 5,000 comments supporting environmental justice and corporate accountability. Thank you for taking action to protect people and workers from environmental disasters. Sincerely, Madeleine Foote Deputy Legislative Director League of Conservation Voters ? ? ? ? ? Send us any comments, criticisms, or feedback here mailto:feedback@lcv.org?subject=, or just reply to this email! Thanks for your support. 740 15th St NW, 7th Floor Washington, DC 20005 202-785-8683 ? ? ? ?

name: =?utf-8?Q?Derek=20Lyons=20=2D=20RITE?=
subject: RITE Launches Accountability Initiatives in Key States
disclaimer_text: paid for by liberal front groups Center for Tech and Civic Life (CTCL) and the U
body:
Initiatives are underway in several key states to block liberal groups from undermining election integrity safeguards. | | |
---
| |
---
| Welcome to all the new subscribers! If you like what you’re reading, **[forward this newsletter to friends and colleagues](https://us12.forward-to-friend.com/forward?u=dc5917dfc5aa19cc3795efbb2&id=2006b58ece&e=ea91f782ea)** and ask them to **[sign up to receive updates](https://riteusa.us12.list-manage.com/subscribe?u=dc5917dfc5aa19cc3795efbb2&id=735bdaf382)** from RITE.

We’ve just launched new accountability initiatives to block liberal groups from undermining election integrity safeguards in several key states. Read more ⬇️ ⬇️ ⬇️
---
|
---
|
## 1\. 🗳️RITE Backs Challenge to Non-Citizen Voting in Vermont
RITE is supporting two concerned Winooski, VT citizens to pursue a constitutional challenge to noncitizen voting in their community. The City of Winooski allows noncitizens to vote in municipal elections despite voters addressing questions about state-funded programs like public school education.
* **[The Associated Press](https://riteusa.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=dc5917dfc5aa19cc3795efbb2&id=480605ee39&e=ea91f782ea)** : _“The Vermont Constitution draws a clear line that noncitizens are ineligible to vote in elections with statewide implications, which include questions about state-funded programs like public school education,” said Derek Lyons, the CEO and president of Restoring Integrity and Trust in Elections, which is funding the lawsuit._

Noncitizen voting is the new frontier of liberal efforts to corrupt the democratic process at the heart of our republic. They are taking a page from the classic left-wing playbook by planting the seeds of a fringe policy in friendly local governments, with the hope that it will sprout to other states across the country and eventually even for federal elections. RITE is working in Vermont because it is on the front lines of this battle.

The Vermont Constitution clearly states that noncitizens are ineligible to vote in elections with statewide implications.
* In 2021, the Vermont legislature approved local charters adopted by Montpelier and Winooski, allowing noncitizens to vote in local elections.
* On Tuesday, March 7, Burlington voters approved a measure allowing noncitizen voting in its elections. The Vermont legislature must still approve that measure before taking effect.

Protecting the rule of law is at the core of RITE’s mission; this includes defending the franchise of voting from being unlawfully extended to noncitizens.

_**[READ MORE](https://riteusa.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=dc5917dfc5aa19cc3795efbb2&id=abd98242d8&e=ea91f782ea)** : RITE BACKS EFFORT TO STOP NONCITIZEN VOTING IN VERMONT_

## 2\. 🍑 DeKalb County Caught Violating Georgia Election Law
In response to a **[legal complaint](https://riteusa.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=dc5917dfc5aa19cc3795efbb2&id=3d328b3877&e=ea91f782ea)** filed by RITE, the Georgia Election Board has launched an investigation into DeKalb County for cashing in a $2 million “Zuck Bucks” grant paid for by liberal front groups Center for Tech and Civic Life (CTCL) and the U.S. Alliance for Election Excellence.
* This new Zuck Bucks grant is a clear affront to Georgia law, which has banned the use of private money to fund election administration since 2021.
* RITE’s complaint and the subsequent investigation have spurred the Georgia General Assembly to move forward with legislation that would make it doubly clear that only public funds can be used to run Georgia’s elections.

Instead of using the $300 million donated by Mark Zuckerberg to alleviate pandemic-related issues, liberal dark money groups like CTCL used the money to finance get-out-the-vote activities in counties that heavily favored Joe Biden. The donations have become known as “Zuck Bucks.”
* **[Bloomberg Law](https://riteusa.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=dc5917dfc5aa19cc3795efbb2&id=d37cb8a6d3&e=ea91f782ea)** : RITE’s complaint challenges the “creative accounting” DeKalb County is using to attempt to justify accepting the $2 million from a dark-money front group.

**[_READ MORE_](https://riteusa.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=dc5917dfc5aa19cc3795efbb2&id=1dbb296b49&e=ea91f782ea) :** _DEKALB COUNTY VIOLATED THE LAW BY ACCEPTING $2 MILLION IN ‘ZUCK BUCKS’_

## 3\. 📝 RITE Sues to Stop Arizona from Subverting Signature Verification

In collaboration with the Arizona Free Enterprise Club, RITE has filed a lawsuit in Arizona challenging then-Secretary of State Katie Hobbs’ instructions to abandon state law and accept any signature on file for comparison when confirming the validity of mail ballots.
* Arizona election law specifically limits the sources of signatures election administrators can use to verify the validity of mail ballots.

While she was Secretary of State, now-Governor Katie Hobbs issued instructions violating state law by allowing election administrators to stockpile signatures for mail-in ballot verification collected from multiple unauthorized sources. Of course, as the database of signatures grows, the more likely someone can impersonate a voter. The risk is even more pronounced given that the instructions allow stockpiling of signatures from potentially unreliable sources.
* This lawsuit will correct the problem and ensure that signature verification remains a useful safeguard of the integrity of mail-in ballots. Only signatures from authorized, reliable sources should be used to verify the authenticity of mail-in ballots.

**[READ MORE](https://riteusa.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=dc5917dfc5aa19cc3795efbb2&id=8d181f3abf&e=ea91f782ea)** : _Future Arizona Elections in Jeopardy Unless AZ Strikes Hobbs Signature Scheme_

## 4\. ✅RITE Asks Nevada To Affirm Its Count

Nevada election law requires regular public updates on its number of registered voters, but there is little transparency into how officials are ensuring its registration list is accurate.

RITE has asked Nevada state and county officials for the receipts that prove they have done the work required under state and federal law. Through a series of public records requests, RITE wants to confirm whether Nevada is using sound practices in managing its list of registered voters.
* Maintaining voter rolls is especially critical in Nevada because it is one of eight states which automatically mails ballots to all voters.

The state and counties should be eager to respond to RITE’s requests and confirm whether they are taking all necessary steps to ensure that only citizens are registered and that they are diligently removing deceased and non-resident voters from their rolls.
* RITE has submitted detailed requests to the Nevada Secretary of State and Clark and Washoe counties.
* RITE is ready to go to court, if necessary, to enforce its right to this critical information if the state or county officials fail to fulfill their legal obligations.

---

body:
Team,
This is the last month of the first quarter of the year. While many of us in North Carolina are focused on the NCAA tournament, I have some other big things to focus on.
At the end of this month, my fundraising numbers will become public. That means that Bo Hines and anyone else looking to defeat me in the 2024 election will know exactly what they are up against.
We have no other choice but to show up strong. That’s why I’m reaching out to you directly.
Can you help me and my team bring in an additional $2,500 before the end of the day on the 15th? [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/2303-q1-wn-mm?refcode=230313-email]
Any amount you can give helps us keep up the momentum and have the strongest possible Q1 fundraising report.
Thank you for your unwavering support.
Wiley

subject: 𝑺𝑻𝑼𝑵𝑵𝑰𝑵𝑮 news
disclaimer_text: Paid for by UNITEDemocrats PAC
body:
Peter, this could change everything

| Peter, this could change **_EVERYTHING!_** [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/60144664/396146634/-464191946?amount=3&refcode=UD_20230313_EMDF_E2_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzgxNTI4IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjRmMjA3Y2Y5LWY2YzEtZWQxMS1hOGUwLTAwMjI0ODMyZTgxMSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=ufQH_qXN3GeNaeoYUnXHEhOagJrL49jmIKN9upLdR5A=) **FIRST:** Kari Lake made headlines when she refused to admit defeat in the Arizona governor’s race, _despite losing by over 17,000 votes!_

**THEN: Donald Trump enabled her MAGA lies** – he demanded she be “installed” as governor and supported her phony lawsuits.

Since Senator Scott released his RESCUE AMERICA plan, he has gotten patriots from all over the country to stand up to the establishment and DEMAND change! Thank you, Priscilla, Team Scott | | | A message for you, from Senator Rick Scott: Joe Biden’s America includes record high inflation, open borders, unlimited spending, and increasing crime. Defeating the radical Left has never been more important and it will be no easy task. Peter, with your support, I can continue to protect our Conservative values. I can’t do it without patriots like you, so Thank you for your support, Senator Rick Scott | | Paid for by Rick Scott for Florida | | Contributions to this committee are not deductible as charitable contributions for Federal income tax purposes. name: Judicial Watch Tipsheet
subject: Judicial Watch: Federal Appeals Court Hears Challenge To FBI’s Withholding of Communications with Banks Regarding January 6 Disturbance
body:
Judicial Watch announced recently that a court hearing was held (audio) in the U.S. Court of Appeals for the DC Circuit on Friday, March 10, 2023, in the Freedom of Information Act (FOIA) lawsuit against the U.S. Department of Justice for records of communication between the Federal Bureau of Investigation (FBI) and several financial institutions about the reported transfer of financial transactions made by people in DC, Maryland and Virginia on January 5 and January 6, 2021.

| | |
---
---
| | | Because no one is above the law! | Mar 13, 2023

It claims that its sole mission is assisting states to improve the accuracy of America’s voter rolls and increase access to voter registration for all eligible voters. clean_body: Judicial Watch announced recently that a court hearing was held (audio) in the U.S. Court of Appeals for the DC Circuit on Friday, March 10, 2023, in the Freedom of Information Act (FOIA) lawsuit against the U.S. Department of Justice for records of communication between the Federal Bureau of Investigation (FBI) and several financial institutions about the reported transfer of financial transactions made by people in DC, Maryland and Virginia on January 5 and January 6, 2021. | | | | | | Because no one is above the law! | Mar 13, 2023 ---|---|--- Today's Top Stories | | | | | Judicial Watch announced recently that a court hearing was held (audio) in the U.S. Court of Appeals for the DC Circuit on Friday, March 10, 2023, in the Freedom of Information Act (FOIA) lawsuit against the U.S. Department of Justice for records of communication between the Federal Bureau of Investigation (FBI) and several financial institutions about the reported transfer of financial transactions made by people in DC, Maryland and Virginia on January 5 and January 6, 2021 ---|--- | | | | | “Simply put, Ms. Fuller embarrassed Virginia officials over their deadly soft-on-crime bail policies. As the court noted, our client commented on a serious public safety matter of widespread public interest,” stated Judicial Watch President Tom Fitton. “The lawsuit will now proceed to discovery and we hope, ultimately, to trial.” ---|--- | | | | | The media is condemning officials in Republican-led states for withdrawing from a controversial data-sharing consortium that purports to help manage voter registration rolls and, not surprisingly, the news reports fail to tell the whole story. The system is known as the Electronic Registration Information Center (ERIC) and it claims to be an efficient and cost-effective mechanism for states to maintain accurate voter rolls. ERIC is a nonprofit that was formed by leftist operatives in 2012 and, until recently, had more than 30 member states. It claims that its sole mission is assisting states to improve the accuracy of America’s voter rolls and increase access to voter registration for all eligible voters. ---|--- | | | | | Judicial Watch announced recently that it filed an amicus curiae (friend of the court) brief in support of Texas-based Alliance for Hippocratic Medicine (AHM) in its lawsuit against the Food and Drug Administration over the FDA’s approval of the controversial abortion drug Mifeprex(Mifepristone, formerly known as RU-486). In its brief, Judicial Watch describes the FDA’s approval process as “arbitrary, capricious, an abuse of discretion and not in accordance with the law.” ---|--- | | | The Blaze Over 1 million inactive voters have been removed from the voter rolls in Los Angeles County, California, stemming from a lawsuit filed in 2017. In an effort to clean up voter rolls and prevent possible voter fraud, Judicial Watch, a conservative organization that promotes government transparency, sued Los Angeles County on behalf of legally registered voters. Just the News Tom Fitton, president of Judicial Watch, urged conservatives at CPAC 2023 to reject the “demonic assault” on the “bodies and minds” of American children. He then condemned online censorship and the effort to include critical race theory in school curriculum. Judicial Watch As if the Mexican border crisis were not sufficiently compromising national security, the Biden administration invited officials from a communist country that appears on the government’s list of state terrorism sponsors to tour sensitive U.S. maritime security facilities. The bizarre secret jaunt was scheduled last week to grant a delegation from Cuba’s Border Guard and Ministry of Foreign Affairs access to the nation’s Coast Guard Headquarters in Washington D.C. as well as port facilities in Wilmington, North Carolina. | CLIPS | | | | | | Keep our investigators on the job uncovering the truth: | | | | | ---|---|--- Judicial Watch, Inc. 425 3rd St Sw Ste 800, Washington, DC 20024 202.646.5172 (C)2017-2023, All Rights Reserved |
